While Emperor Krayt's forces strike at hundreds of targets across the galaxy without thought for their own losses, one place has remained safe: the hidden Jedi temple on Taivas. But that happens to be the one place Krayt most wants to annihilate--if he can locate it and learn the secrets of its defenses.
So, it's only a matter of time... and torture...
title: Legacy: War #3

synopsis:
The allies launch a series of maneuvers designed to lure Darth Krayt into a trap. Only who is trapping whom?
As Jedi and Imperial Knights fight shoulder to shoulder against the Sith in defense of the Hidden Temple, Cade Skywalker can't help but think of his father and the horrible losses the Jedi suffered the last time the Sith attacked...
The tide of battle turns, and the future of the Jedi hangs in the balance!
title: Legacy: War #4

synopsis:
In the aftermath of the latest battle, the Jedi, the Galactic Alliance, and Roan Fel's Imperials retreat to the stronghold planet Bastion to lick their wounds. In the face of the Sith Empire's new secret weapon, there are some who counsel that resistance is futile.
But the Sith have suffered, too, and Emperor Fel knows that now is the time to attack. Plans are made and plans within plans. For Cade Skywalker knows that this war must ultimately come down to him versus Darth Krayt.
No matter what the cost, Krayt must die!
title: Legacy: War #5

synopsis:
You can't keep a bad Sith down!
Darth Krayt has returned from the "dead," stronger, more evil, and more determined than ever to crush the galaxy under his heel. With Emperor Roan Fel's Imperials, the Galactic Alliance, the Jedi, and even some of his own Sith followers arrayed against him, Krayt would seem overmatched—but his enemies have not reckoned with the power of the dark side!
If Cade Skywalker was ever going to run from his legacy, now would be the time!
title: Legacy: War #6

displayTitle: Lego Star Wars III - The Clone Wars
synopsis: LEGO Star Wars III: The Clone Wars will allow fans to explore endlessly and laugh their way through the Star Wars galaxy in the most humorous, accessible and action-packed LEGO game to date.
title: Lego Star Wars III - The Clone Wars

displayTitle: Lego Star Wars - The Complete Saga
synopsis: Kick Some Brick in I through VI! Play through all six Star Wars movies in one videogame! Adding new characters, new levels, new features and for the first time ever, the chance to build and battle your way through a fun Star Wars galaxy on your PC!
title: Lego Star Wars - The Complete Saga

displayTitle: Lego Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga
synopsis: Play through all nine Skywalker saga films in a game unlike any other. With over 300 playable characters, over 100 vehicles, and 23 planets to explore, a galaxy far, far away has never been more fun! *Includes classic Obi-Wan Kenobi playable character
title: Lego Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga

displayTitle: Leia and the Great Island Escape
synopsis: Leia and her team of rebels must outwit the Empire, avoid perilous pirates, and escape from a volcanic island planet before it's too late!
title: Leia and the Great Island Escape

displayTitle: Adventures: Princess Leia And The Royal Ransom
synopsis: Princess Leia, Han Solo, and Chewie are racing to deliver vital information to the Rebel Alliance. But Han allows himself to be distracted with the idea of earning some fast credits. Ignoring pleas from Leia, and the threat of trailing Imperial Star Destroyers, Han makes an unscheduled stop at a hot smuggling hub to pick up some cargo. Unfortunately, the crate he takes aboard the Millennium Falcon doesn't contain the kind of contraband he was led to believe. It's not simple or harmless - it's the kidnapped femme fatale, Princess Mi!!
title: Star Wars Adventures: Princess Leia And The Royal Ransom

synopsis: For Leia Organa, turning sixteen is more than a measure of the passing of time. A sacred tradition means she is about to declare her loyalty to Alderaan and its people for life.
title: Leia: Princess of Alderaan

synopsis: Just when you thought this Alderaanian princess couldn’t get any cuter, this manga adaptation of Claudia Gray’s Leia: Princess of Alderaan story shows the young prodigy looking her very best as she sets off on her most adventurous mission of her teen life. The art in this manga effortlessly grasps the compassion, sincerity, and fierceness in Leia’s eyes as she sets off to follow her heart.
title: Leia, Princess of Alderaan Vol. 1 (Manga)

synopsis:
Star Wars Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 2 is a trade paperback compilation of Leia Organa: Ordeal of the Princess, a manga adaptation of Claudia Gray's Leia, Princess of Alderaan junior novel.
A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away.... On planet Crate, [sic] Leia met her father, Bail Organa, who was meeting with a mysterious armed group. After Leia learned the truth of her father's investigation mission, she decides to fight against the Empire herself. What awaits Leia in the next target, Naboo system?
title: Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 2 (Manga)

synopsis: "Leia's Trust" is a comic story featured in the twelfth issue of the Star Wars Comic magazine, released in December 2014. The story includes the characters Leia Organa and Silam Dunerz.
title: Leia's Trust

synopsis: As the Clone Wars continue the wealthy citizens of Coruscant still crave leisure opportunities – be it games of chance, cutting-edge fashion, or even the thrill of high speed! Welcome back to the world of podracing in this issue of Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine!
title: Leisure

synopsis: "Life Below" is a comic story in Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 9.
title: Life Below

synopsis:
**The Galaxy's Favorite Holiday!**

Happy Life Day! Celebrate the galaxy's favorite holiday with a collection of festive tales from all across the Star Wars saga! Life Day is the last thing on Han Solo's mind when he and Chewbacca find themselves outgunned and under fire. But Chewie won't give up hope, remembering the lessons of Life Days past and present. As for Life Days yet to come...well, they'll have to survive the night first!
title: Life Day #1

synopsis:
A collection of eight holiday-themed midwinter myths and fables told around winter fires and high-tech heating pods across the galaxy. From Jedi in the city to Ewoks in the forest, from Wookiees to droids, the stories gather holiday feasts, ghostly apparitions, snowy adventures, and much more. Ultimately these are tales of hope in the darkest of days, of family both found and otherwise, of kindness, and of love.

The collected stories are "A Coruscant Solstice," "An Old Hope," "The Kindling," "The Kroolok," "The Song of Winter's Heart," "The Spirit of Life Day," "Reflection Day," and "The Tree of Life."
title: Life Day Treasury

synopsis: This High Republic-era canon short story collection was published in the short story collection "Life Day Treasury", written by George Mann and Cavan Scott featuring illustrations by Grant Griffin.
title: A Coruscant Solstice

synopsis: "Lockdown" is a short comic story that was published in the magazine Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.47 in 2013. It continues the story arc of "Hypermatters" and "Lockdown".
title: Lockdown

synopsis: Emperor Palpatine and his apprentice, Darth Vader, find themselves trapped on a remote planet with no way out. When they encounter rebel activity on the surface, things get a little more complicated.
title: Lords of the Sith

synopsis: Thane and Ciena have always done everything together. When the childhood best friends join the Imperial Academy, they’re certain their futures will remain intertwined. Everything changes when one of them ends up on the opposite side of the Galactic Civil War.
title: Lost Stars

synopsis: Not a single heartstring is spared in this epic finale to the Lost Stars manga series. Watch the exciting conclusion to the complicated but spicy relationship between Ciena Ree and Thane Kyrell with your very own eyes in an art style that just works so well for this story. Really, whoever came up with this idea is a genius.
title: Lost Stars: Vol. 3 (Manga)

synopsis: The first volume of the Lost Stars manga adaptation starts off halfway through the events of the original novel putting you straight in the action. Whether you’re new to the story or are already a fan of Claudia Gray’s praised novel, there is something new for all readers to enjoy with incredible imagery and an artfully-summarized retelling of one of the best romantic tales of all time.
title: Lost Stars: Vol. 1 (Manga)

synopsis: This second installation of the Lost Stars manga series captures a handful of the most emotionally-compelling scenes from the original novel and expresses the weight of Ciena and Thane’s feelings in a way that’ll grip your heart right at its core. Every facial expression within these pages will test the strength and willpower of your tear ducts as this incredible artwork reaches out to your soul and rips you apart from the inside.
title: Lost Stars: Vol. 2 (Manga)

displayTitle: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral
synopsis: On a planet ruled by a tribe of Sith (marooned thousands of years ago and cut off from the galaxy) the throne holder is about to be challenged by a power-hungry Sith rebel from the slums... and a thwarted royal Sith princess! Their few shared interests set them on a quest together, but most certainly not as partners!
title: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral

displayTitle: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #1
synopsis: On a planet ruled by a tribe of Sith (marooned thousands of years ago and cut off from the galaxy) the throne holder is about to be challenged by a power-hungry Sith rebel from the slums... and a thwarted royal Sith princess! Their few shared interests set them on a quest together, but most certainly not as partners!
title: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #1

displayTitle: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #2
synopsis: Having set sail on a prisoner vessel to uncharted territories, a rebel and a stowaway princess find themselves in a losing battle with their crewmates against a society of strange self-proclaimed exiles. When they are taken in by the exiles, new opportunities for power within the civilization pique their interest. The rebel recklessly takes the first opening to go after a guarded weapon he believes could upend the entire tribe of Sith!
title: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #2

displayTitle: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #3
synopsis: The release of Sith Lord Baron Dreypa has quickened a Sith rebel's hope of overturning the ruling order of a lost Sith tribe, just not as he'd hoped, with himself in charge... But at least Dreypa's attack on the home of the princess has brought deliverance to the slums of the Sith tribe! Imprisoned, the princess struggles to escape, hoping to hinder the attack and somehow prevent the awakening of Dreypa's ancient sleeping army!
title: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #3

displayTitle: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #4
synopsis:
An ambitious Sith rebel, Spinner, is about to upset the balance of a lost tribe of Sith. When he is arrested for treason and sent away on a prisoner vessel, thoughts of overcoming his station, destroying the Tribe, and even finding a way to escape into the galaxy lead Spinner to a powerful, long-forgotten weapon. A rival stowaway Sith on that same vessel has her own ideas about the future of the Tribe. They don't need eradication; they need a new leader, her!

Collects
- Star Wars: Lost Tribe of the Sith #1-#5
title: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #4

displayTitle: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #5
synopsis:
Parlan Spinner, an outcast from the Lost Tribe, takes the newly discovered Jedi starship *Last Hope* on a joyride that carries him into the atmosphere above Kesh. Before he can escape into the wider galaxy, Remulus Dreypa contacts him with an ultimatum: hand over the ship or he will harm the Sith princess Takara Hilts, who has become Spinner's unlikely ally and friend. Dreypa summons Spinner to Tahv, the Lost Tribe's capital.

Dreypa and his Leviathans lay waste to much of Tahv before Spinner turns the *Last Hope*'s turbolasers on the monsters. Takara uses Force lightning to kill the last Leviathan and breaks free, and she and Dreypa land aboard the ship. Spinner flies to the shores of the Southern Ocean, "hands" the vessel to Dreypa, then leaps into the water with Takara. Too late, Dreypa discovers Spinner has set the ship on a one-way course into Sessal Spire, a volcano at the edge of Keshtah Minor. Dreypa and the *Last Hope* are destroyed, denying Kesh any hyperspace-capable ship and keeping the Lost Tribe's existence secret. Spinner becomes a hero of the Tribe, is named one of Grand Lord Varner Hilts's Hands, and begins a romance with his former enemy Takara.
title: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #5

displayTitle: Lost Tribe of the Sith: The Collected Stories
synopsis:
Five thousand years ago, after a Jedi ambush, the Sith mining ship *Omen* lies wrecked on a remote, unknown planet. Its commander, Yaru Korsin, battles the bloodshed of a mutinous faction led by his own brother. Marooned and facing death, the Sith crew have no choice but to venture into their desolate surroundings, where they face brutal challenges: vicious predators, lethal plagues, and tribal people who worship vengeful gods. Like true Sith warriors, they counter every threat with the dark side of the Force.

The struggles are only beginning for the proud, uncompromising Sith, driven to rule at all costs. They vanquish the primitive natives and set out to reclaim their destiny as rulers of the galaxy. But as their legacy grows over thousands of years, the Sith find themselves tested by the most dangerous threat of all: the enemy within. This volume gathers the eight original installments of the *Lost Tribe of the Sith* series along with the never-before-published finale, *Pandemonium*.
title: Lost Tribe of the Sith: The Collected Stories

displayTitle: Luke and the Lost Jedi Temple
synopsis: When Luke Skywalker has to make an emergency landing on a strange planet, he is destined to discover a faithful friend, a formidable foe, and untold secrets of the Force.
title: Luke and the Lost Jedi Temple

displayTitle: Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor
synopsis: Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor is a standalone novel by Matthew Stover that chronicles the Battle of Mindor. It was originally scheduled to be released in hardcover in February 2008 by Del Rey, but was later moved to October 21 before being eventually released on December 30. The paperback was released on February 23, 2010.
title: Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor

synopsis: Though Luke Skywalker feels that his life on a moisture farm on Tatooine is boring, the events seen in Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope are neither young Luke's first adventure, nor his first meeting with the mysterious Ben Kenobi. In this story, based on events in the Star Wars Radio Drama, Luke and his friend Windy learn for the first time that the Jundland Wastes are not to be traveled lightly...
title: Luke Skywalker's Walkabout

synopsis: Luke Skywalker's Race Against Time was a young children's book telling a story about Luke Skywalker flying his X-wing against an Imperial ship headed to a Rebel base. It was written by John Whitman and illustrated by Kilian Plunkett. As a Cruise Along Book, the book came packaged with a Micro Machines X-Ray Fleet miniature X-wing fighter.
title: Luke Skywalker's Race Against Time

displayTitle: Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire
synopsis: "Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire" is a short story written by Michael Mikaelian, featured in Star Wars Galaxy #3 which was published by The Topps Company, Inc. in Spring 1995. The story was also available online at Hyperspace. It takes place in 4 ABY, sometime after the Battle of Saijo. Besides the main story, Dark Star also contains much of the title character's backstory, which can be found in her article.
title: Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire

synopsis:
**One of the Greatest Jedi Must Stop an Incendiary Secret From Falling Into the Wrong Hands!**

Even in the years before the Clone Wars, Mace Windu was known for his discipline, determination and combat skills. When a scientist's discovery threatens the balance of the galaxy, Mace is led down a treacherous path of mystery and action. Introducing Azita Cruuz, a pirate with a deadly secret, who the Hutts and the Republic will stop at nothing to control!
title: Mace Windu #1

synopsis:
**Into the Storm Against the Bore Worm!**

Mace Windu and Azita Cruz [sic] must work together to escape the menace of the Bore Worm! But what else lies in their path and who is following them? And what is coaxium ultra?
title: Mace Windu #2

synopsis:
**One of the Greatest Jedi Must Stop an Explosive Secret From Falling Into the Wrong Hands!**

On the refinery moon Ro Mira, Mace Windu and smuggler Azita Cruuz, carrying the formula to a paradigm-smashing energy source, are on the run from Ro Mira's security forces and a Hutt-hired bounty hunter. Can Mace dispatch a squadron of fighters led by the ruthless Anzellan Yaya Shram with nothing by his lightsaber and the Force? Introducing Muro and Diya, Dusk Weavers of the Had'le Path, a cult obsessed with wiping technology from the face of the galaxy!
title: Mace Windu #3

synopsis:
**Introducing the Shroud!**

Just as Mace and smuggler Azita Cruuz arrive at her freighter, they're beset by Muro, Diya and the leader of their cult, the Shroud. 'The Shroud is something that Mace Windu was never trained for and isn't prepared for, and might push a Jedi Knight to his breaking point!
title: Mace Windu #4

synopsis: "Mandalorian Memories" is a short comic story published in Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.41. It served as a prequel to "Bounty," an episode from Season Four of the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series.
title: Mandalorian Memories

displayTitle: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand
synopsis:
Set around the time of Emperor Palpatine's death, this miniseries follows Mara Jade, the Emperor's Hand, as she carries out her final assignment. Having failed to eliminate the young Jedi Luke Skywalker, Mara is dispatched to bring down a crimelord seeking to rebuild the criminal organization once known as Black Sun, now operating as Black Nebula.

Manipulating a guard into letting her escape and using the Emperor's own codes to slip away from Imperial Center, Mara evades Director Ysanne Isard, who loses her trail. She investigates a casino she suspects is a front for Black Nebula, using the Force to win a fortune at the tables and draw the attention of its manager, which is precisely her intent, eventually securing an audience with the crimelord Dequc himself. Forced to improvise as her plan repeatedly shifts, Mara succeeds in dealing a crippling blow to the organization, escaping unharmed aboard Dequc's own getaway ship, which she leaves for Imperial forces along with the evidence needed to finish Black Nebula off.
title: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand

displayTitle: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #0
synopsis: A preview to the *Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand* miniseries, set shortly before the events of *A New Hope* and several years before the rest of the story. Mara Jade plans an infiltration mission to spy on Wilhuff Tarkin, and Palpatine introduces her to Darth Vader for the first time.
title: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #0

displayTitle: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #1
synopsis: After she fails to eliminate the young Jedi Luke Skywalker, Mara Jade is dispatched to take down a crimelord who seeks to reestablish the criminal organization Black Sun. Little does she know that the Emperor's imminent date with death will change her life forever! Written by Timothy Zahn and Michael A. Stackpole, and illustrated by Carlos Ezquerra.
title: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #1

displayTitle: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #3
synopsis: In the wake of the Emperor's death at the hands of Luke Skywalker and Darth Vader, Mara Jade has been captured! Since her captor is one of only a handful who knows she is the Emperor's Hand, Mara knows she must escape quickly—or die.
title: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #3

displayTitle: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #4
synopsis: After the death of Emperor Palpatine, Mara Jade escapes from Imperial Center and throws herself headlong into the underground of the Empire's underworld. Though her master is dead, Jade must complete her final mission… even if it costs her life!
title: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #4

displayTitle: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #5
synopsis: Fed up with being hunted by her enemies, Mara Jade decides it's time to become the hunter. First on her payback list: the evil Dequc, Black Nebula crime lord—the man who survived her final assignment for the Emperor! Now, Mara must infiltrate his hidden base, take him down, and escape! Could she finally be in over her head?
title: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #5

displayTitle: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #6
synopsis: Mara Jade has destroyed many enemies of the Empire in her time, and has always carried out her missions with forethought and skill. But an unforeseen variable is about to enter the scene of her final mission for her dead employer, and Mara knows that her own survival is second to getting the job done!
title: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #6

displayTitle: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #2
synopsis: Under cover of an Imperial raid, Mara Jade infiltrates the headquarters of would-be Black Nebula overlord Dequc, and assassinates the criminal leader. But back on Imperial Center, she finds evidence that the person she shot was a stand-in, and that the real Dequc is still out there, and gunning for her!
title: Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand #2

synopsis: "Mask of Iron" is a short comic that was published in the magazine Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.44.
title: Mask of Iron

synopsis: Obi-Wan Kenobi and Qui-Gon Jinn are requested for a special mission, even as the Padawan doubts whether or not he and his master are a good fit.
title: Master and Apprentice

synopsis: Darth Vader’s mysterious mission may lead him down a path even darker than he’s dared before: the possibility of disobeying his master in favor of his own desires.
title: Master of Evil

synopsis: The return of Maul in Star Wars Rebels changed Ezra Bridger’s life forever. Desperate to seek revenge, Maul grasps at the first glimpse of hope he can find: Two Jedi and one former enemy on a world filled with evil. If Ahsoka Tano won’t let him escape again, at least he can use Kanan’s padawan to learn where Kenobi might be hiding.
title: Rebels: Maul (cinestory comic)

synopsis: In service of his master Darth Sidious, Maul fights deadly opponents for more than just survival. He’s also after something that could take down the Jedi Order for good.
title: Maul: Lockdown

synopsis: After the Clone Wars, Maul plots to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire.
title: Maul: Shadow Lord

synopsis: Set after the events of "The Clone Wars," Maul plots to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan, who could be the apprentice he is seeking, that will aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.
title: Maul: Shadow Lord - Season 1

synopsis: In the criminal underworld of Janix, Maul enacts a plan to consolidate his power.
title: The Dark Revenge

synopsis: One last test, one last chance to escape and survive.
title: The Dark Lord

synopsis: Maul seeks to enlighten his new prisoners while Lawson pursues him.
title: Sinister Schemes

synopsis: As Maul's plans come together, Devon considers her options.
title: Whispers in the Unknown

synopsis: A confrontation between Lawson and Maul threatens everyone.
title: Pride and Vengeance

synopsis: Captain Lawson faces a sobering new reality.
title: Inquisition

synopsis: Pushed to their breaking point, our heroes have no choice but to run.
title: Night of the Hunted

synopsis: As enemies close in, Maul is forced to make a stand.
title: Call to Oblivion

synopsis: A hasty escape plan proves dangerous, while an isolated Maul regroups.
title: The Creeping Fear

synopsis: Trust is tested as newly forged allies navigate the only way out.
title: Strange Allies

synopsis: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord is an animated series whose first season of ten episodes was released between April 6 and May 4, 2026. Set during the Imperial Era, a few short years after Order 66,
title: Maul: Shadow Lord - Season 2

synopsis: "Maze Run" is a short story written by David J. Williams and Mark S. Williams that appeared in the magazine Star Wars Insider 131 in 2012.
title: Maze Run

synopsis: On the jungle world of Drongar, a group of healers work tirelessly to save as many as they can from the deadly effects of the galaxy-wide war.
title: MedStar I: Battle Surgeons

synopsis: As the Clone Wars rage on, Padawan Barriss Offee prepares to face her greatest test yet.
title: MedStar II: Jedi Healer

synopsis: "MedStar: Intermezzo" is a short story written by Michael Reaves and Steve Perry, published in Star Wars Insider 83 and Star Wars: The Official Magazine 65. It takes place between the novels MedStar I: Battle Surgeons and MedStar II: Jedi Healer and features characters from the two novels. In March 2008, the story was archived on Hyperspace.
title: MedStar: Intermezzo

synopsis: Meltdown on Hoth was a children's book written by Jane Mason and illustrated by Chris Trevas. It tells a story set just before The Empire Strikes Back, when C-3PO and R2-D2 deal with a problem of heat in Princess Leia's Echo Base quarters, as mentioned in the opening scenes of the film.
title: Meltdown on Hoth

synopsis: "Memory Loss" is a comic story featured in the thirteenth issue of the Star Wars Comic magazine, released in December of 2014. The story centers on C-3PO getting his memory wipe, as ordered by Bail Prestor Organa in Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith.
title: Memory Loss

synopsis: Years before she led the crew of the Ghost, Hera Syndulla was a young pilot looking to make a difference in the galaxy. Hera sets out with Goll, a close ally of her father, Cham Syndulla, on a dangerous mission to help the citizens of her homeworld, Ryloth, now languishing under the might of the Empire.
title: Mercy Mission

synopsis: Just when it seems things couldn’t get any worse for the Republic or the Jedi, events on Corellia take a turn for the worse.
title: Midnight Horizon

synopsis: "Milk Run to Maarka!" is a short comic story published in Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.6.
title: Milk Run to Maarka!

synopsis: ===Back cover=== Climb aboard, buckle up, and prepare to jump to hyperspace for the ultimate flight of the ship that launched a thousand fates.
title: Millennium Falcon

synopsis:
With Trioculus imprisoned in carbonite, the Prophets of the Dark Side gather to hear Kadann's new prophecy on the leadership of the Empire: that Trioculus will never lead again, that the new leader is on Duro, and that the last days of the Rebel Alliance are near. As the Imperial Moffs plot to recover Trioculus and the Prophets plot to destroy him, Luke, Leia, and Han travel to Dagobah, where the Rebels begin building a school for Ken and a fortress, DRAPAC, atop Mount Yoda.

A Duros named Dustini brings word that Duro is under attack by stormtroopers looting artifacts, and he is stabbed by a booby-trapped golden crown, seemingly fulfilling Kadann's prophecy. As the Rebels send a mission to stop the Empire on the dying world, the Prophets destroy the carbonite block, never realizing it holds a decoy and that Trioculus still lives. In a hidden cavern on Duro, Luke, Han, and Ken finally find Triclops, the true son of Emperor Palpatine. When Imperial troops try to seize him, Triclops helps the Rebels escape and returns with them to DRAPAC, vowing to bring down his father's Empire.
title: Mission from Mount Yoda

synopsis: Vernestra and Imri set out on a mission to rescue their friend from the dangerous and unpredictable Nihil.
title: Mission to Disaster

synopsis: Monopoly Star Wars is the 1997 Monopoly franchise Star Wars video game, based on the board game. The game was developed by Artech Studios and published by Hasbro Interactive. It was released exclusively for Microsoft Windows computers. The game employs the same basic ruleset of traditional Monopoly gameplay, but the Star Wars theme includes famous characters and locales in place of the original game pieces and properties.
title: Monopoly Star Wars

synopsis: Han and Qi’ra depend on the White Worms for survival, which means they’re going to have to do some things they might regret in order to move up in the ranks of the group’s chaotic organization.
title: Most Wanted

displayTitle: Moving Target: A Princess Leia Adventure
synopsis: Princess Leia’s leadership skills are put to the test as she leads an important mission for the rebellion, and against the Empire.
title: Moving Target: A Princess Leia Adventure

synopsis: "My Spaceship, My Enemy" is a comic story written by Rik Hoskin featured in the seventh issue of Star Wars Comic magazine, released in June of 2014. The story focuses on Han Solo and Chewbacca and follows up on the events of the fifth issue's comic Repairs.
title: My Spaceship, My Enemy

synopsis: "Night Moves!" is a short comic included with Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.27.
title: Night Moves!

synopsis:
"No Sympathy" is a comic strip written by Martin Fisher, drawn by Bob Molesworth and edited by Gunther Nickel. The story was published in the fourteenth issue of the Star Wars Rebels Magazine series by Egmont UK Ltd, which was released on January 27, 2016.
According to Fisher, the story takes place between the Star Wars Rebels episodes "Wings of the Master" and "Blood Sisters."
title: No Sympathy

synopsis: "No Way Out" is a story in Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 9. It stars Mace Windu as he discovers a lost city.
title: No Way Out

synopsis: Fast approaches the ultimate destiny of one of the Jedi's most renowned masters! As he spends his final days in the remote deserts of Tatooine, Obi-Wan Kenobi takes time to reflect on, and record, key moments of a heroic life long-lived. Writing in old leather-bound journals from his hermit's hut, Obi-Wan remembers his days as a young Jedi Initiate, his trials as a Padawan, the crucible of Jedi Knighthood and the Clone Wars, and some of the earliest challenges he faced as a true Master of the Force! In this tale, Obi-Wan considers a watershed Youngling adventure he narrowly survived on Coruscant when he was but eight years of age. This is just the beginning of his Jedi journey!
title: Obi-Wan

synopsis:
Fast approaches the ultimate destiny of one of the Jedi's most renowned masters!

As he spends his final days in the remote deserts of Tatooine, Obi-Wan Kenobi takes time to reflect on, and record, key moments of a heroic life long-lived. Writing in old leather-bound journals from his hermit's hut, Obi-Wan remembers his days as a young Jedi Initiate, his trials as a Padawan, the crucible of Jedi Knighthood and the Clone Wars, and some of the earliest challenges he faced as a true Master of the Force! In this tale, Obi-Wan considers a watershed Youngling adventure he narrowly survived on Coruscant when he was but eight years of age... This is just the beginning of his Jedi journey!
title: Obi-Wan #1

synopsis: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan answer the distress call of an outpost on the edge of the galaxy. What's the secret behind the devastation wrought upon the terrifying moon base? Will whatever plunged it into darkness pull a Padawan off his enlightened path?
title: Obi-Wan #2

synopsis: While continuing to wait out a nasty sandstorm on Tatooine, Obi-Wan reflects on one of his most grueling experiences in the Clone Wars...It's a memory full of pain and bloodshed, and one that has lasting consequences. The battle also reminds Obi-Wan of an age-old question he has long wrestled with throughout his life: what is a Jedi's true purpose in war?
title: Obi-Wan #3

synopsis: As the sandstorm overtakes his home, Obi-Wan has more time to reflect in (and on) the darkness. He looks back on a time when he and Anakin Skywalker were pulled off the front lines of the Clone Wars to confront a lost soul from Kenobi's wartime past. Can the two Jedi bring a man back from the heart of darkness to which he has fallen?
title: Obi-Wan #4

synopsis:
The fifth issue of the Marvel Comics Obi-Wan Mini-Series
Obi-Wan has closed his journals for now and looks ahead as night falls and the sandstorm that has sequestered him begins to clear. But he discovers something unexpected in the hazards of the Jundland Wastes…a squad of ambushed stormtroopers left to die.But one still has a fighting chance…and Obi-Wan may very well risk everything to save a single injured imperial stormtrooper that can't help but remind Kenobi of the clones he served with so long ago.
title: Obi-Wan #5

synopsis: Before their military heroism in the Clone Wars, before their tragic battle on Mustafar, and many decades before their final confrontation on the Death Star… they were Master Obi-Wan Kenobi and his Padawan learner, Anakin Skywalker. It's been a few years since Obi-Wan pledged to train the young "chosen one," but even as they have grown closer through training, it has been a difficult road. Now, called to a remote planet for assistance, Master and Padawan may be pushed to the breaking point. Writer Charles Soule (Lando, She-Hulk, Daredevil) and artist Marco Checchetto (Star Wars: Shatter
title: Obi-Wan & Anakin

synopsis: Before their military heroism in the Clone Wars, before their tragic battle on Mustafar, and many decades before their final confrontation on the Death Star…they were Master Obi-Wan Kenobi and his Padawan learner, Anakin Skywalker. It's been a few years since Obi-Wan pledged to train the young "chosen one," but even as they have grown closer through training, it has been a difficult road. Now, called to a remote planet for assistance, Master and Padawan may be pushed to the breaking point. Writer Charles Soule (Lando, She-Hulk, Daredevil) and artist Marco Checchetto (Star Wars: Shattered Empire, Avengers World, Punisher) bring us a tale of the Jedi at the height of their power…
title: Obi-Wan & Anakin, Part I

synopsis: Master and Padawan find themselves stranded on an unfamiliar world…a world of strange, primitive technology and dangerous natives. But even if they can save themselves…why were they called to this world?
title: Obi-Wan & Anakin, Part II

synopsis: Obi-Wan and Anakin team together to take on a strange new world …but they are brought into even stranger circumstances. Will the duo be able to save themselves and this world they've been called to?
title: Obi-Wan & Anakin, Part III

synopsis: Obi-Wan and Anakin are trapped on opposite sides of a war…and if they're not careful, they're going to get caught in the crossfire! Plus…why does Anakin want to leave the order?
title: Obi-Wan & Anakin, Part IV

synopsis: War breaks out…with our Jedi caught in the middle! Master and apprentice come to an important realization. Marvel's first Jedi-centric miniseries draws to a dramatic close!
title: Obi-Wan & Anakin, Part V

synopsis: During the reign of the Galactic Empire, former Jedi Master, Obi-Wan Kenobi, embarks on a crucial mission to confront allies turned enemies and face the wrath of the Empire.
title: Obi-Wan

synopsis:
When agents of the Empire pose a new threat, Obi-Wan Kenobi emerges after years of hiding.

Taking place after the events of Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith, Obi-Wan Kenobi is tasked with keeping both of the Skywalker children safe from a distance, until young Leia Organa finds herself held in a ransom plot.

Introducing Reva, the Third Sister of the Inquisitors!
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi #1

synopsis:
**Mission: Save Young Leia Organa!**

The Inquisitors are on the hunt for Jedi. On a dangerous crime-ridden world, Obi-Wan becomes a target. Can Obi-Wan save Princess Leia without the Empire realizing he's alive?
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi #2

synopsis:
**Escape From Planet Mapuzo!**

As Obi-Wan searches for allies to help him evade the Empire, he must face his greatest failure: Darth Vader!
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi #3

synopsis:
**Obi-Wan Plots a Daring Mission Into Enemy Territory!**

Obi-Wan and Tala must evade the Inquisitors to rescue Leia! Meanwhile, Third Sister and the other Inquisitors try to impress Darth Vader by being the one to finally capture Obi-Wan!
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi #4

synopsis:
**Darth Vader Strikes!**

Imperial forces attempt to draw Obi-Wan out! Reva, Third Sister of the Inquisitors, has tightened her grip on the Path outpost that hides the wanted Jedi, Obi-Wan Kenobi. The penultimate chapter of the Obi-Wan Kenobi Disney+ series ends with a bang!
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi #5

synopsis: Obi-Wan realizes saving Leia isn't enough, he must face Darth Vader once more! Meanwhile, Reva has found her ultimate bargaining chip: Luke Skywalker!
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi #6

displayTitle: Tales of Kenobi (Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions)
synopsis:
A single-volume collection pairing two Expanded Universe novels centered on Obi-Wan Kenobi.

*Kenobi*, by John Jackson Miller, follows the Jedi Master in the aftermath of the Clone Wars as he settles on the desert world of Tatooine to secretly watch over the infant Luke Skywalker. Known to locals only as "Ben," the quiet offworlder tries to keep to himself, but when violence flares between moisture farmers and a tribe of marauding Tusken Raiders, he is drawn into the conflict, risking exposure as the hero of the Clone Wars and endangering his true mission as guardian of the galaxy's last hope.

*The Approaching Storm*, by Alan Dean Foster, is set before the Clone Wars, as discontent threatens to fracture the Republic. At Chancellor Palpatine's request, the Jedi Council dispatches Obi-Wan Kenobi and Luminara Unduli, along with their Padawans Anakin Skywalker and Barriss Offee, to quell a secessionist movement on the planet Ansion. To succeed they must complete near-impossible tasks while being stalked by an enemy determined to see the negotiations, and the mission, fail.
title: Tales of Kenobi (Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions)

synopsis:
Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi is a live-action television miniseries developed by Lucasfilm. It premiered on Disney+ on May 27, 2022 and concluded on June 22, 2022. The series features Ewan McGregor reprising his role as Obi-Wan Kenobi from the Star Wars prequel trilogy and Hayden Christensen reprising his role as Darth Vader. It takes place ten years after Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith.

synopsis: During the reign of the Galactic Empire, former Jedi Master, Obi-Wan Kenobi, embarks on a crucial mission to confront allies turned enemies and face the wrath of the Empire.
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi

synopsis: Star Wars: Obsession is a series of comics published by Dark Horse Comics. It ran from November 24, 2004 to May 18, 2005. The concept of the series was to lead directly into Episode III, but publication delays prolonged the release of the final issue until the day before the release of the film.
title: Obsession

synopsis: While Anakin Skywalker enjoys a brief respite from the Clone Wars (and a reunion with his secret wife Padmé Amidala), Obi-Wan Kenobi embarks on a "personal" mission. Kenobi's first stop is a frontier town on the swamp world of Trigalis, where he fights a small army of bounty hunters, duels with a crime lord who has ties to Count Dooku, and obtains undercover help from fellow Jedi Aayla Secura. All that just to verify a rumor about an enemy that he can't forget. Obi-Wan is becoming obsessed, and he knows it. But the danger of flirting with the dark side is a risk he's willing take to save the p
title: Obsession #1

synopsis: Consumed by the belief that the dark Jedi Asajj Ventress still lives, Obi-Wan Kenobi has temporarily forsaken the Clone Wars and recruited Anakin Skywalker in his desperate hunt for Ventress. But Anakin still believes that Obi-Wan is chasing a ghost—and he should know, because he himself killed Ventress. And Anakin's doubts are not assuaged when, following the trail of the rumors of Ventress' existence, they walk into a trap set by their old enemy, the bounty hunter Durge!
title: Obsession #2

synopsis: Lured into a trap aboard a drifting space wreck, Obi-Wan and Anakin become separated, and Anakin is forced to face the seemingly unkillable bounty hunter Durge. But Durge has not reckoned with Skywalker's innate power, or the young man's growing ties to the dark side. Without Obi-Wan's moderating influence, Anakin goes off on Durge! A battle not to be missed!
title: Obsession #3

synopsis: Still convinced that Dark Jedi Asajj Ventress is alive, Obi-Wan Kenobi leads Anakin Skywalker and Senator Bail Organa to the grisly graveyard world of Boz Pity. They're hopelessly out-numbered, but Obi-Wan's obsession has made him blind to the danger. Fortunately, help is on the way. Rig for action as Mace Windu leads a battalion of Jedi and an army of clone troopers to the rescue! All of your favorite Jedi guest star, as well as villains Count Dooku and General Grievous. Plus, the return of ARC Trooper Alpha!
title: Obsession #4

synopsis: On the bleak cemetery world of Boz Pity, the Jedi fight what they hope will be a decisive battle against the Separatists. As a team of powerful Jedi take on Count Dooku, Mace Windu goes one-on-one with General Grievous in a spectacular duel that requires both parties to pull out all the stops! But Obi-Wan Kenobi cares for none of this. He is concerned with only a single target—the enemy he has pursued across the galaxy. But Obi-Wan doesn't realize that his greatest triumph might also lead to his greatest failure, and destroy everything that makes him a Jedi and a hero. The exciting concl
title: Obsession #5

synopsis: "Ocean Rescue" is a comic strip published in the twelfth issue of the Star Wars Rebels Magazine series by Egmont UK Ltd. It was written by Martin Fisher, illustrated by Bob Molesworth and edited by Gunther Nickel. The comic was published on December 2015.

synopsis:
"Off the Rails" (German title "Entgleist") is a comic strip written by Jeremy Barlow and drawn by Bob Molesworth. The story was published in the 31st issue of the German Star Wars Rebels Magazine, which was released on May 10, 2017.
In a Twitter message, Barlow placed the comic between "Homecoming" and "The Call" in the second season of Star Wars Rebels.
It has never received an official English translation.

The company has manufactured a Human replica droid (HRD) that betrayed the citizens of Bakura, and Solo hopes to bring them to justice for the crimes committed by their clients. She confronts an HRD named Stanton Rendar and engages him in a discussion regarding the moral implications of immortality and near-invincibility, but ultimately remains firm in her convictions and prepares to apprehend him. Rendar loose

The book features an excerpt of the subsequent novel Fate of the Jedi: Omen. The audiobook is narrated by Marc Thompson, who narrated the audiobook versions for the Star Wars: Legacy of the Force series. The paperback was released on April 27, 2010.

synopsis: The illustrious Jabba bids you welcome to the underworld. Join the scoundrel Kay Vess in the first-ever open world Star Wars game, Star Wars Outlaws, where the Hutt and countless other kingpins and crime bosses are waiting to give you your next big job, or put a bounty on your head if you fail them. Now it's your turn. Grab your favorite jacket, holster your blaster, and make sure Nix is still hanging on the back of your speeder bike. You're going to need his help if you hope to survive the underworld.

synopsis: Can Poe Dameron outmaneuver one of the galaxy's greatest pilots? Rebellions may be built on hope, but they need more than that to survive. Leia sends Black Squadron on a new mission, one that will raise important funds for the Resistance. Can a group of pilots really do the work of smugglers and scoundrels?

synopsis: Star Wars: Princess Leia is a Star Wars comic miniseries written by Mark Waid and penciled by Terry Dodson. The five-issue series, published by Marvel Comics from March to July 2015, centers on the character Leia Organa between the events of Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope and Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back. The series addresses how Leia deals with the destruction of Alderaan, her homeworld, as she tries to find survivors of the attack that are scattered across the galaxy.
title: Princess Leia

synopsis: The Battle of Yavin was a tremendous victory for the Rebellion, but it came at a great cost. In this highly-praised graphic novel, Leia Organa wastes no time in preserving what’s left of her lost home planet. As the daughter of the last rulers of Alderaan and the once-been future heir to the throne, the culture of Alderaan rests on the Rebel leader’s shoulders.
title: Princess Leia, Part I

synopsis: "Priority: X" is a short story written by George R. Strayton, including illustrations by Chris Trevas), originally published in Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 12 by Topps in the summer of 1997. It has since been released online at Hyperspace. It takes place in 0 ABY.
title: Priority X

synopsis: "Prize Contender" is a short comic story published in Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.11.
title: Prize Contender

synopsis:
As Trioculus lies dying, he makes Grand Moff Hissa swear to make Luke Skywalker and the Rebels pay. At the Rebel base, the heroes discover that Triclops, while sleepwalking, has been transmitting base files to Imperial probe droids through an implant in his tooth. To stop the leak, Leia proposes building a defense probe from plans stored in the Lost City of the Jedi, sending Luke and Ken back to the city, where the droids warn them of a decoy transport leading to an underground sea of lava and of a new prophecy by Supreme Prophet Kadann foretelling that the Jedi Prince will betray the Lost City.

Meanwhile Zorba the Hutt informs the Prophets of the Dark Side of the Moffs' schemes, and the captured Moffs are put on trial with Zorba as chief witness and sentenced to death. Luke, Ken, and Chewbacca travel to Arzid to find a mushroom that can deactivate Triclops's implant, but are captured and brought before Kadann. To spare Luke, and lured by the promise of learning his father's identity, Ken betrays the location of the Lost City. There Kadann reveals that Ken's father is Triclops and his grandfather was the Emperor, and vows to breed Ken into the next Emperor. Luke escapes his guards, is rescued by Han and the others, and reaches Ken through a steam vent. He frees the boy just as the Imperials shut the city down and an earthquake destroys its computer, trapping Kadann and the Prophets below. Ken comes to terms with his parentage, though Triclops slips away into the forests of Yavin, and Leia, preparing for her wedding, glimpses a vision of Han and their future children.
title: Prophets of the Dark Side

synopsis: After Order 66, the Jedi purge led by the dark and fearsome Sith Lord Darth Vader, most of the remaining Jedi are hiding to survive—but not all. Sha Koon, niece of the esteemed Plo Koon, has narrowly escaped the attack on the Jedi Temple, and has been left full of questions about the dark side. Sha Koon will not hide; she will find another way to continue being a Jedi—one that will place her directly in the path of Darth Vader and the Emperor!
title: Purge: Seconds to Die

synopsis: On a remote world, Darth Vader chafes at the assignment given to him by the Emperor: guarding an Imperial manufacturing facility from the anti-Imperial natives. Vader feels the duty is beneath him—until he learns that a Jedi Master and his Padawan are in league with the natives! Now the game is afoot, and Vader is on the trail of his favorite prey. No ambush, no local monstrous lizards, will deter him his pursuit. Woe be to the Jedi when Vader catches up with them! This issue follows events in Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith!
title: Purge: The Hidden Blade

synopsis: Star Wars: Purge - The Tyrant's Fist is the fourth story arc of the Purge comic series. It was written by Alexander Freed and the first issue was published by Dark Horse Comics on December 5, 2012. Contrary to the other Purge story arcs, The Tyrant's Fist was a two-part story. It covered the adventures of Dark Lord of the Sith Darth Vader during the Vaklin insurgency.
title: Purge: The Tyrant's Fist, Part 1

synopsis: Star Wars: Purge - The Tyrant's Fist is the fourth story arc of the Purge comic series. It was written by Alexander Freed and the first issue was published by Dark Horse Comics on December 5, 2012. Contrary to the other Purge story arcs, The Tyrant's Fist was a two-part story. It covered the adventures of Dark Lord of the Sith Darth Vader during the Vaklin insurgency.
title: Purge: The Tyrant's Fist, Part 2

synopsis: Queen Amidala's handmaidens are trained to protect her if she is in danger. But Queen Amidala wants to learn to defend herself. She joins the training disguised as Padmé so her handmaidens won't worry. Can she handle the training? Read this colorful fully-illustrated beginner reader and find out!
title: Queen in Disguise

synopsis:
When a demonstration of a "decoy" Human Replica Droid of Leia goes wrong and the droid shoots a scientist, Han and Leia rush him to his home planet of Chad for treatment, only to find its hospital battered by a hurricane. Han is trapped by falling rubble while delivering the scientist to the doctors, and after Leia saves him the grateful scientist reveals he had feared dying before he could complete his greatest work. Leaving him in the doctors' care, Han proposes to Leia, and the couple plan to elope at Hologram Fun World, the amusement park now owned by Lando Calrissian, touring its many hologram attractions, including a walk through the Alderaan of Leia's memories.

At the park, a spy for Zorba the Hutt learns Leia is alive, and Zorba, seeking revenge for the death of his son, captures her during a magic show and takes her aboard his ship, which also carries the frozen Trioculus, bound for Tatooine. Zorba's ship is seized by Grand Moff Hissa's Moffship, and when the Imperials discover Trioculus is alive they revive him. To force Zorba to reveal Leia's whereabouts, Trioculus drops the Hutt into the Great Pit of Carkoon and the mouth of the Sarlacc, then plans to marry Leia himself. Han, Lando, Luke, Ken, and the Human Replica Droid infiltrate the Moffship, rescue Leia, and leave the droid in her place. At the wedding the droid's lasers pierce Trioculus's heart, killing him, while the *Millennium Falcon* escapes. Unknown to all, Zorba crawls back out of the Sarlacc, for no creature in the galaxy can digest a Hutt.
title: Queen of the Empire

synopsis: The Clone Wars rage on, and Padmé Amidala enlists the help of Sabé for a very important and risky task: Pretending to be her once more.
title: Queen's Hope

synopsis: Being the Queen of Naboo isn’t easy, but thanks to the Trade Federation, Padme Amidala is about to discover it can be even more of a challenge than she imagined.
title: Queen's Peril

synopsis: Padme Amidala isn’t a queen anymore. She must adapt to a new planet, a new position in the senate, and unfamiliar politics without knowing whom she can really trust.
title: Queen's Shadow

displayTitle: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan: Last Stand On Ord Mantell
synopsis: When a valuable cargo freighter fails to reach its destination on the planet Coruscant, Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan are sent into deep space to search for the missing ship. Their investigation leads them to the distant, lawless world of Ord Mantell, where everyone carries a grudge and a blaster... and Jedi are less than welcome.
title: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan: Last Stand On Ord Mantell

displayTitle: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan: Last Stand On Ord Mantell #1
synopsis: When a valuable cargo freighter fails to reach its destination on the planet Coruscant, Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan are sent into deep space to search for the missing ship. Their investigation leads them to the distant, lawless world of Ord Mantell, where everyone carries a grudge and a blaster... and Jedi are less than welcome.
title: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan: Last Stand On Ord Mantell #1

displayTitle: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan: Last Stand On Ord Mantell #2
synopsis: Investigating the deaths of a cargo freighter's crew, Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi travel to a moisture plant on Ord Mantell. There, they they learn that a ruthless land baron named Taxer Sundown may have had ties with the ill-fated freighter. But when they discover that most of the Ord Mantell colonists are convinced that Taxer Sundown is a Jedi, Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan realize that they might be up against more than they can handle!
title: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan: Last Stand On Ord Mantell #2

synopsis: Star Wars: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express is a comic miniseries written by Mike Kennedy and drawn by Lucas Marangon, starring Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi. The series is composed of 2 issues released in February and June 2002.
title: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express

synopsis: Only one thing could push Aryn Leneer to seek help from the Jedi--and that one thing just landed on her doorstep.
title: Quite A Story To Tell

synopsis: On Endor, there is plenty for C-3PO, R2-D2, and BB-8 to explore. But everything starts to go terribly wrong when R2 finds himself lost and separated from his friends.
title: R2-D2 is LOST!

synopsis: "Rebel Bass" is a short story by Kathy Tyers. It was originally published in Star Wars Gamer 6 in 2001.
title: Rebel Bass

synopsis: "Rebel Bluff" is a short story by Michael Kogge that was published in Star Wars Insider 158. The story features Lando Calrissian and is set after his appearance in the first season of the animated television series Star Wars Rebels.
title: Rebel Bluff

synopsis:
Han Solo wins the *Millennium Falcon* from Lando Calrissian in an intense sabacc tournament on Bespin and sets about upgrading the freighter into a specialized smuggling vessel. After a stop on Kashyyyk, where Chewbacca marries Mallatobuck, Han and Chewbacca embark on a string of adventures and rise to become kings of the smugglers. Returning to Nar Shaddaa, Han is reunited with his old flame Bria Tharen, now an agent of the Rebel Alliance, who recruits him for an all-out assault on the slaving colonies of Ylesia in exchange for a share of the spoils. In the aftermath of the battle, Tharen's troopers turn their weapons on Han's friends and confiscate the loot in the name of the Rebellion. Enraged and branded a traitor, Han threatens to kill Bria if he ever sees her again, and Lando, refusing to believe Han was not part of the swindle, punches him.

Desperate for money, Han and Chewbacca take a spice run for Jabba through the Kessel Run, but an Imperial patrol forces them to dump the cargo, which vanishes before they can recover it, leaving Han deep in debt to the Hutt. Meanwhile Bria leads a Rebel raid on Toprawa that transmits the Death Star plans to Leia Organa aboard the *Tantive IV*; the raid succeeds but Bria and her squadron are all killed. On Tatooine, hounded by Jabba's bounty hunters and seeking a card game to win back what he owes, Han briefly crosses paths with Dash Rendar before Boba Fett brings word of Bria's death and warns that Greedo is hunting him. Han then goes to Chalmun's Cantina in Mos Eisley, where Chewbacca meets Obi-Wan Kenobi seeking passage to Alderaan, leading directly into the events of *A New Hope*.
title: Rebel Dawn

synopsis: It is a critical moment in the struggle between the Rebels and the Empire: the Force itself hangs in the balance, and all the hopes of the galaxy depend on the adventures of Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, Han Solo, and a host of other heroes.
title: Rebel Force: Target

synopsis: It is a critical moment in the struggle between the Rebels and the Empire: the Force itself hangs in the balance, and all the hopes of the galaxy depend on the adventures of Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, Han Solo, and a host of other heroes.

synopsis: Star Wars: Rebel Heist is a four-issue comic miniseries written by Matt Kindt and illustrated by Marco Castiello. It debuted in April 2014.
title: Rebel Heist

synopsis: A young Rebel meets one of the Alliance's best for his first mission. But the young man's hero worship is crushed by the reality of Han Solo. A botched escape, a ship that doesn't work—could it be that Solo is just a lucky bumbler whose luck has run out?
title: Rebel Heist #1

synopsis: On a planet outside the Empire's jurisdiction, Princess Leia goes undercover to obtain a vital code from an Imperial source. She'll have to use disguises, gadgets, and her feminine wiles to succeed, and her only ally is another spy who is convinced the Princess is a liability in the field!
title: Rebel Heist #2

synopsis: Han Solo is in an Imperial jail, and a crime boss has the information that will free him. Enter Chewbacca, who pounds and pummels his way through the mission, accompanied by an untrusting ex-Imperial who can't understand a word Chewie says. Not that words matter much to a Wookiee on a rampage!
title: Rebel Heist #3

synopsis: The Rebellion's plan is coming together. All Luke Skywalker has to do is elude an Imperial spy, and perform some unanticipated rescues! But this farm boy is on the edge of greatness, and he is not about to stop saving the galaxy now!
title: Rebel Heist #4

synopsis: After being separated from her parents, Jyn Erso finds herself in the care of Saw Gerrera. Soon, a life of fighting will become all she’s ever known, and she’ll need to use what Saw has taught her to survive the worst that’s yet to come.
title: Rebel Rising

synopsis: With the destruction of its Death Star battle station, the Galactic Empire has been shaken to the core by the ever-growing Rebel Alliance. Its iron-fisted order challenged, the Empire quickly finds an increasing number of systems slipping through its fingers. In one of those systems, the remote desert planet of Jabiim held promise for Luke Skywalker and the Rebellion. But a well-intentioned diplomatic mission turned tragic when the Rebels' presence alerted Darth Vader and led to the complete subjugation of Jabiim's immense slave population. Seeking to rescue one of their own left behind on Jab
title: Rebellion #0: Crossroads

displayTitle: Rebellion #01: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 1
synopsis: Seeking to exploit a fatal flaw in the Rebel fleet's escape strategies, the Empire plants a sleeper agent in the Alliance's midst and sets into motion a series of events that will have devastating consequences for Luke Skywalker and his companions. Meanwhile, Darth Vader's own agenda runs counter to the Empire's schemes, and he's ensnared Lt. Janek Sunber to carry out a secret mission that will lead the idealistic Imperial officer straight into the heart of the Rebellion.
title: Rebellion #01: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 1

displayTitle: Rebellion #02: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 2
synopsis: With the Alliance desperately low on supplies, Luke Skywalker and Wedge Antilles lead an odds-off ambush against an Imperial supply convoy. Meanwhile, Rebellion strategist Jorin Sol, recently rescued from the Empire's grip by Skywalker, recovers silently in the flagship of the Rebel fleet. Yet, Sol's scars from Imperial imprisonment and interrogation run more than skin deep, and when he wakes up, supply shortages will quickly become the least of Luke's worries. And if that weren't enough, Luke's crisis is about to become even more personal when he receives a coded message from Imperial officer
title: Rebellion #02: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 2

displayTitle: Rebellion #03: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 3
synopsis: The Empire has infiltrated the command ship of the Rebel fleet with a sleeper agent, and he's just woken up! Now, the lives of everyone onboard are in jeopardy, along with the entire Alliance cause. Too bad the young hero Luke Skywalker is nowhere to be found. Having received a coded message from Imperial officer Janek "Tank" Sunber, Luke's hijacked a shuttle against orders, determined to find his old friend, even if it means delivering himself straight into an Imperial trap!
title: Rebellion #03: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 3

displayTitle: Rebellion #04: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 4
synopsis: Luke Skywalker escapes the stormtroopers pursuing him, Deena, and his boyhood friend Janek "Tank" Sunber, and brings the defecting Imperial officer back to the Rebel Fleet. Leia strongly distrusts the newcomer, suspecting a spy or an assassin, and sends the wounded Sunber to the medical bay, though the Rebels slowly begin to accept him. Elsewhere, Jorin Sol convinces Tungo Li and Wedge Antilles that he has broken free of the Imperial conditioning forced on him at Kalist VI. But on the command bridge, Sol's programming reasserts itself: he opens fire, wounding Leia and killing others, just as a dozen Star Destroyers drop out of hyperspace to attack the fleet. As Luke tries to get Leia to safety, Sunber, driven by a vision of Darth Vader urging him to deliver Luke, tells Luke to come with him.
title: Rebellion #04: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 4

displayTitle: Rebellion #05: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 5
synopsis: The reunion of Luke Skywalker and his boyhood friend Janek “Tank” Sunber comes to its shocking conclusion, as one of these two men is forced to make a decision that will change both of their lives forever! With the entire Rebel fleet under siege by a massive Imperial force, Wedge Antilles and Red Squadron launch a valiant defense, but even they know if the fleet doesn't figure out an escape plan soon, there won't be anything left to defend. Meanwhile, chaos reigns on the Rebel command ship as a threat from inside continues to have devastating consequences for the Alliance. White-knuckled actio
title: Rebellion #05: My Brother, My Enemy, Part 5

synopsis: This is the Star Wars story that no fan of the original trilogy can afford to miss—an all-new adventure set in the dangerous underworld of the war between the Empire and the Rebellion! A lieutenant to one of the most powerful gangsters in the galaxy, Wyl Tarson is a master of lying, cheating, and stealing—and a hero of the Rebel Alliance! For years Wyl has been acquiring valuable information for the Rebellion through his employer Raze's expansive criminal network. That is, until Raze discovers Wyl's second life as a Rebel spy. Now, subjected to a mysterious procedure, Wyl has becom
title: Rebellion #06: The Ahakista Gambit, Part 1

synopsis: On a seemingly unremarkable backwater planet edging ever closer to civil war, Rebel spy Wyl Tarson has an explosive dilemma. He and his newly assembled team of agents (a squad previously deemed by the Alliance to be too deadly, too unpredictable, and too burnt-out to serve) must follow the dangerous and contradictory directions of the criminal overlord Raze, or face exposure and execution at Imperial hands. If that weren't enough, an incendiary device planted deep within Wyl's skull counts down, ticking off the last moments of his life should he try to make a break. Given the choice between betrayal and treason, Wyl's next move could be his last.
title: Rebellion #07: The Ahakista Gambit, Part 2

synopsis: A secret of tremendous importance to the Empire lies hidden on the planet Ahakista, and when a local civil war threatens it, Darth Vader will take its protection into his own hands! A ragtag team of Rebel agents have discovered the Empire's secret on Ahakista thanks to an Imperial officer with an agenda of her own. Yet if they are to do anything about it, they'll need the help of the locals, who, embroiled in a civil war, are none too eager to take the Empire head on. Meanwhile, Darth Vader grows tired of this backwater planet distracting him from more pressing matters. For his adversaries thi
title: Rebellion #08: The Ahakista Gambit, Part 3

synopsis: The crimelord Raze has put a bomb inside Wyl Tarson's skull, which is why Wyl now leads a ragtag team on a suicide mission to compromise one of the Empire's greatest secrets! In the streets of the planet Ahakista, Darth Vader wages ruthless war against a local militia that has been unwelcoming to the Imperial presence there. Meanwhile, below the surface, Wyl and his crew try to infiltrate an Imperial stronghold through ancient tunnels. Just when unlikely success seems within their grasp, a revelation by one of the group changes everything. Fateful decisions, shocking discoveries... this the
title: Rebellion #09: The Ahakista Gambit, Part 4

synopsis: One of the Empire's most valuable secrets is about to be compromised unless Darth Vader can get to it in time! This is the all-action conclusion to "The Ahakista Gambit"! Deep inside an Imperial stronghold, a team of spies led by Wyl Tarson fight for their lives. Loyal to the Rebel cause, each is willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to complete the mission, none realizing that Tarson marches to the orders of someone far more sinister than the Alliance. For Tarson, this is the moment of truth—will he betray those who trusted him with everything? One thing is certain, once Vader arrives,
title: Rebellion #10: The Ahakista Gambit, Part 5

synopsis: When a hyperdrive failure strands the flagship of the Rebel fleet deep inside enemy territory, Luke Skywalker and Princess Leia realize their misfortune could be an opportunity for the Alliance—if they undertake a mission with no chance of survival! A riveting new story set in the months after Star Wars: A New Hope, "Small Victories" follows not just the Rebellion's greatest heroes, but volunteers like Deena Shan who never thought the fate of the Alliance could rest in her terrified but determined hands! Courage, sacrifice, and a little bit of madness are the order of the day as a ragtag
title: Rebellion #11: Small Victories, Part 1

synopsis: With the Rebel flagship lost deep inside Imperial space, Admiral Ackbar must decide whether to risk the Alliance fleet on a seemingly impossible rescue, or leave Luke Skywalker and Princess Leia to fend for themselves. Meanwhile, Luke and Leia have undertaken a seemingly impossible mission of their own with disastrous results. Captured by a corrupt officer on a vital Imperial installation, Luke and Leia have one last chance for their mission and their lives--Deena Shan. Insecure and indecisive, Deena never thought she had much to offer the Rebellion. Now, with the fate of the Alliance in her h
title: Rebellion #12: Small Victories, Part 2

synopsis: With Luke Skywalker and Princess Leia captured by an ambitious Imperial officer, Admiral Ackbar considers sending a squad of new, experimental starfighters to save the Rebellion's greatest heroes from certain death! On an Imperial station, Luke and Leia do their best to distract their cruel captor from the rest of Rebels still loose in the facility. Unfortunately, Imperials have found Deena Shan, the Rebel team's last hope for success. Deena is cornered into a decision of disastrous proportions for herself and everyone around her. By the time Ackbar deems a rescue mission worth the risk, there
title: Rebellion #13: Small Victories, Part 3

synopsis: Luke Skywalker and Princess Leia lead a team of Rebels to their destinies in the full-tilt conclusion to "Small Victories"! Facing a situation of unparalleled danger deep behind enemy lines, a few surviving Rebels test their resolve as decisions made on the fly will have serious consequences for both the Alliance and the Empire. Meanwhile, Admiral Gial Ackbar calls a squad of experimental starfighters into action, but this is no simulation—if these new ships aren't up to the challenge, the Rebellion's hopes may be dashed by the Imperial fist! Introducing Dagger Squadron!
title: Rebellion #14: Small Victories, Part 4

synopsis: The biggest Star Wars event of 2008 has reached the Rebellion era. Now, Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, Han Solo, and Chewie will have to deal with "Vector" as it crosses their paths and changes the galaxy! It has been twenty years since Darth Vader's encounter with the power of the Muur Talisman. As the power of the Rebellion grows, Vader's thoughts turn to the ancient Sith relic: though he was unable to harness its power, might it be used as a weapon against the enemies of the Empire?
title: Rebellion #15: Vector, Part 7

synopsis: Darth Vader successfully lures Luke Skywalker and Princess Leia into a trap that could cripple the Rebel Alliance, as "Vector"—the most important Star Wars event of 2008—concludes its third arc, setting the stage for the final galaxy-shaking showdown in Star Wars: Legacy! On the dark surface of a desolate moon, Luke and Leia meet their first Jedi since Obi-Wan Kenobi, only to realize too late this Knight of the Old Republic is far different than their fallen friend—twisted by the Sith's Muur Talisman and enraged by Darth Vader! Together, Luke and Leia must make a choice with
title: Rebellion #16: Vector, Part 8

synopsis: It is a dark time. The Jedi are no more, and the Empire rules the galaxy with an iron fist, bringing tyranny to the Outer Rim world of Lothal. Their ominous presence is a cloud over the planet, squashing any hope of freedom or a better life, especially for 14-year-old orphan Ezra Bridger. But the young con artist soon finds that destiny has other plans for him, as he encounters a small band of rebels who dare to strike back against the Empire.
title: Rebels

synopsis: Meet the toughest, most street-smart kid on the planet Lothal. Ezra Bridger might not have much, but every day is an adventure when it comes to outwitting Imperial Stormtroopers who have overrun his little corner of the galaxy's Outer Rim. But the excitement of collecting trooper helmets and gadgets gets a little old when you're alone. And it's nothing compared to what Ezra discovers when he meets the rebels and goes on board their ship, the Ghost, for his first-ever outer space adventure! But joining the rebels isn't all fun and games. Ezra quickly realizes that his new friends need his help to take on the Empire just as much as he needs them to help him tap into the power of his true potential.
title: Rebels: A New Hero

synopsis: Meet Chopper--the rebels' grumpy old astromech droid. He may have a bit of an attitude, but there's no droid the team would rather have with them in a tight spot. This Level 1 early reader retells one of Chopper's exciting adventures with his rebel friends.
title: Rebels: Always Bet on Chopper

synopsis: This action-packed chapter book retells the exciting final arc of Star Wars Rebels' first season. As the stakes rise higher than ever before, the Rebels must work together to thwart the Empire. If they fail, the consequences are unthinkable.
title: Rebels: Battle to the End

synopsis: The heroes of Star Wars Rebels are back with more action-packed adventures! Follow them on their journey to save Wookiees as they narrowly escape a terrible Imperial trap. They also meet beloved droids R2-D2 and C-3PO, who are on a mysterious mission to help the Empire! Chopper proves that even a clunky old droid can play a big role in saving the galaxy. But one mission leads to the next for our rebel heroes, and they must ultimately face their biggest enemy yet, the Inquisitor!
title: Rebels: Droids in Distress

synopsis: Ezra and the Pilot is a World of Reading Level 2 young readers book in the Star Wars Rebels series that was released on August 5, 2014. The story was adapted by Lucasfilm senior editor Jennifer Heddle based on the script for the Star Wars Rebels prequel short "Property of Ezra Bridger," written by series executive producer Simon Kinberg.
title: Rebels: Ezra and the Pilot

synopsis: When Ezra Bridger runs in to an old friend from his past, secrets about Ezra’s missing parents are finally brought to light. Can Ezra unravel the mystery of their disappearance while still helping the rebels fight the Empire? The stakes are higher than ever as Imperial Agent Kallus and the fearsome Inquisitor join forces to stop the rebels. With such dangerous enemies, the team is in for the fight of their lives!
title: Rebels: Ezra's Duel with Danger

synopsis: Ezra finds himself working alongside the bounty hunter Bossk, a big risk he really hopes will pay off!
title: Ezra’s Gamble

synopsis: When a group of Wookiees is captured and enslaved by the Galactic Empire, it’s up to Kanan, Ezra, and the rest of the rebels to save them!
title: Rebels: Ezra's Wookiee Rescue

synopsis: Rebel pilot Hera stars in another exciting Star Wars adventure! Featuring exciting full-color art from the show, this World of Reading early reader is perfect for fans who are ready to read on their own.
title: Rebels: Hera's Phantom Flight

synopsis: Meet Kanan--the rebels' leader and a skilled Jedi. Kanan has never taught anyone else in the ways of the Force. But after meeting a promising young boy named Ezra, Kanan decides to train him as a new Jedi. This Level 2 early reader follows Kanan and Ezra as they learn what it means to be a Jedi, together.
title: Rebels: Kanan's Jedi Training

synopsis: Rebels wanted! Are you ready to stand up against the Empire? Become an intergalactic hero in Star Wars Rebels™: Recon Missions, the new action-platformer mobile game!
title: Rebels: Recon Missions

synopsis: Ezra Bridger encounters the Ghost crew and joins them on a mission to free Wookiees from an Imperial Star Destroyer.
title: Spark of Rebellion Part 1

synopsis: Ezra Bridger encounters the Ghost crew and joins them on a mission to free Wookiees from an Imperial Star Destroyer.
title: Spark of Rebellion Part 2

synopsis: Ezra and Zeb go to Lothal's market for provisions and to work on their relationship.
title: Droids in Distress

synopsis: To prevent Ezra and Zeb from bickering, Hera sends them on a supply. En route back to the ghost, they encounter, Morad Sumar, a friend of Ezra's parents.
title: Fighter Flight

synopsis: The rebel crew undergoes a rescue mission only to face a powerful foe.
title: Rise Of The Old Masters

synopsis: The rebels send Ezra on an undercover mission into the Imperial Academy to steal a decoder.
title: Rebels S01E06: Breaking Ranks

synopsis: While on a supply run, Hera and Sabine find themselves stranded but not alone in a seemingly abandoned locale.
title: Out Of Darkness

synopsis: While disrupting Empire Day festivities in order to destroy a prototype TIE fighter, the crew learns a refugee has important information and must get him off-planet before the Imperials find him.
title: Empire Day

synopsis: Kanan and Ezra try to protect an Imperial deserter by distracting the Imperial forces.
title: Gathering Forces

synopsis: Ezra must face a great challenge as part of his growth as a member of the team.
title: Path Of The Jedi

synopsis: The wrong gamble with a new acquaintance forces the crew into transporting some unusual cargo.
title: Idiot's Array

synopsis: The crew of the Ghost try to thwart an Imperial plan to capture an exiled dignitary.
title: Vision Of Hope

synopsis: As public awareness increases around rebel activity, they target an important Imperial network.
title: Rebels S01E13: Call To Action

synopsis: The team tries to get Kanan's location to free him.
title: Rebel Resolve

synopsis: The crew has to go through many obstacles to save Kanan from the Inquisitor.
title: Fire Across The Galaxy

displayTitle: Rebels S01S01: The Machine in the Ghost
synopsis: The Ghost is pursued by TIE fighters. The trio of Hera, Kanan and Chopper must work together to defeat them.
title: Rebels S01S01: The Machine in the Ghost

synopsis: Sabine sneaks into an Imperial compound to create an artful diversion for her friends aboard the Ghost.
title: Rebels S01S02: Art Attack

synopsis: Zeb fails to meet with Kanan at a specified rendezvous point and finds himself joyfully battling many, many stormtroopers.
title: Rebels S01S03: Entanglement

displayTitle: Rebels S01S04: Property of Ezra Bridger
synopsis: Ezra finds a downed TIE fighter on the plains of Lothal. The young rebel opens the ship's hatch and pretends to help the Imperial pilot.
title: Rebels S01S04: Property of Ezra Bridger

synopsis: Now a part of Phoenix Squadron, the Ghost crew joins a mission to steal shield generators from an Imperial freighter. Under pressure from Darth Vader, an Imperial defector leads the Sith Lord to battle with Kanan and Ezra.
title: The Siege Of Lothal Part 1

synopsis: After being confronted by Darth Vader, the Ghost crew seek help from Lando Calrissian to leave Lothal and continue the fight against the Empire with the rest of the rebel fleet.
title: The Siege Of Lothal Part 2

synopsis: The rebels run into Captain Rex and his gang on a desert planet.
title: The Lost Commanders

synopsis: Ezra and the crew begin to develop friendships with Captain Rex and his colleagues, prompting them to work together against an attack by Agent Kallus.
title: Relics Of The Old Republic

displayTitle: Rebels S02E05: Always Two There Are
synopsis: Ezra, Sabine, Zeb and Chopper travel to an abandoned medical station.
title: Rebels S02E05: Always Two There Are

displayTitle: Rebels S02E06: Brothers Of The Broken Horn
synopsis: Ezra and Chopper take the Phantom to investigate a distress call from a smuggler's ship, where Ezra is tempted to join the crew of Hondo Ohnaka.
title: Rebels S02E06: Brothers Of The Broken Horn

synopsis: Hera goes on a dangerous mission to acquire a new ship, the B-Wing.
title: Wings Of The Master

synopsis: On a mission to escort a courier with secret information vital to the rebel cause to a rendezvous point, Sabine must face off against her old friend and partner.
title: Rebels S02E08: Blood Sisters

synopsis: A new Imperial ship captures Ezra, Commander Sato, and his crew, forcing Kanan and Rex to go undercover as stormtroopers to free the rebels.
title: Stealth Strike

synopsis: Ezra and Kanan are sent to investigate the retrievals being made by the Inquisitors, learning of their plot to capture Force-sensitive infants.
title: The Future Of The Force

synopsis: As the Empire attacks the rebels, Ezra is drawn to information about his parents and their fate.
title: Legacy

displayTitle: Rebels S02E12: A Princess On Lothal
synopsis: Bail Organa sends his daughter to Lothal to help the rebellion acquire ships for their fleet, but an Imperial lockdown forces them to come up with a new plan.
title: Rebels S02E12: A Princess On Lothal

synopsis: In need of new hyperspace routes due to Imperial pressure, the rebels find a shortcut but must gain permission from the leader of the nearby system.
title: The Protector Of Concord Dawn

synopsis: The rebels are stunned to discover two Lasat refugees, and together they must evade the Empire to get the Lasat to their prophesized new home planet.
title: Legends Of The Lasat

synopsis: On a mission to obtain fuel for the rebel fleet, the crew protects space creatures from the mining operation that threatens the creatures' lives.
title: The Call

synopsis: The Ghost crew journeys to Ryloth to aid a rebel cell.
title: Homecoming

synopsis: Zeb and Agent Kallus are stranded on a frozen planet together and must work together to survive.
title: The Honourable Ones

synopsis: Kanan, Ezra, and Ahsoka return to the Lothal Jedi Temple to find out how the Inquisitors have continually been able to track the rebels.
title: Shroud Of Darkness

synopsis: When Chopper's attempts to buy a new leg fails, he ends up stealing one and escaping on an Imperial ship where he makes friends with an inventory droid.
title: The Forgotten Droid
