synopsis: Star Wars 3-D is a three-issue Legends comic book miniseries written by Len Wein and John Stephenson. It was published by Blackthorne Publishing as a part of the Blackthorne 3-D Series from 1987 to 1988. Originally four more issues were planned for 1989, but were never released. According to a listing in Amazing Heroes, the issues would have been written by Len Wein and John Stephenson, illustrated by Lorenzo Lizana and edited by Lucy Autrey Wilson, and set between the films Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back and Episode VI Return of the Jedi and would each have numbered 32 pages. St
title: Star Wars 3-D

synopsis: Star Wars 3-D 1 (also known as Blackthorne 3-D Series 30) is the first issue of the Legends comic book series Star Wars 3-D. It was written by Len Wein, illustrated by Glen Johnson and Jim Nelson, and published by Blackthorne Publishing in December 1987.
title: Star Wars 3-D #1

synopsis: Returning to the Yavin system aboard the *Millennium Falcon*, Luke, Han, Chewbacca, and C-3PO find the Rebel base on Yavin 4 surrounded by an Imperial fleet led by Admiral Quist and Darth Vader. Han's flying gets them safely to the surface while Vader executes Quist for his failure. Finding the base abandoned, the group catches up with the fleet at a secret rendezvous, where Leia reports that the Rebellion needs a new home. Han suggests the ice world of Hoth, a place the Empire is sure to overlook, and the group sets out to scout it. Searching for a suitable ice cavern, they run afoul of the smuggler Salmakk, who tries to claim the bounty on Han and inadvertently draws them into his headquarters. Luke uses his lightsaber to cut stalactites from the ceiling, collapsing the cave and trapping Salmakk and his gang. The Rebels escape, but still have to find a base for the displaced Rebellion.
title: Star Wars 3-D #2: Havoc on Hoth

displayTitle: Star Wars 3-D #3: The Dark Side of Dantooine
synopsis: Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa travel to Dantooine with R2-D2 to secure supplies and weapons for the new base on Hoth. While Leia negotiates with an Ortolan merchant, thugs lure Luke away, but he cuts them down with his lightsaber and then follows a beckoning voice deeper into the building. He discovers the Fairfolk, a race of Force-sensitives who, unknown to him, serve Darth Vader by trapping dangerous Force-users. Luke asks them to complete the training he began under Obi-Wan Kenobi, and as he takes their leader's hand he is linked to Vader. The Fairfolk goad and frustrate Luke until he lashes out with the dark side, revealing his power. Vader appears in a vision to duel him, and the Fairfolk urge Luke to draw on the dark side to win. Luke begins to overpower Vader with his fury, but just as he is about to fall completely, R2-D2 and Leia arrive to disrupt the blow and drive off the Fairfolk. The three leave Dantooine with their supplies as Luke reflects on how close he came to the dark side, while Vader vows he will not fail to turn him next time.
title: Star Wars 3-D #3: The Dark Side of Dantooine

synopsis: Sana and Lando join forces on Coruscant to swindle some credits!

synopsis: SCAR Squadron is back... with their deadliest attack yet!

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #38: The Ashes of Jedha, Part I
synopsis: The possibility, and destruction, of the Death Star has changed everything. The Death Star's destruction proves the Empire is not irresistible. But a Death Star has been built, and it can't happen again. The specter of the Empire's true power has brought together a patchwork cloth of people, united in hope. From the desolation of Jedha to the search for new bases, these rebels continue to fight for a better tomorrow for a galaxy far, far away in these all-new adventure written by Kieron Gillen (Darth Vader, Doctor Aphra).
title: Star Wars (2015) #38: The Ashes of Jedha, Part I

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #50: Hope Dies Part I
synopsis:
**In This Issue... Hope Dies.**

The Rebel fleet is completed. It's magnificent. It's beautiful. It's secret. But no secret is kept for long from Darth Vader. The most epic story yet done in a Star Wars comic begins here. Prepare to witness the Empire truly strike back.
title: Star Wars (2015) #50: Hope Dies Part I

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #51: Hope Dies Part II
synopsis: The Millennium Falcon, alone, versus an entire Imperial fleet. Can Leia discover the cause of this disaster? And even if she can, is it too late?
title: Star Wars (2015) #51: Hope Dies Part II

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #52: Hope Dies Part III
synopsis:
**"Hope Dies," Part Three!**

The Millennium Falcon versus the whole Imperial fleet? No problem. A certain TIE Advanced starfighter piloted by a certain Sith Lord? Problem. Big problem. No human can save the day. But maybe a droid can...
title: Star Wars (2015) #52: Hope Dies Part III

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #53: Hope Dies Part IV
synopsis: Han Solo... admiral? Princess Leia leads a squad to try and recover the secret that can save the rebel fleet... Unfortunately, it's aboard the Executor.
title: Star Wars (2015) #53: Hope Dies Part IV

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #54: Hope Dies Part V
synopsis: The Executor? Bad. Princess Leia aboard the Executor? Worse. Darth Vader pursuing Leia aboard the Executor? Worst of all.
title: Star Wars (2015) #54: Hope Dies Part V

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #55: Hope Dies Part VI
synopsis:
**"Hope Dies" Part 6!**

If anyone is to survive this disaster, sacrifice is needed... Who's going to make it? If hope dies, what survives?
title: Star Wars (2015) #55: Hope Dies Part VI

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #56: The Escape Part I
synopsis:
**"The Escape" Begins!**

After the disaster of "Hope Dies," our heroes are on the run. Can they escape the patrols? No. They're trapped on a distant world. Where have they been abandoned? How can they possibly survive?
title: Star Wars (2015) #56: The Escape Part I

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #57: The Escape Part II
synopsis:
**"The Escape," Part 2**

The horror of this strange planet. The horror! Shirtless Han Solo, chopping wood.
title: Star Wars (2015) #57: The Escape Part II

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #58: The Escape Part III
synopsis:
**"The Escape," Part 3!**

Is there romance in the air for Luke and Tula? Is there romance in the air for Han and Leia?! Is there romance in the air between a bunch of stranded rebels and enormous ravenous monsters? No. This last one is no.
title: Star Wars (2015) #58: The Escape Part III

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #59: The Escape Part IV
synopsis:
**"The Escape" Part Four!**

Luke, Leia and Han remain stranded on the isolated moon of Hubin and out of the fight against the Empire. Who says they even want to leave? But their hideaway may not be so secret... especially for old foes hot on the rebels' trail.
title: Star Wars (2015) #59: The Escape Part IV

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #06: Skywalker Strikes, Part VI
synopsis: The greatest space adventure of all returns to Marvel! displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #60: The Escape Part V
synopsis:
**"The Escape" Part Five!**

You can escape the horror of the galaxy. But only for a while. The return of SCAR Squadron.
title: Star Wars (2015) #60: The Escape Part V

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #61: The Escape Part VI
synopsis:
**"The Escape" Aftermath**

The great love story of our time as man and spaceship are brought back together in a tearful reunion. Er...Han gets the Falcon back. It's not just about the escape, it's what you leave behind...
title: Star Wars (2015) #61: The Escape Part VI

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #62: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part I
synopsis:
**The Scourging of Shu-Torun: Road to Revenge!**

How is Leia going to scourge Shu-Torun? She'll need an all-star team...and a plan they won't see coming!
title: Star Wars (2015) #62: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part I

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #63: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part II
synopsis:
**The Scourging of Shu-Torun: Operation Vengeance!**

Kanchar returns, and he's still got an amazing cybernetic arm. Does Queen Trios feel regret over all she's done? Spoilers: She will soon, if Leia has anything to do with it.
title: Star Wars (2015) #63: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part II

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #64: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part III
synopsis:
**"The Scourging of Shu-Torun" Part 3**

Leia leads her covert team deep into the heart of the royal palace of Shu-Torun. Benthic leads the Partisans deep inside the horrific edifice of the Spike. A rebel victory could cripple the Empire for good. A little scourging is one thing...but the death of a planet?
title: Star Wars (2015) #64: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part III

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #65: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part IV
synopsis:
**"The Scourging of Shu-Torun" Part 4**

Her planet under threat, a heroic princess battles to save it! Not Leia, it's Queen Trios of Shu-Torun, ally to Darth Vader and the Empire! Princess Leia's plan begins to unfold. But some members of her strike team have schemes of their own. When will Leia realize just what she's set in motion?!
title: Star Wars (2015) #65: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part IV

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #66: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part V
synopsis:
**"The Scourging of Shu-Torun" Part 5**

Queen Trios vs. Princess Leia at last! Can Luke Skywalker hold out against the attack of overwhelming force...from his own allies?! And when you think things couldn't get worse for our Rebels, there's always an orbital bombardment to survive!
title: Star Wars (2015) #66: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part V

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #67: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part VI
synopsis:
**"The Scourging of Shu-Torun" Part 6!**

The fate of an entire world is in the hands of the Rebels! And even then, can anyone manage to escape the Scourging of Shu-Torun? The cataclysmic end of Kieron Gillen's run on Star Wars.
title: Star Wars (2015) #67: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part VI

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #69: Rebels and Rogues, Part II
synopsis:
**Tricks and Traps!**

The Rebels and Rogues epic continues as our heroes deploy their plans to trick their Imperial pursuers... and everything falls apart! Chewie and Threepio face moral quandaries, and mortal danger, when they learn the uninhabited planet they're supposed to destroy isn't quite so uninhabited. Will the Force be with Luke in a bar fight? And who is Dar Champion... and what does he have to do with Leia's past?
title: Star Wars (2015) #69: Rebels and Rogues, Part II

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #70: Rebels and Rogues, Part III
synopsis:
**Rogues, Romance and Rock Monsters!**

With the fate of the Rebellion at stake, our heroes scramble to set their decoys and traps to protect the Rebel Fleet. But everyone's plan suddenly becomes more complicated. What can a frontier cardsharp teach Luke about the Force? What are Han and Leia doing in the Lanz Carpo honeymoon suite? And which utterly iconic Star Wars villain finally takes notice as Chewie and Threepio tangle with the rock monsters of Planet K43?
title: Star Wars (2015) #70: Rebels and Rogues, Part III

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #71: Rebels and Rogues, Part IV
synopsis: The Rebels and Rogues epic continues as our heroes' mission to divert the Imperial Fleet spins out of control! On K43, the Rock Elders probe Threepio's memories, and allegiances! Could a droid have more in common with a rock monster than a human? On Lanz Carpo, a rogue takes a fall and a princess fights a vigilante. And on Kalakan, Luke robs a bank. Wait, Luke robs a bank??
title: Star Wars (2015) #71: Rebels and Rogues, Part IV

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #72: Rebels and Rogues, Part V
synopsis:
The time for answers is upon us, and destinies will change! As Chewie grapples with a terrible moral choice, Lord Vader reveals his plan for the rock people of K43!

As Luke questions where he's placed his trust, Warba reveals her origins and true relationship to the Force!

And as Leia and Dar spin around the dance floor, Han uncovers the real villains of Lanz Carpo!
title: Star Wars (2015) #72: Rebels and Rogues, Part V

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #73: Rebels and Rogues, Part VI
synopsis:
**Moments of Truth!**

Who is Dar Champion and how far can Leia trust him when Han's life is on the line on Boss Carpo's golden starship? What shocking lesson will Luke learn when Warba finally reveals her true self? And when faced with his lost past, can Threepio seize control of his destiny, and be the hero of his own story? The lives of thousands of rebels hang in the balance as our heroes grapple with their greatest doubts and challenges!
title: Star Wars (2015) #73: Rebels and Rogues, Part VI

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #74: Rebels and Rogues, Part VII
synopsis:
**Wookiee vs. Sith!**

Our three stories converge as the rebels' plan to destroy the Empire's fleet come to a head! But can Luke really trust the grifter Warba Calip? Can Han, Leia, and Dar Champion survive a head-on battle with a Star Destroyer? And what happens when Chewbacca takes on Lord Vader himself in hand-to-hand combat? And the Rebellion's search for a new home...a base safe from the reach of the Empire...begins.
title: Star Wars (2015) #74: Rebels and Rogues, Part VII

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #75: Rebels and Rogues, Part VIII
synopsis:
**Final Issue! It's a Trap!**

The epic Rebels and Rogues storyline reaches its explosive end! Can Threepio save the rock people of K43? Is Warba the master or the student? Which Champion falls? And how much of Luke's desperate plan has Darth Vader foreseen from the beginning? The search for a new rebel base continues!
title: Star Wars (2015) #75: Rebels and Rogues, Part VIII

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #08: Showdown on the Smuggler's Moon, Part I
synopsis: Luke continues his quest to learn about the Jedi by heading for the Jedi Temple on Coruscant. But when his lightsaber is stolen, he soon finds himself entrapped and imprisoned! Will his friends come to his aid before he's forced to enter the Arena of Death? Meanwhile, Han and Leia are confronted by an unexpected foe. The Imperials are closing in on them, and they were set on the rebels' trail by a mysterious woman from Han's past, one with a very personal grudge! As Chewbacca is unleashed, Han finds himself dealing with... a ball and chain?! You've got to read it to believe it!
title: Star Wars (2015) #08: Showdown on the Smuggler's Moon, Part I

synopsis: Star Wars Adventures Free Comic Book Day 2018 is a one-shot issue of Star Wars Adventures. Written by Cavan Scott and illustrated by Derek Charm, the comic features "Hunter vs Hunted," a Han Solo story that leads into Star Wars Adventures (2017) 10. The issue was released as a Free Comic Book Day silver title on May 5, 2018.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) Free Comic Book Day 2018

synopsis: Brand-new middle-grade stories featuring all your favorite characters from the far reaches of the *Star Wars* galaxy, spanning the entire Skywalker Saga and beyond. To be a Jedi is to project peace and embody order in the face of conflict and chaos. But there's no conflict like the conflict between siblings, and Luke and Leia don't even know that's what they are. Can they keep their cool in a feverish fray in Bogano's swamplands? Mace Windu is a Master of the Jedi Order, but even he can be ruffled when an entire planet goes dark, leading Mace and the clones of Lightning Squad to a ghostly encounter. Then it's Luke's turn to convey the lessons of the Jedi mindset, but is Rogue Squadron's hotheaded new recruit ready to learn? All this, plus six stories of villainy that put the dark side in the spotlight: Boba Fett tangles with Han Solo, Count Dooku has a new scheme, the Crimson Corsair proves himself a hotshot pirate, and more.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020)

displayTitle: Adventures (2017) #01 - Better The Devil You Know part 1
synopsis: Introducing an exciting new era in all-ages Star Wars comics! Each issue in this monthly series will feature two stories, starring your favorite Star Wars characters from all the films! This debut issue will reveal Rey’s early adventures on Jakku as well as a comical tale of clone catastrophe!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #01 - Better The Devil You Know part 1

displayTitle: Episode II Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner
synopsis: The people of the planet Fondor can’t agree on who should get to claim the mysterious ship that recently appeared nearby. This seems like a conflict only the Jedi Order can peacefully resolve.
title: Episode II Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner

synopsis: Han and Chewie are stuck on an alien planet with no way off while being pursued by droids bent on their destruction! Will everyone's favorite smuggler duo find a way to safety before time runs out?
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #11 - Family Affair part 2

synopsis: Han has left to get himself into more trouble, leaving Chewie all alone with the perplexing new problem that is a major pain in his hide! The iconic Wookiee will have to use all of his strength, wits, and patience to overcome this latest danger!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #14 - Chewie's Day Off

synopsis: Poe and BB-8 are on a distant planet in search of allies for the Resistance. But it doesn’t take long for the mission to turn south! Attacked by locals who aren’t exactly welcoming, the pilot and droid duo must use their teamwork and resourcefulness to make it out alive. And that’s not to mention the massive creatures native to the planet! In a tight spot, they’re rescued by a mysterious helping hand...
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #15 - An Unlikely Friendship

synopsis: Welcome to the Resistance! Star Wars Resistance is an exciting new animated series coming to the Disney Channel this fall, and making its Star Wars Adventures debut in this very issue! In the time before The Force Awakens, this all-new adventure follows the fledgling Resistance as it begins to realize the growing threat of the First Order!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #16 - All Aces Battle Royale

synopsis: Welcome to the Resistance! In the time before The Force Awakens, this all-new adventure follows the fledgling Resistance as it begins to realize the growing threat of the First Order! Based on Star Wars Resistance, an exciting new animated series coming to Disney Channel this fall!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #17 - Sector 7-E

displayTitle: Adventures (2017) #18 - Raiders Of The Lost Gundark
synopsis: Do you love Jar Jar? Don’t answer that. But if you do, we have the comic for you! In this issue of Star Wars Adventures, Padme assists the Gungan in a hunt for an ancient artifact.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #18 - Raiders Of The Lost Gundark

displayTitle: Adventures (2017) #02 - Better The Devil You Know part 2
synopsis:
Rey is forced to save the life of the unpleasant Unkar Plutt! Will she be able to outwit the off-worlders who have captured him?
Rey encounters a tough new enemy that may change the course of her life forever! Meanwhile, Yoda recounts a very bizarre story from his youth!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #02 - Better The Devil You Know part 2

displayTitle: Episode II Adventures 2: The Cavern of Screaming Skulls
synopsis: A group of stranded Jedi embark on a quest to locate a mysterous artifact.
title: Episode II Adventures 2: The Cavern of Screaming Skulls

synopsis: Yoda joins Anakin on Retta to find out what the Separatists are searching for out in wild space. Come to find out, nothing is what meets the eye...
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #20 - Hide And Seek

synopsis: Legendary General Obi-Wan Kenobi undertakes a daring mission for the Republic Army during the Clone Wars! Guest-starring Captain Rex!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017)

synopsis: A young Mattis Banz dreams of one day being like his heroes, Luke and Leia. Little does he know that in days past, the famous siblings once made a royal mess of an important mission with the easy-to-provoke Sarkans!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #04 - Mattis Makes A Stand

synopsis: The biggest new character from The Last Jedi, Rose Tico, makes her Star Wars Adventures debut in this special one-shot story! Rose prefers to solve problems from behind the scenes, but the threat of the First Order has put her front and center…
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #06 - Podracer's Rescue

displayTitle: Adventures (2017) #09 - IG-88 vs The Gatto Gang
synopsis: Droids take center stage in both stories of this comical and exciting adventure! C-3PO might be in over his head as he takes on a new job, and IG-88 is determined to capture his crafty bounty!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #09 - IG-88 vs The Gatto Gang

synopsis: Han and Chewie are on the run from bounty hunters and take refuge on a planet that mysteriously shuts down all electronics. With no way off the planet, will our favorite scruffy duo be able to evade their pursuers and save themselves?
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #10 - Family Affair part 1

synopsis: One of the spiciest things to come out of the Clone Wars is Anakin and Padme’s secret relationship. If you’re looking for some action-packed forbidden romance, be sure to grab this hot issue of Star Wars Adventures! The story continues with issue #13.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #12 - A Small Push

synopsis: Anakin Skywalker and Padmé Amidala embark on an action-packed adventure where not all is as it seems in a story by fan-favorites Elsa Charretier and Pierrick Colinet!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #13 - Intermission part 2

synopsis: Normally we see Obi Wan paired up with Clone Commander Cody. This issue of Star Wars Adventures spices things up a bit by bringing you an Obi Wan/Captain Rex mash-up!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #19 - Roger, Roger

synopsis: Join Lando Calrissian and Chewbacca aboard the Millennium Falcon for another rollicking mission on behalf of the Rebel Alliance!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #23 - A Race For Answers

synopsis: Witness one of the many lessons Rey learned from Luke Skywalker during her time on Ahch-To. Plus, in an all-new installment of Tales from Wild Space, Resistance pilot Tallie teaches her squad how to overcome their fears.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #26 - Alone In The Dark

synopsis:
"Loyalty Test" is a comic story featuring Kylo Ren and Armitage Hux.
"The Lost Stories, Part 1" is a comic story featuring Emil Graf and the crew of the Star Herald.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #30 - The Lost Stories part 1

synopsis:
Explore the galaxy in light of events depicted in The Rise of Skywalker! In this issue, the spotlight falls on Rey!
Includes a special installment of Tales from Wildspace, where the crew of the Star Herald swing into action themselves!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #31 - The Lost Stories part 2

synopsis: Learn more about the heroes and villains of The Rise of Skywalker! In this issue, the spotlight falls on Finn!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #32 - The Lost Stories part 3

synopsis: Star Wars Adventures Free Comic Book Day 2019 is a one-shot issue of the canon comic book anthology series Star Wars Adventures. It features the story "Droid Hunters," which ties into the miniseries Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle. The issue was written by Cavan Scott, illustrated by Derek Charm, and published as a Free Comic Book Day title on May 4, 2019 by IDW Publishing.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) Free Comic Book Day 2019

synopsis: An exciting new era begins! Each issue in this monthly series will feature two stories starring all your favorite Star Wars characters! In the wake of the events of The Rise of Skywalker, Rey, Poe and Finn aren't finished fighting the First Order. Plus, an all-new tale of everyone's favorite droid bounty hunter from The Empire Strikes Back, IG-88! (With apologies to 4-LOM.)
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #01 - Invasion Of Echo Base

synopsis: Join the Wookiees of Kashyyyk for part one of a special Life Day celebration! Then, follow Kylo Ren as he learns what it means to be the Supreme Leader of the First Order.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #03 - Life Day

synopsis: Join the Wookiees of Kashyyyk for part one of a special Life Day celebration! Plus, an exciting adventure featuring a beloved bounty hunter!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #04 - Credits

synopsis: Padme and Anakin have grand plans to have a romantic night celebrating a recent victory. But before they get a chance to get together, Anakin is Jedi-napped by a group of outlaws with their sights on a holocron in the Jedi temple! Now it's up to Padme to use all of her cunning to infiltrate the outlaw base and rescue him.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #05 - The Incident part 1

synopsis: "The Gaze Electric" is a High Republic-set short comic adventure that featured as the back up story in Star Wars Adventures (2020) #6, published by IDW.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #6 - The Gaze Electric

displayTitle: Adventures (2020) #07 - The Crimson Corsair And The Crime Lord Of The Barren Rim
synopsis: The Empire has been defeated, but that doesn't mean that the adventures are over for Luke and Leia, who find themselves in a tricky situation that they have to work together to get out of! Plus, the Crimson Corsair and his band of pirates make their Star Wars Adventures debut!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #07 - The Crimson Corsair And The Crime Lord Of The Barren Rim

displayTitle: Adventures (2020) #08 - The Princess And The Bog part 2
synopsis: The Empire has been defeated, but that doesn't mean that the danger is over for Luke and Leia, who find themselves in a tricky situation that they have to work together to get out of! Plus, Count Dooku has sinister plans for a Clone troop!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #08 - The Princess And The Bog part 2

synopsis: Mace Windu and his Lightning Squadron land on the planet Ridlay, which has gone mysteriously dark, expecting a Separatist attack. But what they find instead is a surprise to them all. Then, Boba Fett makes his Star Wars Adventures debut as he clashes with Han Solo in the time before Episode IV!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #09 - Trade Relations

synopsis: Mace Windu and his Lightning Squadron land on the planet Ridlay, which has gone mysteriously dark, expecting a Separatist attack. But what they find instead is a surprise to them all. Then, Zak and Tash Arranda sneak off to investigate a creepy cave, where they find a strange artifact, and a mysterious cult waiting for them!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #10 - Separation Anxiety part 2

synopsis:
Commanded by Luke Skywalker, Rogue Squadron tangles with the Empire in the Outer Rim, but the young Jedi has more than Imperial TIE fighters to deal with. New recruit Myra Chimor just won't listen to orders. Can the hot-headed pilot learn how to fly as part of a team or will her need to go it alone lead to disaster? Cavan Scott joins Manuel Bracchi for the beginning of a two-part X-wing adventure, "Squad Goals"!

Then, in "Bubo's Adventure," by Anne Toole and Nick Brokenshire, Ree-Yees has lost Jabba the Hutt's beloved pet, Buboicullaar! Explore every inch of the filthy Hutt barge with Ree-Yees as he races to find Bubo before Jabba can toss him off the ship!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #11 - Squad Goals part 1

synopsis:
First, it's a trap! Luke Skywalker and Rogue Squadron has been snared by the Empire. But who is the traitor and why is new recruit Ibti Myrak fighting with Admiral Ackbar on the deck of Home One? X-wings and TIE fighters clash in "Squad Goals," part two by Cavan Scott and Manuel Bracchi.

Then, from author and artist Andrew Griffith comes a new Tales of Villainy. Asajj Ventress must face off with Aayla Secura, who is dangerously close to uncovering the early stages of the Death Star Project.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #12 - Squad Goals part 2

synopsis:
First, from author George Mann (Doctor Who), the Millennium Falcon needs some serious repairs after sitting in disrepair on Jakku. So Rey, Chewie, Finn, and BB-8 have to make a pit stop. But it doesn't quite go as planned (it never does), and the group quickly finds themselves at the wrong end of a bounty hunter's blaster.

Then, in a bone-chilling tale from author Danny Lore (Transformers: Shattered Glass, King in Black: Captain America), Darth Vader searches a temple for a hidden tome and nothing, nobody, will stop his wrath.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #13 - A Last Chapter

synopsis:
First story from author George Mann. After stopping to repair the Millennium Falcon, Rey, Chewie, Finn, and BB-8 must escape a bounty hunter set on turning them over to the First Order!

Second story from Justina Ireland. An exciting Nihil story from the High Republic era.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #14 - A Very Nihil Interlude

displayTitle: Star Wars Adventures Annual 2020 - Rabbit Hunt
synopsis: The third entry in Jaxxon-centric stories in the IDW Adventure annuals, the 2020 annual spins a tall tale of the buffoonish smuggler on the run from Dengar and IG-88!
title: Star Wars Adventures Annual 2020 - Rabbit Hunt

displayTitle: Star Wars Adventures Annual 2020 - Rebel Bounty
synopsis: The third entry in Jaxxon-centric stories in the IDW Adventure annuals, the 2020 annual spins a tall tale of the buffoonish smuggler on the run from Dengar and IG-88!
title: Star Wars Adventures Annual 2020 - Rebel Bounty

synopsis: With hotshot Resistance pilot Poe Dameron captured by pirates, it's up to BB-8, and Rapier Squadron, to save the day!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #24 - Kidnapped

synopsis: In this story set before A New Hope, Princess Leia Organa faces the most challenging task of her young life: teaching Amilyn Holdo how to drive a speeder! But both learn an important lesson after finding themselves in the dangerous lower levels of Coruscant.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #25 - The Right Wrong Turn

synopsis: This fun comic is a glimpse into the sort of adventure FN-2187 might have had before he became a critical leader in the Resistance. He finds a mischievous critter and has to find a way to hide it before Captain Phasma finds out!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #03 - Pest Control

displayTitle: Episode II Adventures 3: The Hostage Princess
synopsis: The Jedi must save a princess from the evil droids who kidnapped her.
title: Episode II Adventures 3: The Hostage Princess

displayTitle: Episode II Adventures 4: Jango Fett vs. the Razor Eaters
synopsis: Count Dooku recruits renowned bounty hunter Jango Fett to take care of something he can’t fix himself.
title: Episode II Adventures 4: Jango Fett vs. the Razor Eaters

displayTitle: Adventures (2017) #05 - The Trouble At Tibrin part 2
synopsis: With their diplomatic mission turned into a debacle, can Leia and Luke possibly salvage the situation? We hope so because the future of the Rebel Alliance may depend on it!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #05 - The Trouble At Tibrin part 2

displayTitle: Episode II Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes
synopsis: Bounty hunter Zam Wesell is hired by Darth Tyranus to track down a droid engineer.
title: Episode II Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes

displayTitle: Episode II Adventures 6: The Warlords of Balmorra
synopsis: Bounty Hunters Jango Fett and Aurra Sing take on a dangerous assignment from none other than Count Dooku.
title: Episode II Adventures 6: The Warlords of Balmorra

synopsis: The Empire has taken a sacred bird that is central to an important planet's belief system. It's up to the rebel crew of the Ghost to retrieve the creature, but little do they know it is also sought by space pirate Hondo Ohnaka.
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #07 - Endangered part 1

synopsis: The crew of The Ghost are trapped on an Imperial ship with no way out! The space pirate Hondo may be their only chance of escape… but can they trust him not to sell them out?
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #08 - Endangered part 2

displayTitle: Adventures Annual 2018 - The Lost Eggs Of Livorno
synopsis: This issue of IDW’s ongoing Star Wars comic aimed at young readers features two separate stories. One, “Mind Your Manners,” is Kenobi author John Jackson Miller’s only story for IDW to date, where Luke and Leia are on a diplomatic mission but quickly end up on quite the adventure! Cavan Scott wrote the other, “The Lost Eggs of Livorno.” These stories can be found in the fourth volume of the Star Wars Adventures trade paperbacks, Smuggler’s Blues.
title: Star Wars Adventures Annual 2018 - The Lost Eggs Of Livorno

synopsis: Following in the trend established in the 2018 annual, Cavan Scott returns to tell another tale of Jaxxon the old-school space rabbit. He’s paired up with Lando Calrissian, whose style serves in stark contrast to Jaxxon’s absurdity. And yet somehow the duo just works! Also featuring a backup story, “So Much More,” about Leia’s heritage.
title: Star Wars Adventures Annual 2019 - So Much More

synopsis:
Desperate to win Jabba the Hutt's favor, Han Solo and Chewbacca take the galactic gangster a very special present. Han thinks the adorable hoojib will make a perfect addition to Jabba's menagerie, but the cute critter hides a terrible secret. Cavan Scott (Star Wars: The High Republic) and Arianna Florean (Marvel Action) reintroduce a legendary alien species to Star Wars canon, 40 years after their first appearance!

Then, follow a group of troublesome kids on Cloud City when they come across a rare coin worth a pretty credit. But when the coin turns out to belong to the one and only Lando Calrissian, the kids quickly find out they are in over their head. Chip Zdarsky (Daredevil) and Jason Loo (The Pitiful Human-Lizard) join forces to tell this Bespin-based story.
title: Star Wars Adventures Annual 2021 - The Hoojib Menace

synopsis:
On Jakku in the days before *The Force Awakens*, a fierce sandstorm uncovers the wreck of the *Spectral*, a feared Imperial dreadnought lost beneath the dunes for two decades and long rumored to be a haunted ghost ship. At Niima Outpost, Unkar Plutt gathers the scavengers and reveals that this last unplundered Imperial vessel is now exposed, sending them to claim its salvage in his name. Rey, distrustful of Plutt's motives, snatches the claiming flag and races ahead on her speeder, determined to reach the wreck first and pull herself aboard the derelict Star Destroyer.

A backup tale set during the Battle of Jakku recounts how the *Spectral* met its end in the final days of the Empire, filling in the ship's fate that gave rise to the ghost-ship legend.
title: Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down

synopsis: Swallowed by the shifting sands of Jakku, the Imperial Star Destroyer Spectral has been lost for two decades, giving rise to rumors of hauntings and buried treasure. But an epic sandstorm has revealed the ruins of the starship, and renowned scavenger Rey now leads the race to claim whatever lies within!
title: Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down #1

synopsis: Swallowed by the shifting sands of Jakku, the Imperial Star Destroyer Spectral has been lost for two decades, giving rise to rumors of hauntings and buried treasure. But an epic sandstorm has revealed the ruins of the starship, and renowned scavenger Rey now leads the race to claim whatever lies within!
title: Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down #2

synopsis: Swallowed by the shifting sands of Jakku, the Imperial Star Destroyer Spectral has been lost for two decades, giving rise to rumors of hauntings and buried treasure. title: Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down #3

synopsis: Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle is a comic book miniseries published by IDW Publishing. A follow-up to the one-shot Star Wars Adventures: Shadow of Vader's Castle, the series, written by Cavan Scott, consists of five issues and follows up on the heroes of the earlier Vader's Castle miniseries. Francesco Francavilla illustrates the framing stories, which will focus on Vaneé, while Derek Charm, Megan Levens, Chris Fenoglio, and Robert Hack will also provide artwork.
title: Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle

synopsis:
The issue features two stories surrounding the concept of zombie droids. The main story will follow Lina and Milo Graf, while the secondary story will feature Anakin Skywalker, Padmé Amidala, and Jar Jar Binks at some point during the Clone Wars.

Join Creepy Cavan Scott, Frightening Francesco Francavilla, and a host of eerie Star Wars artists in the epic conclusion to the Vader's Castle saga! Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle is a horror-packed, star-studded, five-week event guaranteed to haunt your dreams.

In issue #1, life is looking up for Lina and Milo Graf and Crater, but Milo has been having nightmares... about zombie droids! Find out what's causing these dreams and if Milo can handle being haunted by the Ghosts of Vader's Castle.
title: Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle #1

synopsis: In issue #2, Lina searches for the now missing Milo and Crater and runs into... Jaxxon! He reveals that he, too, has been having nightmares, but of vicious Wookiees bigger than mountains! It seems the Ghosts of Vader's Castle are haunting everyone's dreams...
title: Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle #2

synopsis: In issue #3, catch up with Hudd and Skritt! Hudd has been dreaming of the Spirit of the Swamp, a gilled monster that terrorizes Dagobah! The Ghosts of Vader's Castle are in all corners of the galaxy...
title: Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle #3

synopsis: In issue #4, Lina's dreams are visited by the ghost of the galaxy's most threatening villain! The Ghosts of Vader's Castle are looming closer...
title: Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle #4

synopsis: In the final Vader's Castle tale, Lina, Hudd, Skritt, and Jaxxon race to Mustafar to save Milo and Crater. Will the group be able to fight the ghosts that still haunt the castle, or will the galaxy forever be bound to suffer from the wrath of the Ghosts of Vader's Castle?
title: Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle #5

synopsis: Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle is a canon comic book series written by Cavan Scott. It was published during October 2019. The stories featured Darth Maul, Asajj Ventress, Jabba the Hutt, Darth Vader, and Grand Moff Tarkin.
title: Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle
Star Wars Adventures: Shadow of Vader's Castle

synopsis: Continuing the Vader’s Castle series, this single-issue comic proves that even after good conquers evil, Vader’s looming shadow continues to haunt those who dare trespass on his domain long after his death.
title: Star Wars Adventures: Shadow of Vader's Castle #1

synopsis: After the Battle of Yavin, Han Solo and Chewbacca intend to use their reward to settle their debts. But Princess Leia asks them to accept a secret mission for the Resistance. Mortal dangers, traitorous enemies, and thorny situations mark the path of these two heroes of the Star Wars saga.
title: Star Wars Adventures: Smuggler's Run

synopsis:
The series is an adaptation of Greg Rucka's 2015 junior novel Smuggler's Run: A Han Solo & Chewbacca Adventure.

After the Battle of Yavin, Han Solo and Chewbacca intend to use their reward to settle their debts. But Princess Leia asks them to accept a secret mission for the Resistance. Mortal dangers, traitorous enemies, and thorny situations mark the path of these two heroes of the Star Wars saga.
title: Star Wars Adventures: Smuggler's Run #1

synopsis:

title: Star Wars Adventures: Smuggler's Run #2

synopsis: Tales from Vader's Castle puts a spooky spin on your favorite characters from a galaxy far, far away… This exciting weekly series explores the hidden corners of the Star Wars universe and features Rebels stars Hera, Kanan, and Chopper; Obi-Wan Kenobi and Count Dooku; Han Solo and Chewbacca; the Ewoks; and of course, Darth Vader—all under the shadow of Vader's Castle! Fans will be excited to discover these creepy stories by fan-favorite writer Cavan Scott with art by the greatest talent from across the galaxy, including Derek Charm, Kelley Jones, Chris Fenoglio, Corin Howell, Rober
title: Star Wars Adventures: Tales From Vader's Castle

displayTitle: Adventures: The Clone Wars - Battle Tales
synopsis: This exciting weekly series explores a time of great upheaval in the galaxy, the Clone Wars! While Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker, and other Jedi Knights fight against incredible odds, Commander Cody, Captain Rex, and other clones, pinned down for the duration, swap war stories that feature your favourite characters from The Clone Wars animated series, such as Padmé Amidala, General Grievous, and many more!
title: Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars - Battle Tales

displayTitle: Adventures: The Clone Wars - Battle Tales #1
synopsis:
Return to a time of great upheaval in the galaxy, the final years of the Republic, in this anthology based on the beloved animated series!
While Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker, and other Jedi Knights fight against incredible odds, two Republic squadrons must hold their position against an encroaching droid army of the Separatists. Pinned down for the duration, Commander Cody, Captain Rex, and other clones swap war stories that feature your favorite characters from The Clone Wars animated series, such as Padmé Amidala, General Grievous, and many more!
title: Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars - Battle Tales #1

displayTitle: Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi
synopsis: Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi is a two-issue comic book miniseries written by Alec Worley, adapted from the junior novel by Jason Fry. The series is a reprint of the previously released German miniseries Star Wars: The Weapon of a Jedi. It began the release of the first issue by IDW Publishing in on May 26, 2021.
title: Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi

displayTitle: Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi #1
synopsis: A comic adaptation of the junior novel The Weapon of a Jedi: A Luke Skywalker Adventure by Jason Fry.
title: Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi #1

displayTitle: Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi #2
synopsis:
A comic adaptation of the junior novel The Weapon of a Jedi: A Luke Skywalker Adventure by Jason Fry.

The Rebel Alliance has destroyed the Empire's dreaded Death Star, but the Imperial starfleet continues hunting the rebels throughout the galaxy. Luke Skywalker now seeks to support the Rebellion as an X-wing fighter. But as he flies with the pilots of the Red Squadron, Luke feels stirrings of the Force. And this farm boy turned fighter pilot begins to suspect that his destiny lies along a different path.
title: Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi #2

synopsis: Star Wars: Anakin's Speedway was a game released by Lucas Learning in 2000. It was intended for children ages 4 and up and featured young Anakin Skywalker and other characters from Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace.
title: Star Wars: Anakin's Speedway

synopsis:
Galactic espionage hits the Empire, hard!

Haarkon Dak has been undercover in the Imperial bureaucracy for years...

...but now, he's the only chance to save Rebel sympathetic senators!
title: Star Wars (2015) Annual #1

displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) Annual #1: The Long Hunt
synopsis: While Luke Skywalker and Leia are on the planet Tirahnn, they are attacked by Catuman warriors sent by Kharys, the Majestrix of Skye. Han Solo recognizes Kharys from his smuggling days and resolves to confront her on her homeworld, but the *Millennium Falcon* is shot down over Skye by Imperials. Captured, Luke and Leia are brought before the Supreme Council of the Highland Clans, where Leia is condemned as an enemy of the Empire while Luke is hailed as the son of the winged S'kytri's "wingless brother," prompting the council to aid the Rebels. Meanwhile Han and Chewbacca have been captured by Kharys and interrogated about Luke. With their S'kytri allies, Luke and Leia storm the Majestrix's fortress and rescue Han and Chewbacca. Kharys is killed in a lightsaber duel with Luke, freeing Skye from Imperial rule.
title: Star Wars (1977) Annual #1: The Long Hunt

synopsis: Fleeing Imperial stormtroopers, Luke Skywalker, Lando Calrissian, and C-3PO take refuge in a convent housing a golden statue of Han Solo. Rov Vetter Piin appears and declares Solo the savior of Ventooine, activating a recording of Solo recounting the tale. Years earlier, Solo and Chewbacca came to Ventooine to trade in Sansanna spice, only for Solo to be branded a supporter of the tyrannical Satab. While fleeing an angry crowd, Solo saved the Tieress Chrysalla, consort to the Satab, from assassination and was brought to the palace as a hero. He learned that the Satab rules through the Shadeshine, a stone whose power burns out its bearer's body, forcing a new Satab to be chosen each year. Solo was set to take the title, but Chrysalla took his place and ended the rule of the Shadeshine by walking into the Hall of Satabs herself, and a statue was raised in Solo's honor. Back in the present, Luke lures the pursuing stormtroopers into the Hall of Satabs with a recording of his voice, trapping them in suspended animation, then escapes the planet with Lando and C-3PO.
title: Star Wars (1977) Annual #2: Shadeshine!

synopsis: When a young boy hoping to become a Jedi Knight finds no encouragement from Luke Skywalker, Darth Vader welcomes him to the Dark Side of the Force. An allegory of space, power, and human nature crafted by Jo Duffy, scripter; and Klaus Janson, pencils, inks and colors.
title: Star Wars (1977) Annual #3: The Apprentice

synopsis: Princess Leia is on a top-secret dangerous mission that brings her to a planet that wants no part of the war against the Empire. But when an injury threatens to end her mission, can she inspire that rebel spirit in those who just want to keep their heads down? Writer Kelly Thompson (A-Force) and artist Emilio Laiso (Gods of War) bring us an all-new tale of Alderaan's last monarch in action!
title: Star Wars (2015) Annual 2

synopsis:
The Rebel Alliance is on the lookout for a new secret base!
Rebellion leader Princess Leia goes with Han Solo to scope out a secret hideout only he knows…
…as well as the group of killers who want him dead!
title: Star Wars (2015) Annual 3

synopsis: Strap in, racing fans, we're going podracing! Bring your betting money, because this is going to be a high-stakes race, with rebel Luke Skywalker, smuggler Sana Starros and even a certain Dark Lord in attendance! Place your bets!
title: Star Wars (2015) Annual #4

synopsis: Star Wars Arcade, or simply Star Wars, is an arcade game produced by Sega and released in 1994. The game is a first-person space simulator, based around scenes from Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi, especially the Battle of Endor. A home version of the game was later released by Sega in November 1994 on the 32X video game system.
title: Star Wars Arcade

synopsis: Star Wars: Assault Team was a mobile game developed by Disney Mobile in collaboration with LucasArts. It was first announced on January 28, 2014 through the official Star Wars twitter account, with one screenshot attached. It is a turn-based combat game with strategy and card-battle elements. The mobile game was released on March 26, 2014.
title: Star Wars: Assault Team

synopsis: Star Wars: Attack on the Death Star is a Star Wars video game released only in Japan that recreates the Battle of Yavin, putting the player at the controls of an X-wing starfighter. It was released for the Sharp X68000 system in 1991 and the PC-98 in 1992. The music from the game was arranged by Yuzo Koshiro.
title: Star Wars: Attack on the Death Star

synopsis: Star Wars: Battle Above Coruscant is a video game for mobile phones published by THQ Wireless.
title: Star Wars: Battle Above Coruscant

synopsis: Star Wars: Battle for Hoth is a tower-defense mobile game developed by FluffyLogic and published by THQ Wireless for the Apple iPhone and iPod Touch. It was released on July 7, 2010.
title: Star Wars: Battle for Hoth

synopsis: Star Wars: Battle for the Republic is a 2005 mobile strategy game developed by Amplified Games and published by THQ Wireless. It is set during the Clone Wars and allows the player to play as either the Confederacy of Independent Systems or the Galactic Republic in their struggle for control of the galaxy.
title: Star Wars: Battle for the Republic

synopsis: The Star Wars Battlefront Ultimate Edition includes the Star Wars Battlefront Deluxe Edition as well as the Star Wars Battlefront Season Pass.
title: Star Wars Battlefront

synopsis: Fight the greatest battles in the Star Wars universe any way you want to. The choice is yours.
title: Star Wars Battlefront (Classic, 2004)

synopsis: Play the classic Star Wars Battlefront games, online and offline in this definitive collection.
title: Star Wars: Battlefront Classic Collection

synopsis: Join the rise of Darth Vader’s elite 501st Legion of Stormtroopers as you fight through an all new story-based saga where every action you take impacts the battlefront and, ultimately, the fate of the Star Wars galaxy.
title: Star Wars Battlefront II (Classic, 2005)

synopsis: The Adventures of a Jedi Prince series, also known as The Glove of Darth Vader series or simply the Jedi Prince series, is a Legends junior novel series from authors Paul Davids and Hollace Davids. It includes six volumes that were published by Bantam Skylark in paperback from 1992 to 1993. The complete series was reprinted in the 1997 hardcover collections Star Wars: Book One and Star Wars: Book Two. The series chronicles the story of Ken, a twelve-year-old Force-sensitive boy, and his adventures in the time after Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi. Many elements from the series have be
title: Star Wars Book One (Jedi Prince 1-3)

synopsis: Bring In Your Bounty, Dead or Alive
title: Star Wars: Bounty Hunter

synopsis: Star Wars: Card Trader is an Android and iOS app released by The Topps Company, Inc. on March 12, 2015. The app allows users to create an account and collect digital trading cards of Star Wars characters. Digital Art Director Neil Kleid described the variety of cards available in the app, stating, "Between all these different kinds of sets, we're trying to please every kind of different Star Wars fan in some way.
title: Star Wars: Card Trader

synopsis: Star Wars Chess, also known by its full title The Software Toolworks' Star Wars Chess, is a 1993 PC and 1994 Sega CD chess video game.
title: Star Wars Chess

synopsis: Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures was a Star Wars–themed massively multiplayer online game developed by Sony Online Entertainment. First announced on June 1, 2010, the game was part of the Star Wars: The Clone Wars multimedia project. Although the basic game was free to play, premium content, including lightsaber and character customization, could be unlocked through a monthly subscription-based "Jedi" membership.
title: Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures

synopsis:
Choose your side: Will you command AT-ATs and TIE Fighters as the Empire? Or call on iconic heroes like Han Solo and Princess Leia as the Rebellion?
Build and defend your base: Train unique troops specific to each faction, and fortify your base with deflector shields, turrets, heavy artillery, and other defenses!
Lead epic battles: Strategically deploy powerful armies, units, and vehicles against enemies and players around the galaxy!
Form the ultimate Squad: Build strong alliances with friends and other players!
Travel to multiple planets and complete special missions: Play an all-new story as a valiant leader on the front lines of the Galactic Civil War.
Upgrade your strike team and its defenses: Strengthen your forces with multiple levels of upgrades for each unit!
title: Commander

synopsis: The evil Empire is currently creating a doomsday army behind a veil of secrecy. However, they are no match for the Rebel Alliance's covert operations division. Your mission is to infiltrate the Empire and put an end to their plans for terror and domination.
title: Star Wars: Dark Forces Remaster

synopsis:
Are there Rebel survivors stranded on Hoth? Luke Skywalker, Leia Organa, Lando Calrissian and Chewbacca mount a dangerous rescue mission to Echo Base! Lightsabers! Blasters! Snowtroopers! All-out action amongst the wreckage of AT-AT walkers, Rebel airspeeders and frozen weapons of mass destruction!

Darth Vader employs a surprise character from the past to help him find Luke Skywalker. But Sabe, former handmaiden of Padmé Amidala, is also on a quest for the son of Vader. Having worked for him as an Imperial commander, Sabe has enough resources to cause chaos for anyone who stands in her path. How will this affect the Dark Lord's plans to remove Palpatine from power?
title: Star Wars/Darth Vader #1

synopsis: Star Wars: Demolition is a vehicular combat game featuring locations and vehicles from around the Star Wars galaxy.
title: Star Wars: Demolition

synopsis:
The Fromm gang managed to escape from the high-security prison on the planet Ingo, stole an A-wing fighter and returned to their old base on Ingo's moon, Auren.

Fate brings R2-D2 and C-3PO into close contacts with the Fromms, rather too close for comfort... When the droids' shuttle pod crashes on the surface of Auren, the Fromms seize the duo and lock them away in a cell on the lowest level of the gang's hideout.

Using his probe arm, R2-D2 manages to break out of the cell and now C-3PO leads the way as the pair try to make their way through the locked doorways and past the hazardous security systems installed by the Fromms to keep their base safe. Unbeknown to the duo, rescue is at hand, Jord and Thall followed the crashing shuttle pod and are on the surface of Auren. Safety lies above R2-D2 and C-3PO... providing that they can find a route up through the eight levels of the Fromm hideout and deal with all the patrolling droids...
title: Star Wars Droids

synopsis: R2-D2 and C-3PO are sent by the Intergalactic Droid Agency to the tiny planet Dodz to serve their new master, crystal merchant Lott Kemp. But when the droids arrive on Dodz they discover that Kemp has gone missing and his home has been destroyed, thus a new adventure begins!
title: Star Wars Droids #1: The Destroyer

synopsis: Star Wars: Droids was a 1988 platform game produced for the Amstrad CPC, Commodore 64, and the ZX Spectrum. It was loosely tied to the Star Wars: Droids cartoon series.
title: Star Wars: Droids

synopsis: Droids 2 is the second issue of the Star Wars Droids series of comics. The story is split into three chapters, "The Ultimate Weapon Part 1," "The Ultimate Weapon Part 2: In the Company of Evil," and "The Ultimate Weapon Part 3: Shock Treatment." It was published on March 18, 1986 with a cover date of June 1986.
title: Star Wars Droids #2: The Ultimate Weapon

synopsis: Droids 3 is the third issue of the Star Wars: Droids series of comics. The story is split into two chapters, "The Scarlet Pirate Part 1" and "The Scarlet Pirate Part 2: End of the Game." The issue was published on May 13, 1986 by Marvel Comics.
title: Star Wars Droids #3: The Scarlet Pirate

synopsis: Droids 4: Lost in Time is the fourth issue of the Star Wars Droids series of comics. It was published by Marvel Comics on July 15, 1986 with a cover date of October 1986.
title: Star Wars Droids #4: Lost in Time

displayTitle: Droids #6: Star Wars According to the Droids, Book I
synopsis: Droids 6 is the sixth issue of the Star Wars Droids series of comics. It was published November 18, 1986 with a cover date of February 1987.
title: Star Wars Droids #6: Star Wars According to the Droids, Book I

displayTitle: Droids #7: Star Wars According to the Droids, Book II
synopsis: Droids 7 is the seventh issue of the Star Wars Droids series of comics. It was published January 13, 1987 with a cover date of April 1987.
title: Star Wars Droids #7: Star Wars According to the Droids, Book II

displayTitle: Droids #8: Star Wars According to the Droids, Book III
synopsis: Droids 8 is the eighth and final issue of the Star Wars: Droids series of comics. It was published March 17, 1987 with a cover date of June 1987.
title: Star Wars Droids #8: Star Wars According to the Droids, Book III

synopsis: "Star Wars: Droids" is a short one-page comic strip released by Kellogg's as an Apple Jacks promotion.
title: Star Wars Droids: (Apple Jacks)

synopsis: "Artoo's Day Out" is an 8-page comic written by Ryder Windham from Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 1 which was published by Topps in Fall 1994.
title: Star Wars: Droids: Artoo's Day Out

synopsis: Olag Greck is a con man and arch criminal, and he's hiding out exactly where you might expect: among his own wretched kind on the smuggler moon Nar Shaddaa. But knowing where he is and actually arresting him are two completely different matters, as the newly deputized Artoo-Detoo and See-Threepio discover!
title: Star Wars Droids: Rebellion

synopsis: Olag Greck is a con man and arch criminal, and he's hiding out exactly where you might expect: among his own, wretched kind on the smuggler planet Nar Shaddaa. But knowing where he is and actually arresting him are two completely different matters as the newly-deputized Artoo-Detoo and See-Threepio discover. Smugglers and criminals have no affection for old droids, particularly when they're carrying badges! They're just a couple of used appliances in hot pursuit of a perp, and a world of accomplices stand in their way!
title: Star Wars Droids: Rebellion #1

synopsis: Artoo-Detoo and See-Threepio may have bitten off more than they can chew! Their boss has been blown to bits, and they're marooned in perhaps the most dangerous place in the universe: Nar Shaddaa! The beautiful and deadly Jace Forno has somehow wormed her mercenary self into the spaceport's top security position, and it seems like she's got an agenda for taking care of all kinds of meddlesome droids!
title: Star Wars Droids: Rebellion #2

synopsis: Trapped on a drone barge headed for a recycling center, See-Threepio is about to have his memory wiped clean! Artoo races to rescue his old pal, but will Threepio even recognize the plucky little droid by the time he arrives?
title: Star Wars Droids: Rebellion #3

synopsis: All spacelanes lead to Boonda the Hutt's palace! From one direction comes Olag Greck, looking to strike a shady deal, and from the other comes a drone barge loaded to the gunwales with angry droids, among them a mysteriously transformed See-Threepio. He's undergone a drastic change of personality and become a charismatic leader of the droid rebellion. But the cavernous halls of Boonda's palace hold surprises for everyone, and as with all Hutt palaces, not everyone who enters gets out alive!
title: Star Wars Droids: Rebellion #4

synopsis: Star Wars: Droids: Season of Revolt is a trade paperback collecting the final four issues from Star Wars: Droids (1995). The paperback was only released in the UK, with Boxtree co-publishing it with Dark Horse Comics.
title: Star Wars Droids: Season of Revolt
Star Wars Droids: Season of Revolt #1

synopsis: After a failed attempt to rescue the hapless Smiley from the clutches of Dictator-Forever Craw, Artoo and Threepio find themselves captives in Craw's palace! And, as if life weren't already complicated enough for Threepio and Artoo, a revolution breaks out inside the palace grounds! They came to save their friend, but now they're fighting to save themselves!
title: Star Wars Droids: Season of Revolt #2

synopsis: In order to save their friend Smiley, Artoo-Detoo and See-Threepio have fallen in with a crew of Targonnian revoltists looking to overthrow Dictator-Forever Craw. Smiley is trapped in Craw's castle, behind the palace's impenetrable force field. To save their friend, Artoo-Detoo and See-Threepio must infiltrate the castle and shut down its protective field! The droids need to save Smiley because his brain contains the secret of the savorium herb... a secret which could shake the galaxy to its foundations!
title: Star Wars Droids: Season of Revolt #3

synopsis: The galaxy teeters on the brink of revolution, and See-Threepio and Artoo-Detoo are the only ones who can stop it! The Ithorian's plan to seed a rapture-producing herb, known as Savorium, throughout the troubled galaxy is interrupted by the power-mad dictator Craw. Now Threepio and Artoo face a dilemma: they can defend the Ithorian's plan, and survive, or they can destroy the Ithorian's ship and cargo, at the cost of their own existence!
title: Star Wars Droids: Season of Revolt #4

synopsis: In their first adventure in the Kalarba system, the droids R2-D2 and C-3PO arrive at Hosk Station, where they run afoul of the intergalactic criminal Olag Greck. The story marks an early appearance by the bounty hunter droid IG-88 and introduces Greck, Xob, and the Corellian pilot Jace Forno, setting up the events that lead into the pair's later adventures in the Kalarba system.
title: Star Wars: Droids Special

synopsis: Star Wars: Droids: The Kalarba Adventures is a trade paperback published by Dark Horse Comics in June 1995. With an introduction by Anthony Daniels, The Kalarba Adventures collects the Droids Special, the six issues of Star Wars: Droids (1994), the short comic issue "Artoo's Day Out", and production sketches from Droids.
title: Star Wars Droids: The Kalarba Adventures

synopsis: In the Star Wars galaxy, automatons are so much necessary property, but even first-degree droids are considered expendable! Set before the events of Star Wars: A New Hope and the formation of the Empire, Droids features the adventures of protocol droid See-Threepio and astromech droid Artoo-Detoo in the Kalarba system (as seen in DHC #17, 18, and 19). Despite their differences, See-Threepio and Artoo-Detoo know that the best way to survive is to stick together. Thank the maker!
title: Star Wars Droids: The Kalarba Adventures #1

synopsis: A gang of interplanetary thieves steal See-Threepio and Artoo-Detoo from the Pitareeze family, and take the droids to Kalarba's moon, Indobok. The droids meet a nefarious character from their past, and realize that their troubles have just begun!
title: Star Wars Droids: The Kalarba Adventures #2

synopsis: In a deadly case of mistaken identity, See-Threepio and Artoo-Detoo become entangled in an illegal operation on the Hosk moon, and are forced to enter a droid battle arena.
title: Star Wars Droids: The Kalarba Adventures #3

synopsis: When Star Wars hit the big screen in 1977, the world fell in love with R2-D2 and C-3PO. Now the events that led them to their fateful meeting with Luke Skywalker are revealed for the first time! In this issue, Corellian rogue Jace Forno leases the dysfunctional duo for a deadly mission to the moon Indobok!
title: Star Wars Droids: The Kalarba Adventures #4

synopsis: In the droid trade the only use for old units is as spare parts and scrap. So even See-Threepio is impressed when he and Artoo meet veritable antiques Q-E and 2-E, two diminutive Model Es who have operated a nursery for several generations of Kalarbans. But despite their longevity, Q-E and 2-E carry a horrific secret that could spell the end for all droids!
title: Star Wars Droids: The Kalarba Adventures #5

synopsis: In the conclusion to the adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO in the Kalarba system, a power core rupture on Hosk forces all life forms to be evacuated, but life forms doesn't include droids! As Olag Greck makes his final stand, R2-D2 and C-3PO race against time to save the industrial moon… but first they'll have to survive Greck's droid armada!
title: Star Wars Droids: The Kalarba Adventures #6

synopsis: Star Wars: DroidWorks is a computer game released in 1998 by Lucas Learning for the PC. It is intended for children ages 10 and up. The game lets players build droids to do certain tasks, and in this game create a droid that will infiltrate an Imperial droid factory on the planet Tatooine, where assassin droids are being constructed to destroy the Rebel Alliance.
title: Star Wars: DroidWorks

synopsis: Star Wars: Early Learning Activity Center was a game released in 2000 by Lucas Learning. It was intended for children ages 4 to 6, and featured young Anakin Skywalker, Queen Amidala and other characters from Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace.
title: Star Wars: Early Learning Activity Center

displayTitle: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption
synopsis: Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption is an expansion of Star Wars: Empire at War. It was announced on May 9, 2006 at E3. The expansion adds several new maps and units, as well as an additional storyline revolving around the conquest of Tyber Zann and new types of gameplay, including playing as the Zann Consortium, a powerful crime organization and syndicate.
title: Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption

synopsis: Command or corrupt an entire galaxy in the definitive Star Wars strategy collection. It is a time of galactic civil war. Will you take up the reins of the Rebellion, assume control of the Empire, or rule the Star Wars Underworld?
title: Star Wars Empire at War - Gold Pack

synopsis: Released for the Nintendo 64 and PC nearly three years after Rogue Squadron, Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo details the events of Naboo post-occupation by the Trade Federation in 32 BBY. As Lieutenant Gavyn Sykes you attempt to liberate the planet Naboo from Trade Federation forces, using several vehicles and starships including the AAT, STAP, and N-1 starfighter.
title: Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo

synopsis: Take back the Theed Royal Palace in this fast and furious lightsaber action game. You will have the power of the Force and your trusty lightsaber to help you ward off legions of battle droids, destroyer droids, assassins, and other creatures from Star Wars: The Phantom Menace.
title: Star Wars: Episode I: Jedi Power Battles

synopsis: Two Engines. One Champion. No Limits.
title: Star Wars Episode I Racer

synopsis: Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier is a video game by Lucas Learning released on May 18, 1999. The players must introduce organisms to the Naboo moon of Ohma-D'un in an attempt to develop a stable ecosystem capable of supporting Gungan colonization.
title: Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier

synopsis: Anakin Skywalker, a young slave strong with the Force, is discovered on Tatooine. Meanwhile, the evil Sith have returned, enacting their plot for revenge against the Jedi.
title: Episode I: The Phantom Menace

synopsis: In this novelization, the events of Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace are told in a slightly different way, the same story, but in book form!
title: Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace

synopsis: Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace is the action-adventure video game adaption of the Star Wars prequel trilogy film Star Wars: The Phantom Menace. It was published by the LucasArts Entertainment Company and developed by Lucasarts in conjunction with Big Ape Productions. The game was released for PC on May 18, 1999, and for PlayStation on September 15, 1999.
title: Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace

displayTitle: Episode II Attack of the Clones
synopsis: In this novel adaption of the iconic Star Wars film, Jedi Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker must protect Senator Padme Amidala from danger, while also attempting to uncover the mystery behind who might want her dead.
title: Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones

displayTitle: Episode II: Attack Of The Clones
synopsis: Following an assassination attempt on Senator Padmé Amidala, Jedi Knights Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi investigate a mysterious plot into the heart of the Separatist movement and the beginning of the Clone Wars.
title: Episode II: Attack Of The Clones

displayTitle: Episode II Attack of the Clones
synopsis: Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones was a Game Boy Advance game released by THQ on May 30, 2002. The player assumes the role of Obi-Wan Kenobi, Mace Windu, and Anakin Skywalker during the events of Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones. The player participates in lightsaber duels, fighting droids, and space combat.
title: Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones

displayTitle: Episode III: Revenge Of The Sith
synopsis: When the sinister Sith unveil a thousand-year-old plot to rule the galaxy, the Republic crumbles and from its ashes rises the evil Galactic Empire. Jedi hero Anakin Skywalker must choose a side.
title: Episode III: Revenge Of The Sith

displayTitle: Episode III Revenge of the Sith
synopsis: Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith is a 2005 video game based on the movie of the same name. It centers on Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker as the Clone Wars come to an end. There are seventeen levels, interlaced with over twelve minutes of footage from the movie. It was released on May 5, 2005, for the PlayStation 2, Xbox, Game Boy Advance and Nintendo DS.
title: Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith

displayTitle: Episode III: Revenge of the Sith Activity Center
synopsis: Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith Activity Center was a game released by LucasArts in 2005, based on the movie Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith. It consisted of a collection of minigames, wallpapers, screensavers and desktop themes.
title: Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith Activity Center

synopsis: Nineteen years after the formation of the Empire, Luke Skywalker is thrust into the struggle of the Rebel Alliance when he meets Obi-Wan Kenobi, who has lived for years in seclusion on the desert planet of Tatooine. Obi-Wan begins Luke’s Jedi training as Luke joins him on a daring mission to rescue the beautiful Rebel leader Princess Leia from the clutches of the evil Empire. Although Obi-Wan sacrifices himself in a lightsaber duel with Darth Vader, his former apprentice, Luke proves that the Force is with him by destroying the Empire’s dreaded Death Star.
title: Episode IV: A New Hope

displayTitle: Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back
synopsis: After the destruction of the Death Star, Imperial forces continue to pursue the Rebels. After the Rebellion’s defeat on the ice planet Hoth, Luke journeys to the planet Dagobah to train with Jedi Master Yoda, who has lived in hiding since the fall of the Republic. In an attempt to convert Luke to the dark side, Darth Vader lures young Skywalker into a trap in the Cloud City of Bespin. In the midst of a fierce lightsaber duel with the Sith Lord, Luke faces the startling revelation that the evil Vader is in fact his father, Anakin Skywalker.
title: Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back

displayTitle: Episode VI: Return Of The Jedi
synopsis: Luke Skywalker leads a mission to rescue his friend Han Solo from the clutches of Jabba the Hutt, the Emperor prepares to crush the Rebellion with a more powerful Death Star, and the Rebel fleet mounts a massive attack on the space station. Luke Skywalker confronts Darth Vader in a final climactic duel before the evil Emperor.
title: Episode VI: Return Of The Jedi

synopsis: Star Wars: Flight of the Falcon was a video game for the Game Boy Advance, produced by THQ.
title: Star Wars: Flight of the Falcon

synopsis: Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns is an expansion pack to the Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds video game that was released shortly after the theatrical release of Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones. It introduced two more playable civilizations and two more campaigns: that of the Confederacy of Independent Systems and the Galactic Republic.
title: Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns

synopsis: Lead the great armies of the Star Wars™ Episode II: Attack of the Clones saga in intense real-time strategy clashes. Enter the fray as the Galactic Empire, Rebel Alliance, Wookies, Trade Federation, Gungans or Royal Naboo to determine the course of the Galactic Civil War.
title: Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds Saga

synopsis: Star Wars: Galactic Defense was a tower defense mobile game developed by DeNA Santiago for Android and iOS. The game took place in a wide variety of eras, spanning both the prequel and the original trilogies. The game was announced on September 24, 2014, and released on October 30, 2014. In mid-February 2016, DeNA announced the release of 10 new missions on the planet Coruscant, along with the eventual shutdown of the game.
title: Star Wars: Galactic Defense

synopsis: Star Wars: Galactic Racer is a high-stakes reinvention of racing born in the lawless Outer Rim. With the Empire gone and the galaxy rebuilding, The Galactic League is created: an underground, unsanctioned circuit where syndicates bankroll chaos and champions are forged.
title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer

synopsis: Star Wars Galaxies, often abbreviated SWG, was a Star Wars-themed MMORPG developed by Sony Online Entertainment (SOE) and published by LucasArts for Microsoft Windows PCs. The base game was released as Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided on June 26, 2003 in the United States of America, November 7, 2003 in Europe, December 23, 2004 in Japan, and in 2006 in Australia.
title: Star Wars Galaxies

synopsis: It is a time of great turmoil. The oppressive Empire is close to seizing complete control of the galaxy. The ragtag guerrilla army of the Rebel Alliance fights on, striking wherever it can, but now something has come to light that could spell certain doom. Hidden in the Jedi ruins of Dantooine is a Holocron containing a list of high-level Rebel sympathizers. If that list were to fall into the hands of Darth Vader, the Rebel Alliance would lose its most valued support—and possibly the war itself. As an Imperial bioengineer who frequently visits other worlds, Dusque Mistflier is the perfec
title: Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine

synopsis: Star Wars: Galaxy of Heroes (abbreviated SWGOH) is a collectible turn-based role-playing mobile game developed by EA Capital Games and published by Electronic Arts. The game was first announced on June 15, 2015, in EA's press conference during the 2015 Electronic Entertainment Expo and was released on November 24 of that year.
title: Star Wars: Galaxy of Heroes

synopsis: What begins as a simple refueling stop quickly turns into an epic Batuu adventure no one will forget.
title: Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: A Batuu Adventure!

synopsis: Star Wars: Grievous Getaway is a mobile video game that was published by THQ Wireless and released on November 8, 2005. The game takes place during the events of Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith.
title: Star Wars: Grievous Getaway

synopsis: Star Wars: Heroes Path is a strategy mobile game developed for iOS, announced and released on June 18, 2015. The game takes place during and adapts the events of Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope.
title: Star Wars: Heroes Path

synopsis: Star Wars: Imperial Ace is a video game published by THQ Wireless that was released across Europe exclusively for cellphones in 2006. The game was pre-installed on BenQ Siemens EF81 phones. Star Wars: Imperial Ace is a 3-dimensional game in which players assume the role of an elite TIE fighter pilot during the Galactic Civil War sometime after the Battle of Hoth.
title: Star Wars: Imperial Ace

synopsis: As the Galactic Empire expands, high-ranking officials from each branch of the Imperial Military have set down tactical guidelines and procedures for all newly ascending commanders. Set in-universe, this compendium of ordinance, mission reports, and Imperial philosophy was intercepted by members of the Rebel Alliance, some of whom also left commentary scribbled in the margins. Housed in a deluxe case that opens with lights and sounds, this never-before-seen Imperial Handbook is perfect for Star Wars fans—no matter which side of the Civil War they're on.
title: Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide

synopsis:
A non-canon "what if" retelling of *A New Hope* that diverges at the Battle of Yavin: Luke Skywalker's proton torpedoes malfunction and fail to destroy the Death Star. With the Rebel base overrun, the survivors are captured and imprisoned, but Princess Leia is taken to Coruscant, where Darth Vader quietly begins turning her to the dark side. Aboard the *Millennium Falcon*, a despairing Luke nearly cuts down Han Solo before the spirit of Obi-Wan Kenobi intervenes and sends him to Dagobah to train under Yoda.

Five years later, the Empire renames the Death Star the Justice Star, and Leia has become a powerful Sith Lady serving the dying Emperor. His training complete, Luke returns with Han and Chewbacca to strike at Coruscant. Yoda seizes control of the battle station and destroys the orbiting fleet while Luke and Han fight their way into the Emperor's palace. Ordered to duel, Leia takes up Vader's lightsaber against Luke, who refuses to kill her and instead reaches her by revealing that they are brother and sister, redeeming her from the dark side.
title: Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope

synopsis: Get ready to celebrate as Star Wars Insider commemorates some major Star Wars milestones! It's also a staggering 10 years since Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones introduced audiences to the clones and their 'father,' Jango Fett. As Star Wars: The Clone Wars returns for a fifth season, we'll get some hints for what to expect as the Jedi continue their defense of the Republic, from the show lead writer! synopsis: Insider takes a rare look inside the writers' room of Star Wars: The Clone Wars as we interview the masterminds, who ensure that every episode is intriguing and exciting! We look ahead to 2013 as Insider previews what's coming up from a galaxy far far away. Additionally, included is a never-before-published interview from the Archives as we continue our look at the making of the original trilogy, a full report from Celebration VI, and the latest books, comics, and toys previewed!
