synopsis: The war between the Galactic Republic and the Separatist army rages on. On the planet of Teth, one brave clone captain leads his troops into battle against an overwhelming droid army. This is his story.
title: The Clone Wars: Battle At Teth

synopsis: In this easy-to-read storybook, Jar Jar Binks is mistaken as a Jedi as he and C-3PO attempt a daring, and quite comical, rescue of Padmé Amidala, who has been captured by the Separatist Alliance.
title: The Clone Wars: Bombad Jedi

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Bounty Hunter: Boba Fett
synopsis: Young Boba Fett finds himself on the true path toward becoming a bounty hunter when he starts to track down a Jedi he has long hated.
title: The Clone Wars: Bounty Hunter: Boba Fett

synopsis: Not only have Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi been captured by space pirates, but their archenemy, Count Dooku, has been captured as well. Now this unlikely team must work together to escape from their captors, before their differences get the better of them.
title: The Clone Wars: Captured

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Chewbacca And The Wookiee Warriors
synopsis: A leveled reader for children learning to read on their own. Chewbacca the Wookiee teams up with the Jedi Ahsoka Tano and a group of marooned Jedi younglings to fight their way out of a planetwide Trandoshan hunting party.
title: The Clone Wars: Chewbacca And The Wookiee Warriors

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Children Of The Force
synopsis: "Based on season two of the hit animated series Star Wars: The Clone Wars, this full-color, 32-page, 8x8 storybook follows the adventures of Anakin and Ahsoka as they try to stop a ruthless bounty hunter who has been kidnapping children who show signs of the Force."
title: The Clone Wars: Children Of The Force

synopsis: "The Clone Wars: Cold Snap" is a six-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series, posted on StarWars.com on January 29, 2009. "Cold Snap" leads directly into "Trespass," an episode in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series. The comic was written by Pablo Hidalgo, illustrated and colored by Jeffery Carlisle, and lettered by Grant Gould. It tells the story of a clone cold assault trooper nicknamed "Shiv" writing a letter to a fellow trooper, Flanker, telling him about the problems he is facing while stationed at Glid Station on the ice planet of Orto Plutonia, includi
title: The Clone Wars: Cold Snap

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Colossus of Destiny
synopsis:
During a battle over the planet Simocadia, Republic forces are ordered to withdraw, but Mace Windu ignores Yoda's warning that his personal feelings for the world may be clouding his judgment and drops to the surface in a missile-shaped pod, punching through a Separatist flagship on the way down. On the surface, Empress Sephani and Captain Tobin prepare to surrender, while her son Prince Yojan and his aide Demo recover an ancient artifact from an archeological site.

Fighting through waves of battle droids alongside Commander Ponds and his clone troopers, Windu recalls his long history with the planet, where he once crash-landed and single-handedly fought off invaders. He reaches the palace in time to save the Empress, who reveals that Yojan has joined the Separatists to revive a superweapon and forbids Mace from stopping her son, fearing it will only feed an endless cycle of war. Windu presses on anyway. Demo, claiming to oppose Yojan's plan, explains that Simocadia's ancient artisans destroyed themselves using colossal stone giants called the Ardana Shadex, then leads Mace into an ambush that Windu escapes by taking Demo hostage.

At the dig site, the torso of an Ardana Shadex has been unearthed, and Yojan prepares to activate it. Mace duels the prince and hurls his lightsaber into the activation port, but this only sends the colossus berserk. As it rampages toward the city, Yojan reveals it can only be stopped from within; he climbs inside and destroys it, and is crushed in the process. Mace leaves Simocadia a public enemy rather than the hero he once was, confessing to Yoda that the victory feels hollow, since the Empress's fear that the Republic will now dominate her world seems to be coming true.
title: The Clone Wars: The Colossus of Destiny

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Covetous is a six-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series leading directly into the Star Wars: The Clone Wars episode "Storm Over Ryloth." The comic was posted on StarWars.com on February 26, 2009, written by Pablo Hidalgo, and both illustrated and lettered by Grant Gould. Covetous depicts the prologue to the Battle of Ryloth, seen in "Storm Over Ryloth". Separatist Council Member Passel Argente is visiting the city of Lessu on planet Ryloth, where he brings spoils to the Twi'lek broker Artruk to secure for him. Unbeknownst to Argente, however, he is bein
title: The Clone Wars: Covetous

synopsis: In the latest galaxy-spanning Clone Wars adventure, Anakin Skywalker and his young Padawan Ahsoka Tano go undercover in the cutthroat world of Podracing in hopes of crushing a diabolical Separatist spy ring. Watch out, Jedi -- speed kills!
title: The Clone Wars: Crash Course

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Curfew is a short webcomic leading directly into the Star Wars: The Clone Wars episode "Innocents of Ryloth."
title: The Clone Wars: Curfew

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Darth Maul: Shadow Conspiracy
synopsis: Darth Maul and Savage Opress put together a plan to lure Jedi Obi-Wan Kenobi to them so that Maul can finally have his revenge.
title: The Clone Wars: Darth Maul: Shadow Conspiracy

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Crisis on Coruscant
synopsis: Join the characters in Star Wars: The Clone Wars on your very own adventure! Jump in and out of cyberspace to continue the experience online with exclusive content, amazing animated scenes and games! There's a new adventure with every read. The Galactic Senate is under attack! As Padawan to Jedi Master Shaak Ti, your mission is to rescue Chancellor Palpatine, then find out who is responsible for the plot. Your adventure will take you from the depths of the underlevels on Coruscant, to the Great Mesra Plateau and Jabba the Hutt's Palace on Tatooine. Will you prove yourself worthy of your Jedi t
title: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Crisis on Coruscant

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Dooku's Secret Army
synopsis: A choose-your-own-path adventure set during the Clone Wars. Rumor holds that Count Dooku is assembling a highly trained army to destroy the Jedi. As a Padawan apprenticed to Jedi Master Plo Koon, the reader is assigned to locate and destroy the training ground of Dooku's secret army. The search leads across several planets and into contact with a range of characters, forcing the reader to decide who can be trusted and whether the mission can be completed before betrayal ends it.
title: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Dooku's Secret Army

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Tethan Battle Adventure
synopsis: Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny is a series of choose-your-own-adventure books that started in July 2009.
title: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Tethan Battle Adventure

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: The Lost Legion
synopsis: Do you have what it takes to be a clone trooper in the Republic Army? In this Decide Your Destiny story set in the world of Star Wars: The Clone Wars you can choose from multiple characters—such as medic, commander, demolitions expert, or recon—and dozens of paths to create your own adventure. With over twenty-five different endings, every time you read this book it'll be a whole new adventure.
title: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: The Lost Legion

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: The Way of the Jedi
synopsis: ===Back cover text=== Have you ever wanted to be a Jedi Knight? Well, here's your chance. From the chambers of the Jedi Temple you can travel to the forests of Kashyyyk and fight alongside the mighty Wookiees, or you can fly through space and battle bounty hunters in your starfighter. With dozens of paths to choose from, and over twenty-five different endings, there will be a whole new adventure waiting for you with every read.
title: The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: The Way of the Jedi

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Defenders of the Lost Temple
synopsis: On a mission with a Jedi general, one clone trooper contemplates his own worth as a copy of a great Mandalorian warrior. He has never been the best soldier, and as he learns about the Jedi and the power of the Force, he begins to feel that perhaps what has been setting him apart from the other clones is his own connection to the Force... As the investigation progresses through a booby-trapped, abandoned Jedi Temple, this one clone will discover who he is and also see where he came from when the Mandalorian Death Watch suddenly appears.
title: The Clone Wars: Defenders of the Lost Temple

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Defenders of the Republic
synopsis: The story of a group of clone troopers who, as cadets, must rise through the ranks of the Republic army to become ARC Troopers.
title: The Clone Wars: Defenders of the Republic

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Departure is a short webcomic leading directly into the The Clone Wars episode "Bombad Jedi."
title: The Clone Wars: Departure

synopsis: Padme Amidala and C-3PO are taken hostage aboard the Separatist warship Malevolence by General Grievous; Anakin and Obi-Wan must rescue the Senator.
title: The Clone Wars: Destroy Malevolence

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Discount is a six-page webcomic leading directly into the The Clone Wars episode "Duel of the Droids."
title: The Clone Wars: Discount

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Don't Wake The Zillo Beast
synopsis: More Star Wars action for young readers! These DK Readers are great for those reluctant readers as well as devoted Star Wars fans. Don't Wake the Zillo Beast introduces the very youngest readers to the fearsome Zillo Beast of the planet Malastare, and the destruction it unleashes when it's woken from its slumber.
title: The Clone Wars: Don't Wake The Zillo Beast

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Downfall Of A Droid
synopsis: Anakin loses R2-D2 in a battle over Bothawui; paired with R3, he and Ahsoka must recover R2 before the Separatists extract the Jedi secrets in his memory banks.
title: The Clone Wars: Downfall Of A Droid

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Enemy Within
synopsis: Spearheading a bold, covert mission intended to bring an end to the fighting on a war-torn world, a platoon of Clone troopers find their plans undone by faulty intelligence and bad luck, and themselves stranded deep inside hostile territory. With no choice but to see their flawed mission through to its end, the ragged soldiers make their final push toward their target, unaware that their victory could spell disaster for the Republic!
title: The Clone Wars: The Enemy Within

synopsis: A group of young clone troopers find themselves going up against General Grievous and his relentless army of battle droids.
title: The Clone Wars: Grievous Attacks!

synopsis:
In 22 BBY, a Galactic Republic information bunker becomes the target of the Confederacy of Independent Systems. A force of battle droids and super battle droids, led by a tactical droid hoping to seize important Republic files, marches on the bunker, unaware that it is a decoy set up as a trap by Jedi General Aayla Secura and a squad of clone troopers under Commander Bly.

As the droids advance through a canyon, Bly signals Secura that the enemy has taken the bait. The droids blast into the bunker only to find its data banks empty, and the clones descend by jetpack to attack. While the troopers destroy the droid forces, the tactical droid retreats inside and is confronted by Secura, who decapitates it with her lightsaber before it can trigger the cyberostasis routine that would have wiped its memory. With the droid's data intact, Secura decides to bring its severed head back to her cruiser for a robolobotomy to learn what secrets it holds.
title: The Clone Wars: Headgames

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Hunting the Hunters
synopsis: The Clone Wars: Hunting the Hunters (Part II)—released July 16, 2009—is an 8-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series. Taking place after Season One of The Clone Wars television series, Hunting the Hunters (Part II) was written by Pablo Hidalgo, drawn by Katie Cook, and lettered by Grant Gould. A continuation of the Hunting the Hunters story arc, Hunting the Hunters Part II shows the Jedi Master Kit Fisto battling a rebelling droid army led by the mercenary Robonino on the planet Rodia. The first seven pages of the webcomic also serves as a prelude to the onli
title: The Clone Wars: Hunting the Hunters

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Invitation Only is a short webcomic leading directly into the Star Wars: The Clone Wars episode "Hostage Crisis."
title: The Clone Wars: Invitation Only

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Jar Jar's Big Day
synopsis: Has Jar Jar Binks become a Jedi? That's what everyone thinks as he sets out on a dangerous mission to rescue his friends Padmé Amidala and C-3PO from the clutches of the evil Separatist Alliance. Will the Force be with Jar Jar?
title: The Clone Wars: Jar Jar's Big Day

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Legacy Of Terror
synopsis: Anakin and Ahsoka discover a plot to build a weapons factory on Geonosis and must destroy it and bring the responsible Separatist to justice.
title: The Clone Wars: Legacy Of Terror

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Meet Ahsoka Tano
synopsis: Meet Ahsoka Tano, a new Padawan on her very first mission. The galaxy is a big place and there are many adventures ahead for this young Jedi in training.
title: The Clone Wars: Meet Ahsoka Tano

synopsis: "The Clone Wars: Mouse Hunt" is a six-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series that was posted on StarWars.com on October 23, 2008. It leads directly into the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series episode "Rookies." The comic was written by Pablo Hidalgo, illustrated by Thomas Hodges, and lettered by Grant Gould, with cover art drawn by Steven D. Anderson. "Mouse Hunt" shows Clone Commander CC-2224 and Clone Captain CT-7567 inspecting a tracking station in the Pastil system, where they find and neutralize a Separatist spy in the form of a mouse droid.
title: The Clone Wars: Mouse Hunt

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Neighbors is a short webcomic leading directly into the The Clone Wars episode "Defenders of Peace."
title: The Clone Wars: Neighbors

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Operation: Huttlet is a young reader book based on the film The Clone Wars. It was published on October 2, 2008.
title: The Clone Wars: Operation: Huttlet

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Pirates... and Worse! is a Level 1 young readers book released on December 7, 2009 and published by DK Publishing. The story was based on the The Clone Wars episode "Dooku Captured." The main characters were Hondo Ohnaka and his pirate gang.
title: The Clone Wars: Pirates...And Worse!

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Prelude is a seven-page webcomic and the first installment in The Clone Wars webcomic series, posted on StarWars.com on October 2, 2008. "Prelude" leads directly into "Ambush," the premiere episode in The Clone Wars television series. The webcomic was written by Pablo Hidalgo, illustrated and colored by Thomas Hodges, and lettered by Grant Gould. "Prelude" follows a pair of clone shock troopers nicknamed Rys and Jek getting ready for their next mission: escorting Jedi Master Yoda to a diplomatic meeting with King Katuunko of Toydaria. The comic also shows a discussion between R
title: The Clone Wars: Prelude

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Procedure is a six-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series posted on StarWars.com on October 6, 2008. It leads directly into the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series episode "Shadow of Malevolence." The comic was based on an idea by Henry Gilroy, written by Pablo Hidalgo, and illustrated and lettered by Grant Gould, with cover art drawn by Steven D. Anderson. Procedure details how Jedi Knight Anakin Skywalker obtained several new BTL-B Y-wing starfighters to combat the Separatists' new weapon, the Subjugator-class heavy cruiser Malevolence.
title: The Clone Wars: Procedure

synopsis: R2-D2 has been captured! Now it’s up to his friends Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano to rescue him before the evil General Grievous gets to the top-secret information that is locked away inside his electronic brain.
title: The Clone Wars: R2-D2's Adventure

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: R2 To The Rescue
synopsis: R2-D2 must rescue C-3PO from bounty hunter Cad Bane.
title: The Clone Wars: R2 To The Rescue

synopsis: Jedi Master Yoda is on a secret mission to forge a treaty with the King of the strategic system of Toydaria when his ship is ambushed by Count Dooku. Yoda and three Clone troopers must face off against Count Dooku's dreaded assassin Ventress and her massive droid army to prove the Jedi are strong enough to protect the king and his people from the forces of the war.
title: The Clone Wars S01E01: Ambush

synopsis: Creating panic throughout the galaxy, a devastating Separatist mystery weapon terrorizes the clone starfleet. Anakin and Ahsoka race to save Jedi Master Plo Koon and his clone troopers in time. Jedi Master Plo Koon and his squad barely survive an attack from a mysterious Separatist warship called the Malevolence. Can they stay alive long enough for Anakin and Ahsoka to find them?
title: Rising Malevolence

synopsis: With the help of his Padawan Ahsoka and Jedi Master Plo Koon, Anakin utilizes new long-range Y-wing bombers to lead a bold strike on General Grievous' warship the Malevolence and its destructive weapon. As General Grievous uses the Malevolence to terrorize medical bases, the Jedi rush to defend Republic space. With help from his Padawan and Master Plo Koon, Anakin leads a bold strike mission into enemy territory.
title: Shadow of Malevolence

synopsis: Padmé Amidala and C-3PO are taken hostage by General Grievous, leaving Anakin and Obi-Wan to save the Senator and complete the destruction of the Malevolence. Anakin and Obi-Wan chase down the Malevolence, hoping to destroy it before it can escape. But when Padmé and C-3PO are captured and held hostage aboard, the Jedi are forced to hatch a new plan.
title: Destroy Malevolence

synopsis: Alone on a distant outpost, Clone Commander Cody and Clone Captain Rex must inspire the rookie clones to believe in themselves to stave off a Commando droid invasion.
title: Rookies

synopsis: R2-D2 is lost during a fierce space battle - and Anakin, along with Ahsoka and a replacement droid, R3-S6, must find him before the Separatists discover the Jedi military secrets locked in his memory banks.
title: Downfall of a Droid

synopsis: Anakin, Ahsoka and replacement droid R3-S6 embark on a dual rescue/sabotage mission when they discover R2-D2 is being held at General Grievous' secret enemy listening post.
title: Duel of the Droids

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S01E08: Bombad Jedi
synopsis: On a diplomatic mission to the planet Rodia, Padmé; discovers that her old friend and fellow Republic senator Onaconda Farr has allied his planet with the Separatists. In exchange for food and resources for his people, Onaconda captures Padmé and promises to deliver her to the Nute Gunray. Sensing Padmé is in trouble, Jar Jar Binks disguises himself as a Jedi, and with the help of C-3PO, courageously fights to rescue his friend and fellow senator.
title: The Clone Wars S01E08: Bombad Jedi

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S01E09: Cloak of Darkness
synopsis: Ahsoka and Jedi Master Luminara escort captured Viceroy Nute Gunray to trial, unaware that Count Dooku has dispatched his deadly apprentice assassin Asajj Ventress to free the prisoner and eliminate the Jedi.
title: The Clone Wars S01E09: Cloak of Darkness

synopsis: General Grievous must prove himself worthy of the Separatists when Count Dooku leads Jedi Master Kit Fisto and his former Padawan, the Mon Calamari Jedi Nahdar Vebb to Grievous' villainous enclave.
title: Lair of Grievous

synopsis: During their own attempt to kidnap Count Dooku, Anakin and Obi-Wan discover that the Sith Lord has already been captured by pirates.
title: Dooku Captured

synopsis: While negotiating Count Dooku's ransom, Anakin and Obi-Wan are taken prisoner. The Jedi and Sith form an unlikely alliance in a bid to escape, with Jar Jar Binks as their only hope.
title: The Gungan General

synopsis: When Anakin Skywalker is gravely injured in battle, Jedi General Aayla Secura must teach Ahsoka the Jedi philosophy of having no personal attachments -- while they brave a hostile planet in search of medical help for the Jedi Knight.
title: Jedi Crash

synopsis: While the Jedi combat a new Separatist weapon, the pacifist Lurmen must decide whether they will lay down to the oppressive Separatists or fight with Anakin, Ahsoka and Jedi General Aayla Secura.
title: Defenders of Peace

synopsis: While investigating the disappearance of a clone security force, Anakin and Obi-Wan get caught in the middle of an escalating conflict between the furry territorial inhabitants of a desolate ice world and the greedy representatives of a nearby moon.
title: Trespass

synopsis: Anakin and Obi-Wan discover evidence of a traitor amongst their ranks while attempting to lead Republic forces to liberate the planet of Christophsis from a Separatist siege. When the Republic is ambushed on Christophsis, it becomes clear that someone has set them up. The Jedi suspect the Sith, while Rex and Cody uncover information that points to a spy amongst them.
title: The Hidden Enemy

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S01E17: Blue Shadow Virus
synopsis: Padmé and Jar Jar are captured while searching for a secret Separatist bio-weapons lab, sparking Anakin, Obi-Wan and Ahsoka to try and save their friends and halt the release of a deadly virus.
title: The Clone Wars S01E17: Blue Shadow Virus

synopsis: The fatal Blue Shadow Virus is released, infecting Ahsoka, Padmé and many Clone Troopers - and giving Anakin and Obi-Wan just 48 hours to find the antidote on a mysterious planet from which no visitor has ever returned.
title: Mystery of a Thousand Moons

synopsis: Ahsoka disobeys Anakin's orders and loses most of her squadron - prompting Anakin to help give his Padawan a lesson in a respect for authority, and the opportunity for redemption.
title: Storm Over Ryloth

synopsis: To sabotage a powerful Separatist weapon, Obi-Wan and a small clone force enter an occupied town, and discover that its residents are being used as a living shield.
title: Innocents of Ryloth

synopsis: With his forces stretched thin, Mace Windu must convince Twi'lek freedom fighter Cham Syndulla to help him save the capital city from the droids' destruction.
title: Liberty on Ryloth

synopsis: To free crime lord Ziro Hutt, bounty hunters seize control of the Senate Building and take hostages, completely unaware at first that Jedi Knight Anakin Skywalker is still inside.
title: Hostage Crisis

synopsis: Cad Bane infiltrates the Jedi Temple and attempts to steal an ancient Jedi Holocron. It's up to Ahsoka, Anakin and Obi-Wan to stop the bounty hunter from escaping with the valuable Jedi artifact.
title: Holocron Heist

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S02E02: Cargo Of Doom
synopsis: Anakin and Ahsoka intercept Cad Bane's warship, hoping to recover the stolen Jedi Holocron, but the Jedi underestimate the bounty hunter's cunning tactics.
title: The Clone Wars S02E02: Cargo Of Doom

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S02E03: Children Of The Force
synopsis: Darth Sidious has a new dark assignment: kidnap Force-sensitive children from across the galaxy and bring them to Mustafar.
title: The Clone Wars S02E03: Children Of The Force

synopsis: At the Jedi High Council's request, Padmé investigates a Separatist conspiracy in the Senate.
title: Senate Spy

synopsis: Anakin, Ahsoka, Obi-Wan and Ki-Adi-Mundi lead a landing party to destroy a droid factory on Geonosis.
title: Landing at Point Rain

synopsis: Luminara and Anakin act as decoys to divert new enemy super-tanks, while Padawans Barriss Offee and Ahsoka attempt to destroy a Separatist droid factory.
title: Weapons Factory

synopsis: When Luminara goes missing, Obi-Wan and Anakin lead a platoon of clones in search of her. When the search leads to a mysterious lair, the Jedi are faced with a horde of undead warriors.
title: Legacy of Terror

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S02E08: Brain Invaders
synopsis: When Geonosian brain worms take control of their supply ship, Ahsoka and Barriss must battle to stop the vessel from unleashing the deadly plague upon the galaxy.
title: The Clone Wars S02E08: Brain Invaders

synopsis: A Jedi Master is taken hostage and tortured by General Grievous. Anakin, Obi-Wan and Adi Gallia devise a daring rescue plan, but they soon realize the General has a plan of his own.
title: Grievous Intrigue

synopsis: While searching for General Grievous on a distant planet, Rex encounters a deserter.
title: The Deserter

synopsis: When a wily pickpocket steals Ahsoka's lightsaber, she enlists the help of an ancient Jedi to track down her weapon and reclaim her honor.
title: Lightsaber Lost

synopsis: While investigating rumors of conspiracy surrounding Duchess Satine of Mandalore, Obi-Wan uncovers the truth about a mysterious Mandalorian plot.
title: The Mandalore Plot

synopsis: As the Jedi and their clones defend Duchess Satine from assassination attempts, Anakin discovers that Obi-Wan and the duchess have a history together.
title: Voyage of Temptation

synopsis: On Coruscant, word reaches Duchess Satine that Death Watch is mobilizing, sparking a pre-emptive Republic invasion. On the run from Republic authorities, Satine and Obi-Wan set off to discover the group's true motives.
title: Duchess of Mandalore

synopsis: When Senator Onaconda Farr dies under suspicious circumstances, Padmé sets out to find the person responsible for the death of her favorite 'uncle'.
title: Senate Murders

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S02E17: Bounty Hunters
synopsis: Anakin Skywalker, Obi-Wan Kenobi, and Ahsoka Tano form an uneasy partnership with four deadly Bounty hunters to help protect a local farmer from Hondo Ohnaka and his band of pirates.
title: The Clone Wars S02E17: Bounty Hunters

synopsis: The Republic's new super-weapon awakens the fearsome Zillo Beast of Malastare. Now the Jedi must devise a way to contain the deadly creature.
title: The Zillo Beast

synopsis: Republic forces bring the Zillo Beast back to Coruscant for study. When it escapes, the Jedi must choose between saving millions of lives and destroying the Zillo Beast, the last of its kind.
title: The Zillo Beast Strikes Back

synopsis: A young boy wages war against the Jedi Knights who left him orphaned, bitter and alone.
title: Death Trap

synopsis: When a band of bounty hunters leads Anakin and Mace into a deadly trap on Vanqor, it's up to R2-D2 to battle his way back to Coruscant and warn the Jedi.
title: R2 Come Home

synopsis: After combing the Coruscant underworld for a young fugitive, Plo Koon and Ahsoka pursue him to Florrum for a climactic confrontation.
title: Lethal Trackdown

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S03E01: Clone Cadets
synopsis: Five headstrong clones struggle to complete their training on Kamino. These cadets (Hevy, Cutup, Droidbait, Fives and Echo) seem to be a "bad batch" and are unable to work as a team. As Shaak Ti and drill instructors Bric and El-Les debate the cadets' fate, the clones learn to work together and accept their destiny as soldiers.
title: The Clone Wars S03E01: Clone Cadets

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S03E02: ARC Troopers
synopsis: The Republic learns of an impending Separatist attack on Kamino, and Anakin and Obi-Wan hurry to the planet. After the Republic repulses the Separatists' diversionary assault, the real attack begins. Asajj Ventress, General Grievous and an army of droids rise out of the oceans, bent on destroying Kamino's clone production facilities. Rex, Cody, Fives, and Echo lead the clones in a desperate defense of their home planet.
title: The Clone Wars S03E02: ARC Troopers

synopsis: Ryloth is under siege. Trapped on the surface, Jedi Master Di rallies the local forces with the help of Cham Syndulla. Desperate to save them, the Jedi Council dispatches Senator Bail Organa and Representative Jar Jar Binks to the planet Toydaria, where they are to convince the neutral regent, King Katuunko, to send aid to Ryloth. Bail and Jar Jar must convince Toydaria that their cause is just -- before it's too late. Trade Federation envoy Lott Dod attempts to prevent the Toydarians from giving up their neutrality. Katuunko follows his conscience and secretly aids the Republic, which Jar Jar is able to keep secret from the snooping Trade Federation agents with his inimitable distractions.
title: Supply Lines

synopsis: Chi Eekway and Che Amanwe, Chairman Papanoida's daughters, are kidnapped and held for ransom. Ahsoka Tano teams up with the Senator from Pantora, Riyo Chuchi, to aid the new chairman in recovering his family before the Trade Federation can unduly influence the future of his planet.
title: Sphere of Influence

synopsis: Padmé, on a diplomatic mission to Mandalore, guarantees the pacifist planet the Republic's full protection, but she and Duchess Satine soon find something sinister lurking beneath the planet's serene façade. Moogan smugglers have been sneaking in supplies, including bottled tea destined for the Mandalorian schools. To increase their profits, they have been diluting the tea with a hazardous chemical.
title: The Clone Wars S03E05: Corruption

synopsis: Ahsoka Tano is assigned to teach a class at a leadership academy on Mandalore. Soon after she arrives, Duchess Satine's zealous nephew -- Korkie Kryze -- and his classmates uncover a nefarious plot. Prime Minister Almec is revealed to be an active part of the Mandalorian black market conspiracy on Mandalore, and he attempts to permanently silence Duchess Satine and the cadets before they expose his corruption. Ahsoka and the cadets defeat Almec before he can succeed.
title: The Academy

synopsis: Tasked to protect Senator Padmé Amidala during a political mission to Alderaan, Padawan Ahsoka Tano is plagued by recurring visions of the recently-deceased bounty hunter, Aurra Sing. Unable to clear her mind, Ahsoka worries that the stress of conflict is finally getting to her until her visions indeed prove prophetic. Padmé narrowly avoids death when Aurra Sing attempts to assassinate her. Together, Padmé and Ahsoka trap the hunter, and Ahsoka discovers the true villain behind the plot to kill Padmé: the incarcerated gangster, Ziro the Hutt.
title: The Clone Wars S03E07: Assassin

synopsis: In the middle of a routine shopping trip on Coruscant, C-3PO is abducted by the bounty hunter Cad Bane. Bane is looking for information about the Senate Building on behalf of Jabba the Hutt. Finding C-3PO devoid of useful information, Bane and his accomplices kidnap R2-D2 and extract the vital data, before memory wiping the droids of the incident, and letting them on their way. The floor-plans and security details of the Senate building are part of a plot engineered by the Hutt families to free their imprisoned brother, Ziro the Hutt, who holds potentially damaging information about Hutt activities.
title: Evil Plans

synopsis: Cad Bane has broken Ziro the Hutt out of prison and the Hutt Council demands that Ziro tell them where he's hidden vital -- and incriminating -- information: a journal detailing the criminal activities of the five Hutt families. Ziro makes another daring escape with the help of his estranged (and strange) lover, Sy Snootles. Bane is back on the Hutt's trail -- but he's not the only one. The Jedi Obi-Wan Kenobi and Quinlan Vos need to find him too.
title: Hunt for Ziro

synopsis: When the Senate begins debating a bill that would eliminate government oversight of the Banking Clan's activities in order to fund the war, Padmé and Ahsoka travel in secret to the capital of the Confederacy of Independent Systems. Amidala attempts to forge a peace agreement with the Separatists, while Ahsoka sees, for the first time, the people of the Confederacy. Padmé's friend, Mina Bonteri, spearheads the peace initiative, and convinces the Separatist Congress to sue for peace.
title: Heroes on Both Sides

synopsis: Padmé, Bail Organa and Onaconda Farr attempt to rally Senators in opposition to a bill that would appropriate funds for millions of new clone troops and have disastrous financial consequences for the Republic. Their opposition to the measure, however, soon makes them targets for intimidation and attacks by hired guns. After escaping two hired thugs, Chata Hyoki and Robonino, in a harrowing speeder bike chase, Padmé is able to sway the Senate with a stirring account of how the war has affected an everyday civilian, her handmaiden Teckla Minnau.
title: Pursuit of Peace

synopsis: Troubled by Asajj Ventress' growing prowess with the dark side of the Force, Darth Sidious commands Count Dooku to eliminate her. But Ventress survives Dooku's assassination attempt, and the jilted former apprentice vows to take revenge, enlisting the aid of her kinswomen -- the mystical Nightsisters -- in her sinister scheme.
title: Nightsisters

synopsis: When Count Dooku calls upon the Nightsisters seeking a replacement for Ventress, she and her kin seize the opportunity to exact revenge. Ventress visits the far side of Dathomir and the males of the planet seeking the most brutal and powerful warrior among them. Talzin has Asajj secretly select a warrior from the distant Nightbrother village: Savage Opress. With the power of dark magic, Talzin transforms Savage into a hulking warrior ultimately loyal to Asajj. She then delivers Opress to Dooku, where he will serve as his secret Sith apprentice in a plot to overthrow Darth Sidious.
title: Monster

synopsis: Anakin and Obi-Wan, sent to track down the mysterious figure behind the deaths of several Jedi, soon find themselves on the trail of the monstrous apprentice that Ventress has created: Savage Opress, who has been trained in the ways of the Sith by Dooku.
title: Witches of the Mist

synopsis: A mysterious force draws Anakin, Obi-Wan and Ahsoka to a distant planet, and its inhabitants -- a family of exceptionally powerful Force-wielders -- in an attempt to determine whether Anakin is truly the Chosen One. The patriarch of this family, known only as the Father, has spent ages maintaining the balance between his Daughter, who is strong with the light side of the Force, and his Son, who aligns with the dark. The Father reveals his days are numbered, and he seeks Anakin to take his place as the fulcrum of this balance. A test proves that Anakin is capable of controlling both offspring, as the Father does, but Skywalker refuses to take the Father's place.
title: Overlords

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S03E16: Altar of Mortis
synopsis: Before the Jedi can leave Mortis, the Son takes Ahsoka captive in an attempt to entice Anakin into joining him to use their combined strength to overpower his Father and Sister. To this end, the Son casts Ahsoka under the spell of the dark side.
title: The Clone Wars S03E16: Altar of Mortis

synopsis:
The Jedi remain stranded on Mortis, and the Son, aligned with the dark side of the Force, renews his efforts to convert Anakin as the Jedi prepare for a decisive confrontation. Anakin is stunned by images of his dark future. The Son promises him the power to avert this destiny.
The Father recognizes that the Son has broken the rules of time. He wipes Anakin's memory of these future visions, and steals the Mortis Dagger to end the conflict. The Father impales himself, thus preventing the Son from stealing his power. The Son, stunned by this, is run through by Anakin. With all three Force wielders destroyed, the imbalance in The Force disappears on Mortis. The three Jedi are transplanted back to the galaxy proper, apparently at the moment that they disappeared.
title: Ghosts of Mortis

synopsis: With help from R2-D2 and a squad of captured battle droids, an elite team of Jedi and clone troopers led by Obi-Wan and Anakin attempt to free a captive Jedi General, Even Piell, from an impenetrable prison. Despite orders to the contrary, Ahsoka Tano tags along, though she proves indispensable when the infiltration mission begins to evolve. Piell and his fleet officer, Captain Tarkin, are liberated from their cells, but now the fugitives must escape the Citadel itself.
title: The Citadel

synopsis: With freed prisoners in their possession and the brutal warden attempting desperately to thwart them, Obi-Wan and Anakin search for a way out of the Citadel and back to Coruscant. The prison, however, has more traps, perils, and pitfalls in store for them than they had imagined and they must work past their differences if they are to escape. Their bid to board their shuttle fails when heavy weapons fire destroys the escape craft. ARC trooper Echo dies in the blast. The escapees then flee to the caves and call for rescue from the Jedi Temple on Coruscant.
title: The Clone Wars S03E19: Counterattack

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S03E20: Citadel Rescue
synopsis: After their ship and only way off the planet is destroyed, Anakin and Obi-Wan must lead the escaped prisoners across Lola Sayu's perilous landscape as Plo Koon commands a task force of four cruisers and their fighters through the Separatist defenses in a daring rescue. Even Piell is ravaged by anooba tracking beasts, but before he dies, he passes on his Nexus Routes coordinates to Ahsoka. When the survivors return to Coruscant, Ahsoka knows half the intel, and refuses to disclose it to anyone but the Jedi Council, while Tarkin refuses to hand over his half to anyone other than the Chancellor.
title: The Clone Wars S03E20: Citadel Rescue

synopsis: Ahsoka and a group of abducted younglings find themselves trapped on a Trandoshan moon, prey in an elaborate and cruel hunt. The forlorn younglings have lost all hope, despite the best efforts of their spirited leader, Kalifa. Ahsoka rallies them to defend themselves and strike back against the Trandoshan, an effort with deadly consequences.
title: Padawan Lost

synopsis: As Ahsoka and her youngling allies struggle to evade the Trandoshan hunters, their efforts receive an unexpected boost when a new captive -- Chewbacca the Wookiee -- arrives. Chewie scrounges parts from a wrecked Trandoshan slave ship, assembling a communicator to send out a distress signal. Help arrives in the towering, shaggy form of Wookiee warriors led by General Tarfful. Freed from captivity, Ahsoka returns to the Jedi Temple and is reunited with Anakin Skywalker.
title: Wookiee Hunt

synopsis: When the king of Mon Cala is assassinated, talks break down between the Mon Calamari people and the Quarren, co-inhabitants of the aquatic world. To stop a civil war, the Republic sends Padmé Amidala and Anakin Skywalker, but unbeknownst to them, the Quarren are already being backed by the Separatists. Now the Jedi must protect Mon Cala's new leader, the young Prince Lee-Char, from the attack.
title: Water War

synopsis: Anakin Skywalker and the rest of his Jedi team have been overrun by the Separatist surprise attacks led by Riff Tamson while Prince Lee-Char and Ahsoka must evade capture on their own. Unable to summon more Republic aid, Yoda calls upon the help of the powerful and amphibious Gungan Grand Army, but whether they will be enough to stop the Separatist siege is uncertain. An incensed Tamson doubles his efforts in tracking down Prince Lee-Char, unleashing the reinforcements given to him by Count Dooku in an assault that churns the oceans.
title: Gungan Attack

synopsis: The Republic and Gungan forces have been captured by Riff Tamson and his Karkarodon enforcers. Now, it is up to Ahsoka and the young Prince Lee-Char to unite the fractured people of Mon Cala and drive out the Separatist invaders.
title: Prisoners

synopsis: When the leader of the Gungans, Boss Lyonie, is injured it's discovered there is an uncanny resemblance between the Boss and Jar Jar Binks. Binks must sway his people from rising against the Naboo and stopping a Separatist invasion led by General Grievous.
title: Shadow Warrior

synopsis: After groundquakes have devastated the planet Aleen, a Republic relief effort arrives, including the droids R2-D2 and C-3PO. When the native Aleena's pleas go unheard, it becomes the duty of the droids to embark on a surreal journey through Aleen's subterranean world to save the planet.
title: Mercy Mission

synopsis: C-3PO and R2-D2's bizarre caper continues. Forced to escape a Separatist attack in a Y-wing fighter, the droids visit the world of the Patitites, the odd planet Balnab, and the inside of a pirate warship where they are forced to fight in a gladiatorial arena.
title: Nomad Droids

synopsis: When Anakin is forced to temporarily turn over command of his clone troopers to a new commander, the Jedi Pong Krell, tensions begin to run high as the clones are assigned with a very deadly mission to take the capital of Umbara.
title: Darkness on Umbara

synopsis: General Krell orders Captain Rex and the clone troopers of the 501st Legion to conquer a heavily fortified Umbaran airbase, and will not accept anything less than victory. It is an almost certain suicide mission, unless the clones can use their ingenuity to defeat their new enemy.
title: The General

synopsis: After the Republic conquers an Umbaran airbase, General Krell orders Rex and his men on towards the heavily fortified capital. Realizing there's a better plan, several clone troopers disobey orders to carry out a rogue, covert operation.
title: Plan of Dissent

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S04E10: Carnage of Krell
synopsis: With two of his men facing execution for disobeying orders, Captain Rex must confront his overly aggressive commander, General Krell. Risking charges of mutiny, Rex must make a dark choice as the true face of the enemy emerges.
title: The Clone Wars S04E10: Carnage of Krell

synopsis: Zygerrian slavers are behind the sudden disappearance of an entire colony of people on the planet Kiros. As Anakin and Ahsoka rush to defuse a series of bombs planted by the slavers, Obi-Wan must fight with their imposing leader.
title: Kidnapped

synopsis: To locate the missing colonists, Anakin, Obi-Wan and Ahsoka go undercover to infiltrate the slavers on Zygerria. Anakin struggles with his emotions as a wily Zygerrian queen forces him to take questionable actions in order to carry out his mission.
title: Slaves of the Republic

synopsis: Anakin tries to convince the Zygerrian Queen that she too is a slave and pawn in an evil Separatist plot. Meanwhile, Obi-Wan toils in the slave camps of Kadavo, a grim situation that grows increasingly bleak.
title: Escape from Kadavo

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S04E14: A Friend in Need
synopsis: A peace conference between Separatists and Republic delegates is interrupted by Lux Bonteri, the son of a late Separatist Senator, who involves Ahsoka in his dangerous search to find justice for his mother's death.
title: The Clone Wars S04E14: A Friend in Need

synopsis: When the Jedi learn of a Separatist plot to kidnap Chancellor Palpatine, one of them must go deep undercover as a hardened criminal to extract information from the conspirators."
title: Deception

synopsis: Disguised as Bounty Hunter Rako Hardeen, Obi-Wan Kenobi is on the run with criminal mastermind Moralo Eval and Cad Bane. But their partnership is on thin ice and Anakin and Ahsoka are in hot pursuit.
title: Friends and Enemies

synopsis: Count Dooku challenges eleven bounty hunters to survive several deadly levels devised by Moralo Eval. The winners will participate in the plot to kidnap Chancellor Palpatine on Naboo.
title: The Box

synopsis: Cad Bane leads Dooku's team of bounty hunters, including a disguised Obi-Wan, in a plot to kidnap the Supreme Chancellor during the Festival of Lights on Naboo.
title: Crisis on Naboo

synopsis: Asajj Ventress returns to Dathomir to become a true Nightsister. But then Count Dooku orders General Grievous to wipe out Mother Talzin and her entire clan of witches.
title: Massacre

synopsis: Asajj Ventress joins a group of bounty hunters led by Boba Fett. Their mission is to deliver a box with unknown cargo to the leader of the planet Quarzite.
title: The Clone Wars S04E20: Bounty

synopsis: The search for his long lost brother, Darth Maul, leads Savage Opress to the junk planet of Lotho Minor.
title: The Clone Wars S04E21: Brothers

synopsis: Mother Talzin restores Darth Maul's sanity and gives him a better pair of mechanical legs. Now Maul wants revenge on Obi-Wan Kenobi and lures the Jedi to the remote planet of Raydonia.
title: Revenge

synopsis: Maul takes Savage as his apprentice and together they set out to gather an army. Their attempt to recruit Hondo Ohnaka and his pirates is interrupted by Jedi Council members Obi-Wan Kenobi and Adi Gallia.
title: Revival

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S05E02: A War on Two Fronts
synopsis: By a request from Lux Bonteri, Anakin, Obi-Wan, Ahsoka and Rex travel to Onderon to help train a group of rebels so they can take back the capital city of Iziz from the Separatists.
title: The Clone Wars S05E02: A War on Two Fronts

synopsis: The Jedi and Rex return to Coruscant and leave Ahsoka in charge of supervising the Onderon Rebels as they carry out a series of strikes in the capital.
title: Front Runners

synopsis: The Onderon Rebels attempt to rescue former King Dendup before he is executed.
title: The Soft War

synopsis: The people of Onderon have decided to revolt against the Separatists, leading to a full scale revolt between the rebels and battle droids.
title: Tipping Points

synopsis: Ahsoka escorts a group of younglings to Ilum where they meet with Yoda and seek out the Kyber crystals needed to build their own lightsabers.
title: The Gathering

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S05E07: A Test of Strength
synopsis: As the six younglings prepare to construct their lightsabers, their training vessel Crucible is attacked by Hondo Ohnaka and his pirates.
title: The Clone Wars S05E07: A Test of Strength

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S05E08: Bound for Rescue
synopsis: Hondo has failed to capture the Kaiburr crystals, but does hold Ahsoka as a prisoner. The younglings form a plan to infiltrate the pirate hideout on Florrum.
title: The Clone Wars S05E08: Bound for Rescue

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S05E09: A Necessary Bond
synopsis: General Grievous leads an attack on Hondo Ohnaka's base, forcing the pirates to form a temporary alliance with Ahsoka and the Jedi younglings.
title: The Clone Wars S05E09: A Necessary Bond

synopsis: R2-D2 joins a team of Republic Droids known as D-Squad, led by Colonel Gascon. Their mission: to steal an encryption module from a Separatist dreadnought.
title: Secret Weapons

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S05E11: A Sunny Day In The Void
synopsis: D-Squad has obtained their mission objective, but crash-land on a desolate planet after a run-in with comets.
title: The Clone Wars S05E11: A Sunny Day In The Void

synopsis: Colonel Gascon and the five droids of D-Squad have arrived at the remote town of Pons Ora on the planet Abafar and find a clone commando suffering from amnesia.
title: Missing In Action

synopsis: Finally on their way back to Republic space, D-Squad uncovers a Separatist plan involving a sabotaged Jedi cruiser.
title: Point Of Not Return

synopsis: Darth Maul and Savage Opress join forces with the Death Watch and together they recruit the Black Sun and Hutt crime lords to form the Shadow Collective.
title: Eminence

synopsis: The Sith brothers and their criminal allies attack Mandalore and the Death Watch pretends to defeat them, causing the gullible people to choose Pre Vizla's rule over Duchess Satine's.
title: Shades Of Reason

synopsis: Darth Maul has taken over leadership of Death Watch. Though the Jedi cannot officially interfere, Obi-Wan Kenobi travels to Mandalore to rescue Satine.
title: The Lawless

synopsis: Anakin and Ahsoka are tasked to investigate a bombing at the Jedi Temple since they were two of the few Jedi off-planet at the time it occurred.
title: Sabotage

displayTitle: The Jedi Who Knew Too Much
synopsis: When the suspect of the Temple bombing is murdered in her cell, Ahsoka suddenly finds herself framed and on the run from the Republic military.
title: The Jedi Who Knew Too Much

synopsis: Ahsoka is on the run and hiding in the criminal underworld of Coruscant. She strikes up an unlikely alliance with a former enemy turned bounty hunter.
title: To Catch A Jedi

synopsis: Ahsoka Tano is put on trial by the Jedi Council and must face the Galactic Senate. Anakin searches for a way to prove his Padawan's innocence by pursuing Asajj Ventress.
title: The Wrong Jedi

synopsis: Clone trooper Tup is suffering from a severe neurological disorder that causes the death of a Jedi master. Trying to find the motives for the assassination, Anakin escorts Tup back to Kamino for examination.
title: The Unknown

synopsis: Clone trooper Tup is undergoing a medical examination in the sterile laboratories of Kamino to find the motives for his shocking attack on the Jedi Master. For the examination to succeed, trooper Fives must enter the depth of Tup's mind.
title: The Clone Wars S06E02: Conspiracy

synopsis: Clone trooper Tup is transported back to Coruscant, where his body is to be examined by the chancellor's personal physician. ARC Trooper Fives is also investigating the matter.
title: Fugitive

synopsis: Fives is still trying to find answers regarding the mysterious actions of clone trooper Tup. Hoping to personally speak with Chancellor Palpatine, Fives finds himself suddenly accused of trying to murder the Chancellor.
title: Orders

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S06E05: An Old Friend
synopsis: While on Scipio to fund a mercy mission, Padmé Amidala is called upon by an old friend, Rush Clovis, to help uncover corruption in the Banking Clan.
title: The Clone Wars S06E05: An Old Friend

synopsis: Clovis, a known traitor of the Republic, makes a dubious deal on Coruscant which puts him at the head of the Banking Clan.
title: The Rise Of Clovis

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S06E07: Crisis At The Heart
synopsis: After making a deal with Count Dooku to resuscitate the ailing Banking Clan, Clovis finds himself as a pawn in Dooku's designs.
title: The Clone Wars S06E07: Crisis At The Heart

synopsis: The peaceful world of Bardotta and its mystic ways are threatened by an ancient prophecy, and its top spiritual leaders have vanished.
title: The Disappeared pt1

synopsis: Jar Jar Binks' beloved Queen Julia of the planet Bardotta has been abducted by the bloodthirsty Frangawl Cult to fulfill a dark and ancient prophecy.
title: The Disappeared pt 2

synopsis: A Jedi mission finds a lightsaber belonging to the long-dead Master Sifo-Dyas, prompting Yoda, Obi-Wan and Anakin to begin an investigation into his decade-old disappearance.
title: The Lost Ones

synopsis: Yoda is deeply unsettled when he hears a voice from beyond the grave - the voice of Qui-Gon Jinn.
title: Voices

synopsis: Letting the Force guide him, Yoda voyages into the heart of the galaxy to an ancient world that is one of the wellsprings of the Force and the source of midi-chlorians.
title: Destiny

synopsis: After many grueling trials, Yoda next travels to the ancient Sith home world of Moraband, where he must face an ancient evil determined to rule the galaxy.
title: Sacrifice

synopsis: After repeated setbacks on the planet Anaxes, an elite clone squad is deployed to investigate the Separatists’ tactical advantage. This special unit called “the Bad Batch” infiltrates Admiral Trench’s cyber center to steal a strategic algorithm capable of predicting the Republic’s every move. What our heroes found was a live signal from the Arc Trooper known as Echo, a clone long believed to be dead...
title: The Bad Batch

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S07E02: A Distant Echo
synopsis: On an unsanctioned mission to rescue the ARC Trooper Echo, General Skywalker, Captain Rex, and the Bad Batch travel travel to Skako Minor, headquarters of the Techno Union. After a harrowing encounter with the natives, our heroes infiltrate the city of Purkoll, only to find themselves surrounded by Wat Tambor’s forces.
title: The Clone Wars S07E02: A Distant Echo

synopsis: With the help of the Bad Batch, Captain Rex rescues his old friend, ARC Trooper Echo, from the Techno Union. The Separatists’ loss of Echo’s strategic algorithm provides a chance for the Republic to turn the tide in the battle for Anaxes. However, Echo’s horrifying experience behind enemy lines leaves lingering questions of his true loyalty and uncertain future.
title: On The Wings Of Keeradaks

synopsis: ARC Trooper Echo has a plan to save Anaxes: infiltrate the Separaitst base, feed misinformation to Admiral Trench, and give secret intel to the Republic. The mission is a true test of Echo’s loyalties and of his comrades’ trust. Even with Anakin Skywalker, Obi-Wan Kenobi, Mace Windu, Captain Rex, and the Bad Batch, outsmarting Admiral Trench is far from easy. The Bad Batch arc of Clone Wars Season Seven concludes in truly explosive fashion!
title: Unfinished Business

synopsis: After leaving the Jedi Order, Ahsoka Tano finds herself in the underworld of Coruscant where she meets aspiring pilot Trace Martez. Enlisted by Trace's sister Rafa to help build dangerous droids, Ahsoka opts to keep her Jedi past a secret.
title: Gone With A Trace

synopsis: Ahsoka, Trace, and Rafa are hired to deliver some spice, but things soon get complicated.
title: Deal No Deal

synopsis: Taken prisoner by the Pykes, Ahsoka and the Martez sisters attempt to escape.
title: Dangerous Debt

synopsis: Ahsoka bargains for the sisters' freedom and makes a startling discovery.
title: Together Again

synopsis: Ahsoka contacts Anakin and Obi-Wan, who must decide whether to help her pursue Maul on Mandalore or defend Coruscant.
title: Old Friends Not Forgotten

synopsis: Ahsoka leads Republic clones to confront Maul's forces on Mandalore. Maul senses the impending chaos and makes a calculated play to ensure his own survival.
title: The Phantom Apprentice

synopsis: After capturing Maul on Mandalore, Ahsoka's journey to the Jedi Council is disrupted when Order 66 is declared, turning her world upside down.
title: Shattered

synopsis: Ahsoka and Rex must use their wit and skills to survive the turbulent end of the Clone Wars.
title: Victory And Death

displayTitle: The Clone Wars S2E16: Cat and Mouse
synopsis: Obi-Wan and Anakin must deliver supplies to Christophsis while the planet is under Separatist control. They encounter Separatist Commander Admiral Trench and get more than they bargained for.
title: The Clone Wars S2E16: Cat and Mouse

synopsis: The Jedi heroes Yoda, Anakin, Obi-Wan, and newcomer Ahsoka fight against the evil Separatists led by Count Dooku, the assassin Asajj Ventress, and the mechanical General Grievous. Each episode is an action-packed adventure that introduces new characters and explores new planets as the Jedi and their valiant clone troopers defend the Star Wars galaxy.
title: The Clone Wars - Season 1

synopsis: Fierce battles, exciting stories, and breathtaking animation raise the stakes higher than ever in Star Wars: The Clone Wars. The struggle of the Jedi heroes grows more complex as secret and forbidden relationships are revealed, lives are endangered, and a new breed of evil enters the war - merciless bounty hunters. From Executive Producer George Lucas and Lucasfilm Animation, Season Two promises thrilling new adventures, never-before-seen characters and creatures, and untold Star Wars stories.
title: The Clone Wars - Season 2

synopsis: Mystery, intrigue and adventure await our heroes with all-new action-packed episodes. The dark side grows even stronger and the Jedi Knights are pushed to the limit. The lines between good and evil become blurred as secrets are uncovered, truths are questioned, and alliances are betrayed. In this transformative season of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, the fate of the galaxy hangs in the balance and the destiny of the "Chosen One" will at long last be revealed.
title: The Clone Wars - Season 3

synopsis: Escalating and expanding into uncharted corners of the galaxy, the scope and scale of Star Wars: The Clone Wars continues to grow. Fearsome foes from the past return to settle old scores, and unexpected alliances are formed on both sides of the battle.
title: The Clone Wars - Season 4

synopsis: Season Five is filled with explosive action, exotic worlds, intriguing characters and shocking turns as several major players face their destinies as the galaxy plunges into darkness.
title: The Clone Wars - Season 5

synopsis: Some of the deepest mysteries of the conflict between the light and the dark sides of the Force are revealed. An intrepid clone trooper discovers a shocking secret carried by each and every soldier of the Republic. Anakin Skywalker's closest relationship is tested to its limits when a well-intentioned senator is manipulated by the masterminds of the war. A wicked enemy from the past uncovers an ancient weapon that could give her unrivaled power. And Master Yoda's investigation into the disappearance of a Jedi takes him deep inside the Force's mysteries, where what he discovers could forever ch
title: The Clone Wars - Season 6

synopsis: The seventh season of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, subtitled The Final Season, consists of twelve episodes. Story arcs include the Bad Batch, Ahsoka's Journey, and the Siege of Mandalore, the series finale.
title: The Clone Wars - Season 7

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 1: Breakout Squad
synopsis: A young Jedi apprentice and his master's clone troopers must do everything in their power to survive, while being hunted by the notorious bounty hunter Cad Bane.
title: The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 1: Breakout Squad

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 2: Curse of the Black Hole Pirates
synopsis: Jedi Padawan Nuru Kungurama and a group of clone troopers are sent on a mission to the Unknown Regions.
title: The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 2: Curse of the Black Hole Pirates

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 3: Duel at Shattered Rock
synopsis: Nuru Kunguram and the clone troopers discover a sabateur while escorting new Republic allies across the galaxy.
title: The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 3: Duel at Shattered Rock

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 4: Guardians of the Chiss Key
synopsis: Nuru Kungurama's return to the Jedi Temple is met with more disaster, and a dangerous confrontation.
title: The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 4: Guardians of the Chiss Key

synopsis: The Grand Army of the Republic, led by Yoda, Mace Windu, Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker and other Jedi Knights, fights the New Droid Army of the Separatists.
title: The Clone Wars

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Shadowed is a short webcomic leading directly into the The Clone Wars episode "The Hidden Enemy."
title: The Clone Wars: Shadowed

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Shakedown is a six-page webcomic and the second issue in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series. Posted on StarWars.com on October 2, 2008, Shakedown leads directly into the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series episode "Rising Malevolence." It was written by Pablo Hidalgo, illustrated by Thomas Hodges, colored by Jeffery Carlisle, and lettered by Grant Gould. The comic introduces the Separatists' new secret weapon, the Subjugator-class heavy cruiser Malevolence, which is destroying fleets of the Republic Navy in hit-and-run attacks.
title: The Clone Wars: Shakedown

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Shipyards of Doom
synopsis: Introducing a new, quarterly, graphic-novella series based on the exciting new Clone Wars motion picture and "Clone Wars" animated television series! In "The Shipyards of Doom," Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker lead an elite Clone Trooper strike force to destroy the Separatists' most important shipyards. But when the enemy is tipped off to their plan, the two Jedi heroes are forced to rely on help from Anakin's new, and still "wet behind the ears" Padawan, Ahsoka. But what can she do against the droid armies of General Grievous? Written by Henry Gilroy, the head writer for the TV show, Star
title: The Clone Wars: Shipyards of Doom

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Sith Hunters
synopsis: "Would-be Sith Savage Opress has located his long-lost brother, Darth Maul! Now the two of them have embarked on a killing spree, cutting a deadly swath through the Outer Rim planets. Determined to stop the brothers, the Jedi Council sends a task force of skilled Jedi to hunt them down and bring them to justice. But when you're hunting Sith, be careful... You might just catch them! Cover art by Dave Filoni, the supervising director of the TV show The Clone Wars!"
title: The Clone Wars: The Sith Hunters

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Smuggler's Code
synopsis: When he encounters a criminal from his past, Jedi Master Obi-Wan Kenobi strikes out, determined to fulfill a promise he made to himself as a young Jedi: to bring in this fugitive on his own! While on the trail, Obi-Wan earns a favor from a local smuggler, but her devotion to working for her own benefit may be more trouble for Obi-Wan than her help is actually worth!
title: The Clone Wars: The Smuggler's Code

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap
synopsis:
Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi are sent to destroy a Separatist weapons factory. They knock out its shield generator but grow uneasy when the supporting task force fails to attack. Picked up by Master Jyl Somtay, they learn why: an enormous Separatist warship, the *Starcrusher*, has annihilated the Republic fleet. The Jedi Council devises a response, sending Obi-Wan, Ahsoka Tano, Mace Windu, Ki-Adi-Mundi, and Somtay to destroy the *Starcrusher* while Anakin is dispatched on a mission for the Supreme Chancellor.

The ship the Jedi board proves to be a decoy planted by Darth Sidious and programmed to fly straight into the system's sun, a trap meant to kill the Jedi. When Somtay briefly loses faith that they can escape, Mace reminds her that they are Jedi and will find a way, though he admits he does not yet know how. Defying the Chancellor's orders, Anakin arrives to help just as the real *Starcrusher* drops out of hyperspace. He cuts all power to the enemy ship while Obi-Wan magnetizes its hull, dragging both vessels into the sun, and the Jedi escape in space suits found aboard. Back on Coruscant, Somtay apologizes for her doubt, and Mace counsels her to be mindful of her feelings but never let them control her actions.
title: The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Stories of Light and Dark
synopsis: Epic tales from The Clone Wars come to life through an anthology of stories recounting the conflicts between the Republic, Separatists, Jedi, and Sith.
title: The Clone Wars: Stories of Light and Dark

synopsis: With so many Jedi Generals occupied with the Clone Wars, assignments that would usually go to Knights or Masters are falling to Jedi in training—in this case, masterless Padawan Nuru Kungurama. Accompanied by his squad of clone troopers and a hulking swoop biker named Gizz, Nuru's job begins as a routine protection detail, but soon evolves to include a mystery massacre, the hijacking of a space freighter, and the kidnapping of a group of orphaned younglings!
title: The Clone Wars: Strange Allies

synopsis: The Clone Wars: Switch is a six-page Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic, posted on StarWars.com on January 9, 2009, leading directly into the The Clone Wars episode "The Gungan General." It was written by Pablo Hidalgo, drawn and colored by Katie Cook, and lettered by Grant Gould. Switch details the story of the Kowakian monkey-lizard Pilf Mukmuk as he tries to capture Jedi Master Obi-Wan Kenobi and his former apprentice, Anakin Skywalker.
title: The Clone Wars: Switch

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Ballad of Cham Syndulla
synopsis: The Clone Wars: The Ballad of Cham Syndulla is a short webcomic leading directly into the The Clone Wars episode "Liberty on Ryloth."
title: The Clone Wars: The Ballad of Cham Syndulla

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Battle For Ryloth
synopsis: The planet of Ryloth has fallen under siege by Separatist forces. Now Mace Windu must lead the clone army against the evil Separatist Alliance. Only the power of the Force can liberate the people of Ryloth from the brutal droid occupation.
title: The Clone Wars: The Battle For Ryloth

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Dreams of General Grievous
synopsis: "The Clone Wars: The Dreams of General Grievous" is a six-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series that takes place prior to the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series episode "Lair of Grievous." Posted on StarWars.com on December 10, 2008, it was written by Pablo Hidalgo and illustrated and lettered by Katie Cook, Grant Gould, Thomas Hodges, and Jeffery Carlisle. "The Dreams of General Grievous" shows the cyborg General Grievous thinking about his past as a Kaleesh warrior as he travels to his castle on the third moon of Vassek. However, a B1-Series battle droid bre
title: The Clone Wars: The Dreams of General Grievous

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Fall of Falleen
synopsis: "The Clone Wars: The Fall of Falleen" is a seven-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series that takes place prior to the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series episode "Downfall of a Droid." Posted on StarWars.com on November 7, 2008, the comic was written by Pablo Hidalgo, illustrated by Thomas Hodges, and lettered by Grant Gould. "The Fall of Falleen" depicts the actions of Asajj Ventress and Count Dooku during the final act of a battle on the planet of Falleen.
title: The Clone Wars: The Fall of Falleen

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Gauntlet of Death
synopsis: Note: this summary refers to the entire comic, which includes non-Star Wars material as well. A special issue featuring the greatest heroes of The Clone Wars, plus Emily the Strange, Usagi Yojimbo, and other all-ages favorites! Packed with 28 pages of story, the book bears two covers, one with the Star Wars character, the other celebrating Dark Horse's best all-ages characters! Complete list of content: Usagi Yojimbo (6 pages), Emily the Strange (4 pages), Beanworld (2 pages), Indiana Jones and the Temple of Yearning (6 pages), Star Wars (8 pages)
title: The Clone Wars: The Gauntlet of Death

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Holocron Heist
synopsis: The ruthless bounty hunter Cad Bane infiltrates the Jedi Temple and attempts to steal the Order's most guarded secret. It's up to Anakin and Ahsoka to stop Bane before he can use the secret to bring an end to the Jedi forever.
title: The Clone Wars: The Holocron Heist

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Hunt For Grievous
synopsis: The Clone Wars: The Hunt for Grievous is a young reader's book based on Star Wars: The Clone Wars TV series. It was released in July 2010.
title: The Clone Wars: The Hunt For Grievous

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The New Padawan
synopsis: Now that Anakin Skywalker is a full-fledged Jedi Knight, his days of being a Padawan learner are behind him. But the Jedi Council has assigned him a Padawan of his own. Her name is Ahsoka, and this young girl just might be more than the Jedi can handle.
title: The Clone Wars: The New Padawan

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Pengalan Tradeoff
synopsis: "The Pengalan Tradeoff", initially listed with the subtitle The Clone Wars: The Pengalan Tradeoff, is a short story written by Aaron Allston and illustrated by Tommy Lee Edwards. It was originally printed in Star Wars Insider 65 and was later republished as Hyperspace Fiction on January 27, 2006.
title: The Clone Wars: The Pengalan Tradeoff

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Secret Villain
synopsis: To aid in his war against the Jedi, Count Dooku sets out to find a new student. Chosen from the best warriors in the galaxy, Savage Opress takes his place as the Sith Lord's new apprentice.
title: The Clone Wars: The Secret Villain

synopsis: The Clone Wars: The Valley is a short webcomic leading directly into the Star Wars: The Clone Wars episode "Blue Shadow Virus." It was added to StarWars.com on February 13, 2009. It was written by Pablo Hidalgo, and illustrated and lettered by Grant Gould. The Valley shows Peppi Bow asking for help from Queen Neeyutnee because her shaak herds are acting restless and strange. Captain Typho goes to investigate, and finds three B1-Series battle droids and a tactical droid. The droids are destroyed, and Queen Neeyutnee summons Senator Padmé Amidala back to Naboo to help.
title: The Clone Wars: The Valley

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Valsedian Operation
synopsis: The Clone Wars: The Valsedian Operation is a webcomic in The Clone Wars webcomic series taking place right after the events of The Clone Wars: Act on Instinct. It was released concurrently with The Clone Wars television series' third season. It began on September 14, 2010 and its final issue was published on April 29, 2011.
title: The Clone Wars: The Valsedian Operation

synopsis: "The Clone Wars: Transfer" is a six-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series that was posted on StarWars.com on December 4, 2008. It leads directly into the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series episode "Cloak of Darkness" and was written by Pablo Hidalgo and lettered by Grant Gould, with art drawn by Katie Cook. "Transfer" shows the securing of captured Trade Federation Viceroy Nute Gunray and General Anakin Skywalker's ordering of his Padawan, Ahsoka Tano, to oversee Gunray's transfer to Coruscant alongside Jedi Master Luminara Unduli.
title: The Clone Wars: Transfer

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Warriors of the Deep
synopsis: This novelization retells the many stories of Star Wars: The Clone Wars Season 4, featuring Anakin Skywalker and the others fighting to win the war.
title: The Clone Wars: Warriors of the Deep

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Watch Out for Jabba the Hutt!
synopsis: Get your child hooked on reading as they meet the characters from the new "Star Wars Clone Wars" series. Designed to engage even the most reluctant reader, this fun-packed "Clone Wars Reader" is a first introduction to the characters from the new "Star Wars Clone Wars" animated film and TV series. From Jabba the Hutt and his son 'Stinky' to R2-D2 and C-3PO, your child will meet their favourite creatures, species, aliens, monsters and droids. Packed with pictures from the "Clone Wars" series, it's an out-of-this-world read. And don't forget, there's a galaxy-full of "DK Star Wars" books to coll
title: The Clone Wars: Watch Out for Jabba the Hutt!

synopsis: The Clone Wars have exploded across the galaxy as Republic forces and Separatists struggle to gain the upper hand. But while the Jedi generals work tirelessly to defeat Count Dooku and his rebels, Supreme Chancellor Palpatine is hatching his own dark plans. The Separatists have launched a sneak attack on Coruscant. Obi-Wan Kenobi, wounded in battle, insists that Anakin Skywalker and his rookie Padawan Ahsoka leave on a risky mission against General Grievous. But when Senator Bail Organa reveals explosive intelligence that could turn the tide of war in the Republic's favor, the Jedi Master agre
title: The Clone Wars: Wild Space

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Wind Raiders of Taloraan
synopsis: Jedi Knights Anakin and Obi-Wan, with Padawan Ahsoka, travel to the planet Taloraan in hopes of gaining some useful allies for the Galactic Republic. But the two ruling groups on the planet are not particularly interested in making a treaty - the Denfrandi are already more sympathetic toward the Separatists, and the Wind Raiders are simply unfriendly to everyone! It may be a merely impossible mission for the Jedi, or one that might end in disaster!
title: The Clone Wars: The Wind Raiders of Taloraan

displayTitle: The Clone Wars: Yoda In Action
synopsis: The Clone Wars: Yoda in Action! is a young readers Level 3 novel by DK Readers. It is based on the series premiere of the television series titled "Ambush" and was adapted by Heather Scott.
title: The Clone Wars: Yoda In Action

synopsis: "The Collector" is a short comic story published in Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.42 and Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine 16.
title: The Collector

synopsis: Han Solo and Chewbacca crash the damaged Millennium Falcon on an Outer Rim planet; the story reveals Han had posed as a bounty hunter ("the Corellian Kid") to deceive two Hutt crime lords who'd put a bounty on him, outwitting them and stranding them in the desert.
title: The Corellian Kid

synopsis: Darth Vader and the Emperor are dead, but the Empire lives on and the Alliance must continue the struggle with dwindling supplies of cash and resources. Princess Leia, seeking rich, powerful allies to bring into the Alliance and a new planet as a home for the influential refugees of Alderaan, considers a proposal that could tip the balance of power against the evil Empire. The Hapes consortium, a cluster of sixty-three high-tech worlds, is ruled by the Queen Mother, who wants Leia to marry her son, the dashing and wealthy Prince Isolder. When Han Solo hears the news of Leia's impending nuptial
title: The Courtship of Princess Leia

synopsis: "The Crystal" was a short story written by Elaine Cunningham and published in Star Wars Gamer 5 in 2001 and later on Hyperspace.
title: The Crystal

synopsis: Princess Leia is dealt a crushing blow when her three children—Anakin and the twins Jaina and Jacen—are kidnapped. Leia's advisers counsel her to wait for a ransom note, but waiting is the hardest thing for a mother to do when her children are in danger—and worse than waiting is her discovery that she cannot sense her children through the Force. Ultimately, the princess has no choice. She, Chewbacca, and Artoo-Detoo track the kidnappers, following their trail to a disabled refugee ship where the answers provided by Rillao, a mysterious fugitive, only provoke more questions. T
title: The Crystal Star

displayTitle: The Day after the Death Star!
synopsis: The Day after the Death Star! is a short comic that takes place, as the title says, the day after the destruction of the first Death Star. It is in this comic that Chewbacca receives a medal for his participation in the battle. The story first appeared in three parts in Marvel UK's Star Wars Weekly 97-99, and was reprinted and colorized in Marvel Illustrated Books' Star Wars. The story was named after the first original part; the other two parts were "Space Duel!" and "Empire Kills!." More recently, Dark Horse reprinted the story in Star Wars: Luke Skywalker, Last Hope for the Galaxy.
title: The Day after the Death Star!

synopsis: "The Droid Deception" is a short comic story published in Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.4 and Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine 1.
title: The Droid Deception

synopsis: "The Emperor's Trophy" was a short story and role-playing game written by Peter Schweighofer, originally published in Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 11 and later reprinted on Hyperspace.
title: The Emperor's Trophy

displayTitle: The Empire Strikes Back: The National Public Radio Dramatization
synopsis: The Empire Strikes Back movie followed the Rebel Alliance and the Empire through a struggle that crossed the galaxy, but the NPR dramatization will reveal scenes the movie never showed you… The ten episodes of this original radio dramatization script contain exciting new scenes and extra information on the events of the second installment in the acclaimed Star Wars series, which has become part of our modern mythology. And behind-the-scenes details come to light in an informative introduction by the script's author, Brian Daley—who wrote the episodes, reworked scenes on the spot i
title: The Empire Strikes Back: The National Public Radio Dramatization

synopsis:
"The End of History" is a canon short story which is included in Star Wars Insider 154. It is written by Alexander Freed and is illustrated by Chris Scalf.
When Miru Nadrinakar, a member of the Corellian Resistance, crashes on a Geonosian colony world, Antron Bach, an antique dealer in-hiding, must decide whether to help her escape the Galactic Empire or to protect the Jedi artifacts he has kept safe since the Jedi Order's destruction.
title: The End Of History

synopsis: The Ewok Adventure was a book-and-record set published as part of Buena Vista Records' Read-Along Adventures series. It was an adaptation of the TV movie Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure. It was produced by Ted Kryczko and released in 1984 as story book with 7" 33 ⅓ rpm record and Cassette tape. It is unknown who narrated the record as credits were not provided along with the book or record.
title: The Ewok Adventure (Caravan of Courage)

displayTitle: The Ewok Who Was Afraid: An Ewok Adventure
synopsis: Willy asks his big brother, Weechee, if he can be his partner in the raft race along the underground rapids. But the caves are dark and scary - and Willy is afraid. How Willy turns his fear into courage when it really counts is told in this exciting Ewok adventure!
title: The Ewok Who Was Afraid: An Ewok Adventure

displayTitle: The Ewoks and the Lost Children
synopsis: Two human children stranded on the forest moon of Endor are aided by the Ewoks as they try to rescue their parents from the Gorax, the most feared creature on Endor.
title: The Ewoks and the Lost Children

synopsis: Two young Ewoks go hang-gliding; a storm carries them far from their village.
title: The Ewoks' Hang-Gliding Adventure

synopsis: A year after the fall of Starlight Beacon, the battle to navigate in and out of the Occlusion Zone is just beginning.
title: The Eye of Darkness

synopsis: "The Face of Evil" is a short story by Landry Q. Walker that was published as an eBook on November 30, 2015, and in print inside the anthology Tales from a Galaxy Far, Far Away: Aliens: Volume I on April 5, 2016. The story was written in a horror style.
title: The Face of Evil

synopsis: "The fake Jedi" is a comic story published in Star Wars Rebels Magazine. It was written by Martin Fisher, illustrated by Bob Molesworth, and edited by Gunther Nickel. The comic was originally released in the UK on March 25, 2015, for Star Wars Rebels Magazine 3, and was later reprinted in the US version of Star Wars Rebels Magazine 2 on December 15, 2015, and in the K-Zone Bag of Awesome! issue in July, 2016, of the Australian magazine K-Zone.[1]
title: The Fake Jedi

synopsis: Since its grand opening, Starlight Beacon has served as a center of hope for the galaxy. That’s why Marchion Ro, Eye of the Nihil, has his sights set on the station.
title: The Fallen Star

synopsis: The Farlander Papers is a companion book found only in the "Limited Edition" version of the Star Wars: X-Wing video game (the original floppy disk based release) written by Rusel DeMaria. The book contained a novella about Keyan Farlander's assignment in the Alliance to Restore the Republic.
title: The Farlander Papers
