displayTitle: Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones
synopsis:
During a break in training, Jacen and Jaina are reunited with their old friend Zekk, an orphan living in the streets on their home planet of Coruscant. Young, wild, and free, Zekk has never had a care in the world…until now. He sees the changes in his friends. Jacen and Jaina have learned so much, have grown in so many ways. Compared to them, he is only a lost little boy.
However, a powerful being has seen his potential. Someone who knows about shame and jealousy—and how to make use of them. Someone who knows that the dark side of the Force is especially attractive when you've got nothing to lose…
title: Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones

Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights comprises fourteen volumes that were published between 1995 and 1998 by Berkley Boulevard. A companion series titled Star Wars: Junior Jedi Knights was published concurrently.
title: Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Under Siege

displayTitle: Young Jedi Knights: Shards of Alderaan
synopsis:
When the Empire died, they were born—a new hope for the New Republic. The young twins of Han Solo and Princess Leia have taken their first steps as Jedi Knights, defeating the evil minions of the Shadow Academy. Now, with their friends Tenel Ka and Lowbacca the Wookiee, the future heroes of an already legendary saga continue their training.
Jacen and Jaina set off for the Alderaan system, determined to salvage a piece of the shattered planet as a gift for their mother. But amid the ghosts of a dead world, the twins are in for a deadly surprise: some ghosts still live. A long-lost enemy of the Solo family is about to return…
title: Young Jedi Knights: Shards of Alderaan

synopsis: Everyone is searching for Bornan Thul. Not only is he father to one of Jacen's and Jaina's fellow students, he holds the key to a secret coalition gaining power in the New Republic. The young Jedi Knights race across the galaxy to find him—but they may be too late. For their true enemy is about to show its treacherous face. And it will be shockingly familiar…
title: Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance

displayTitle: Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur
synopsis: As the search for Raynar Thul's father continues, the young Jedi Knights turn for help to a most unusual—and dangerous—source: the reprogrammed assassin droid IG-88. They think they can keep him under control. But can one of the most feared bounty hunters in the galaxy be trusted?
title: Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur

synopsis: Even in the middle of war, the training of the next generation of Jedi can't be overlooked… When a nocturnal expedition takes an unexpected turn in the latest issue's brand new comic strip, Anakin needs the help of some 'Younglings'!
title: Younglings

synopsis: Zam Wesell is everything you'd want in a girl: beauty, intelligence, style, the ability to strip and assemble an EE-3 blaster rifle in less than six seconds… She really does have it all. It's no wonder that she has caught the eye of fellow bounty hunter, Jango Fett. Jango is going to need her help in finding and destroying a powerful artifact that could prove to be very destructive if it fell into the wrong hands. Though he isn't usually this sentimental, he wants to make sure the galaxy is safe for his young son. However, Zam's motivations are not so noble. She plans to sell the artifa
title: Zam Wesell

synopsis: Zeb’s desire to see the destruction of the evil Empire is about to lead him headfirst into some trouble.
title: Zeb to the Rescue

synopsis: Han Solo is thinking of getting married. Trioculus has found his queen. But the father of Jabba the Hutt is about to shatter their plans. The battle to defeat the forces of the evil Galactic Empire rages on. Throughout the vastness of space, heroic men, women, and aliens of the Rebel Alliance fight valiantly to keep alive the hopes for freedom and to restore the ways of the Old Republic with its wise Senate and noble line of Jedi Knights. But a feud between two powerful villains may prove disastrous for the Alliance. Trioculus is determined to steal away Princess Leia from Han Solo and make he
title: Zorba the Hutt's Revenge

synopsis: Master Qui-Gon Jinn struggles to train his Padawan, Obi-Wan Kenobi, as the master's past haunts him, and then returns unexpectedly.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival

synopsis: Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi find themselves trapped on a dangerous planet, where they must rely on each other for hope, and survival.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Hidden Past

displayTitle: Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown
synopsis: Qui-Gon Jinn and young Obi-Wan Kenobi must save the planet Gala from its own people as a war for the royal throne threatens to tear the civilization apart.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown

displayTitle: Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead
synopsis: Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi find themselves on opposite sides of a brewing war as the padawan discovers who the rebels leading the fight truly are.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead

synopsis: Obi-Wan Kenobi thought he was on the right side of a revolution. But now that everything is going wrong, and his master has returned to the Jedi Temple without him, he’s going to have to find a way out of trouble all on his own.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Uncertain Path

synopsis: An attack on the Jedi Temple has left Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi in charge of figuring out what’s really going on.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple

displayTitle: Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning
synopsis: When Qui-Gon Jinn and his Padawan Obi-Wan Kenobi are framed for a crime they did not commit, they must work together to survive on a planet where they’re more unsafe than ever.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning

displayTitle: Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth
synopsis: Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi travel to he planet Kegan to retrieve a Force-sensitive child and bring them back to train as a Jedi. But master and apprentice arrive to discover they are quite unwelcome.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth

synopsis: When the heir to the Rutan throne is in danger of becoming the next victim in a long planetary tradition, Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi must step in, hoping they can prevent a war.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace

synopsis: A friend of Jedi Master Qui-Gon Jinn has become the target of a dangerous bounty hunter, and he’ll need the help of his apprentice, Obi-Wan Kenobi, to save the day.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Deadly Hunter

synopsis: When Jedi Master Qui-Gon Jinn becomes the prisoner of an evil scientist, it’s up to Obi-Wan Kenobi to rescue him.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment

synopsis: Jenna Zan Arbor’s quest for power and hunger for deeper knowledge of the Force is not the kind that can be used for good. Only the Jedi can stop her before it’s too late.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue

displayTitle: Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind
synopsis: Qui-Gon Jinn and his fellow Jedi Knight Tahl have a seemingly unbreakable bond. A bond that will be tested when the two Jedi and Obi-Wan Kenobi embark on a mission against the will of the Jedi Council.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind

displayTitle: Jedi Apprentice: The Death of Hope
synopsis: Qui-Gon Jinn has fallen in love. When the Jedi Knight he believes he can’t live without is kidnapped, he’s ready to do whatever it takes to get her back.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Death of Hope

displayTitle: Jedi Apprentice: The Call to Vengeance
synopsis: Qui-Gon Jinn is a wise and trustworthy Jedi, but tragedy can change just about anyone. The master’s quest for revenge is about to lead him down a path he may never return from.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Call to Vengeance

synopsis: When Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi take on an assignment forcing them to confront a dangerous crime family, they quickly realize a mission they thought would be simple is going to prove much more complicated than they expected.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness

synopsis: As he gets closer to becoming a Jedi Knight, Obi-Wan Kenobi’s changing relationship with his master, Qui-Gon Jinn, is about to put them both in even more danger as a mysterious threat approaches.
title: Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within

displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) #33: Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon Part II
synopsis:
**Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon, Part 2**

Counting the cost of her incorrigible thievery, sticky-fingered archaeologist Doctor Aphra is at the mercy of Rebel High Command. But things are about to get stickier. What's the one thing every galactic treasure hunter knows for sure? Exes never mark the spot.
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) #33: Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon Part II

synopsis: After losing the man she loves to a bounty hunter, Princess Leia embarks on a dangerous mission with R2-D2 and C-3PO in this exciting tale set just before The Empire Strikes Back!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2017) #22 - A Matter Of Perception

displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #68: Rebels and Rogues Part 1
synopsis:
**Rebels and Rogues!**

"The evil lord Darth Vader, obsessed with finding young Skywalker, has dispatched thousands of remote probes into the far reaches of space..." That's right, you remember the opening titles of The Empire Strikes Back. Now find out what happened just before, as Luke and his friends launch a desperate, three-pronged mission of deception to keep the Empire from finding their new rebel base in a brand-new epic from the new ongoing team of Greg "Planet Hulk" Pak and Phil "Poe Dameron" Noto! Featuring Han and Leia undercover in a noir world of romance and danger! Luke and R2 facing off against the Executor in a single X-wing! And Chewie and Threepio, the greatest team-up you never knew you always needed!
title: Star Wars (2015) #68: Rebels and Rogues Part 1

synopsis:
**The Hunter!**

Darth Vader is on the hunt for a mysterious criminal syndicate operating outside of the Empire's rule. But little does he know he's being hunted by a group of the galaxy's deadliest bounty hunters, hired by the syndicate to take out Vader once and for all. Led by fallen Imperial officer Beilert Valance, this ragtag group of assassins will stop at nothing to kill the biggest bounty of their lives.
title: Target Vader #1
